Check active session\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!);\n      } else {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 2. Listen for changes\n    const {\n      data: { subscription },\n    } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!);\n      } else {\n        setCurrentUser(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 3. Load Restaurants\n    fetchRestaurants();\n\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string) => {\n    try {\n      // Get Profile Role\n      const { data: profile, error } = await supabase\n        .from('profiles')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', userId)\n        .single();\n\n      if (profile) {\n        let businessId = undefined;\n        // If business, get restaurant ID\n        if (profile.role === 'business') {\n          const { data: resto } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .select('id')\n            .eq('owner_id', userId)\n            .single();\n          if (resto) businessId = resto.id;\n        }\n\n        setCurrentUser({\n          id: userId,\n          email: email,\n          name: profile.full_name || 'Utilisateur',\n          role: profile.role as UserRole,\n          businessId,\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error fetching profile:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n    try {\n      // Fetch restaurants with their menu items\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .select(`\n          *,\n          menu_items (*)\n        `);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Map snake_case DB to camelCase Types\n        const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({\n          id: r.id,\n          ownerId: r.owner_id,\n          type: r.type,\n          name: r.name,\n          description: r.description,\n          latitude: r.latitude,\n          longitude: r.longitude,\n          isOpen: r.is_open,\n          rating: r.rating,\n          reviewCount: r.review_count,\n          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,\n          deliveryAvailable: r.delivery_available,\n          coverImage: r.cover_image || 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?grayscale',\n          menu: (r.menu_items || []).map((m: any) => ({\n            id: m.id,\n            name: m.name,\n            description: m.description,\n            price: m.price,\n            image: m.image,\n            category: m.category,\n            isAvailable: m.is_available\n          }))\n        }));\n        setRestaurants(mappedRestaurants);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error loading restaurants:\", err);\n      // Fallback to Mocks if DB is empty or error (optional)\n      // setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    setCurrentUser(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {\n    // Optimistic UI Update\n    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));\n    \n    // Update DB is handled in BusinessDashboard mostly, but for global refetch:\n    fetchRestaurants();\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-brand-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 1. Not Logged In -> Show Auth\n  if (!currentUser) {\n    return <AuthScreen onLogin={() => {}} />; // onLogin logic is now handled by auth state listener\n  }\n\n  // 2. Logged in as Business -> Show Dashboard\n  if (currentUser.role === 'business') {\n    const myRestaurant = restaurants.find(r => r.ownerId === currentUser.id);\n    // If business user but restaurant data not loaded yet or created\n    if (!myRestaurant) {\n         return (\n             <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center flex-col p-4 text-center\">\n                 <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\">Configuration en cours...</h2>\n                 <p className=\"text-gray-500\">Votre restaurant est en cours de création ou le chargement a échoué.</p>\n                 <button onClick={fetchRestaurants} className=\"mt-4 text-brand-600 underline\">Réessayer</button>\n                 <button onClick={handleLogout} className=\"mt-8 text-gray-400\">Se déconnecter</button>\n             </div>\n         )\n    }\n    \n    return (\n      <BusinessDashboard \n        user={currentUser} \n        restaurant={myRestaurant} \n        onUpdateRestaurant={handleUpdateRestaurant}\n        onLogout={handleLogout}\n      />\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 3. Logged in as Client -> Show Main App\n  return (\n    <CustomerView \n      user={currentUser}\n      allRestaurants={restaurants}\n      onLogout={handleLogout}\n    />\n  );\n}\n\nexport default App;"

Create Profile in DB\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name\n          });\n          if (profileError) throw profileError;\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, // Mock location around Gombe\n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? ?\")) return;\n    \n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('menu_items')\n        .delete()\n        .eq('id', itemId);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: .insert(newItemPayload)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Update Local\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id,\n          name: data.name,\n          description: data.description,\n          price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any,\n          isAvailable: data.is_available,\n          image: data.image\n        };\n\n        onUpdateRestaurant({\n          ...restaurant,\n          menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem]\n        });\n\n        // Reset Form\n        setNewItemName('');\n        setNewItemDesc('');\n        setNewItemPrice('');\n        setIsAddingItem(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding item:\", err);\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de l'ajout du plat\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-100 pb-20\">\n      {/* Header */}\n className=\"text-gray-400 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">Pro</span></h1>\n           <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">Bienvenue, {user.name}</p>\n        </div>\n        <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full text-gray-600 hover:text-red-500\">\n          <LogOut size={20} />\n        </button>\n      </header>\n\n      <main className=\"p-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto   <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-gray-800\">{restaurant.name}</h2>\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 capitalize\">{restaurant.type}</p>\n            <div className={`mt-2 Create Profile in DB\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          if (profileError) throw profileError;\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, // Ville du restaurant\n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, // Mock location around Gombe\n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ?               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from './lib/supabase';\nimport { MOCK_RESTAURANTS } from './constants';\nimport { Restaurant, User, UserRole, MenuItem } from './types';\nimport { AuthScreen } from './components/AuthScreen';\nimport { CustomerView } from './components/CustomerView';\nimport { BusinessDashboard } from './components/BusinessDashboard';\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Initialisation et écoute de la session\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // 1. Check active session\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!);\n      } else {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 2. Listen for changes\n    const {\n      data: { subscription },\n    } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!);\n      } else {\n        setCurrentUser(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 3. Load Restaurants\n    fetchRestaurants();\n\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string) => {\n    try {\n      // Get Profile Role and City\n      const { data: profile, error } = await supabase\n        .from('profiles')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', userId)\n        .single();\n\n      if (profile) {\n        let businessId = undefined;\n        // If business, get restaurant ID\n        if (profile.role === 'business') {\n          const { data: resto } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .select('id')\n            .eq('owner_id', userId)\n            .single();\n          if (resto) businessId = resto.id;\n        }\n\n        setCurrentUser({\n          id: userId,\n          email: email,\n          name: profile.full_name || 'Utilisateur',\n          role: profile.role as UserRole,\n          city: profile.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          businessId,\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error fetching profile:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n    try {\n      // Fetch restaurants with their menu items\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .select(`\n          *,\n          menu_items (*)\n        `);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Map snake_case DB to camelCase Types\n        const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({\n          id: r.id,\n          ownerId: r.owner_id,\n          type: r.type,\n          name: r.name,\n          description: r.description,\n          latitude: r.latitude,\n          longitude: r.longitude,\n          city: r.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          isOpen: r.is_open,\n          rating: r.rating,\n          reviewCount: r.review_count,\n          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,\n          deliveryAvailable: r.delivery_available,\n          coverImage: r.cover_image || 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?grayscale',\n          menu: (r.menu_items || []).map((m: any) => ({\n            id: m.id,\n            name: m.name,\n            description: m.description,\n            price: m.price,\n            image: m.image,\n            category: m.category,\n            isAvailable: m.is_available\n          }))\n        }));\n        setRestaurants(mappedRestaurants);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error loading restaurants:\", err);\n      // Fallback to Mocks if DB is empty or error (optional)\n      // setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    setCurrentUser(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {\n    // Optimistic UI Update\n    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));\n    \n    // Update DB is handled in BusinessDashboard mostly, but for global refetch:\n    fetchRestaurants();\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-brand-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 1. Not Logged In -> Show Auth\n  if (!currentUser) {\n    return <AuthScreen onLogin={() => {}} />; // onLogin logic is now handled by auth state listener\n  }\n\n  // 2. Logged in as Business -> Show Dashboard\n  if (currentUser.role === 'business') {\n    const myRestaurant = restaurants.find(r => r.ownerId === currentUser.id);\n    // If business user but restaurant data not loaded yet or created\n    if (!myRestaurant) {\n         return (\n             <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center flex-col p-4 text-center\">\n                 <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\">Configuration en cours...</h2>\n                 <p className=\"text-gray-500\">Votre restaurant est en cours de création ou le chargement a échoué.</p>\n                 <button onClick={fetchRestaurants} className=\"mt-4 text-brand-600 underline\">Réessayer</button>\n                 <button onClick={handleLogout} className=\"mt-8 text-gray-400\">Se déconnecter</button>\n             </div>\n         )\n    }\n    \n    return (\n      <BusinessDashboard \n        user={currentUser} \n        restaurant={myRestaurant} \n        onUpdateRestaurant={handleUpdateRestaurant}\n        onLogout={handleLogout}\n      />\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 3. Logged in as Client -> Show Main App\n  return (\n    <CustomerView \n      user={currentUser}\n      allRestaurants={restaurants}\n      onLogout={handleLogout}\n    />\n  );\n}\n\nexport default App;\n"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Restaurant, MenuItem, User } from '../types';\nimport { Plus, Trash2, Power, LogOut, Coffee, DollarSign } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  restaurant: Restaurant;\n  onUpdateRestaurant: (updated: Restaurant) => void;\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const BusinessDashboard: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  \n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      \n      // Update DB\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ is_open: newState })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n        \n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      // Update Local\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n        ...restaurant,\n        isOpen: newState\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de la mise à jour du statut\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    \n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('menu_items')\n        .delete()\n        .eq('id', itemId);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n        ...restaurant,\n        menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId)\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error deleting item:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`\n    };\n\n    try {\n      // Insert into DB\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('menu_items')\n        .insert(newItemPayload)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Update Local\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id,\n          name: data.name,\n          description: data.description,\n          price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any,\n          isAvailable: data.is_available,\n          image: data.image\n        };\n\n        onUpdateRestaurant({\n          ...restaurant,\n          menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem]\n        });\n\n        // Reset Form\n        setNewItemName('');\n        setNewItemDesc('');\n        setNewItemPrice('');\n        setIsAddingItem(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding item:\", err);\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de l'ajout du plat\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-100 pb-20\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white shadow-sm px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center sticky top-0 z-10\">\n        <div>\n           <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600\">DashBoard<span className=\"text-gray-400 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">Pro</span></h1>\n           <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">Bienvenue, {user.name} ({restaurant.city})</p>\n        </div>\n        <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full text-gray-600 hover:text-red-500\">\n          <LogOut size={20} />\n        </button>\n      </header>\n\n      <main className=\"p-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-6\">\n        \n        {/* Status Card */}\n        <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n          <div>\n            <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-gray-800\">{restaurant.name}</h2>\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 capitalize\">{restaurant.type} • {restaurant.city}</p>\n            <div className={`mt-2 inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold ${restaurant.isOpen ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-700'}`}>\n              {restaurant.isOpen ? 'Établissement Ouvert' : 'Établissement Fermé'}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <button \n            onClick={toggleOpen}\n            className={`w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-colors shadow-inner ${restaurant.isOpen ? 'bg-green-500 text-white' : 'bg-red-500 text-white'}`}\n          >\n            <Power size={24} />\n            <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold mt-1\">{restaurant.isOpen ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Menu Management */}\n        <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden\">\n          <div className=\"p-4 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50\">\n            <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\">\n              <Coffee               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from './lib/supabase';\nimport { MOCK_RESTAURANTS } from './constants';\nimport { Restaurant, User, UserRole, MenuItem } from './types';\nimport { AuthScreen } from './components/AuthScreen';\nimport { CustomerView } from './components/CustomerView';\nimport { BusinessDashboard } from './components/BusinessDashboard';\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Initialisation et écoute de la session\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // 1. Check active session\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!);\n      } else {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 2. Listen for changes\n    const {\n      data: { subscription },\n    } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!);\n      } else {\n        setCurrentUser(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 3. Load Restaurants\n    fetchRestaurants();\n\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string) => {\n    try {\n      // Get Profile Role and City\n      const { data: profile, error } = await supabase\n        .from('profiles')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', userId)\n        .single();\n\n      if (profile) {\n        let businessId = undefined;\n        // If business, get restaurant ID\n        if (profile.role === 'business') {\n          const { data: resto } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .select('id')\n            .eq('owner_id', userId)\n            .single();\n          if (resto) businessId = resto.id;\n        }\n\n        setCurrentUser({\n          id: userId,\n          email: email,\n          name: profile.full_name || 'Utilisateur',\n          role: profile.role as UserRole,\n          city: profile.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          businessId,\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error fetching profile:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n    try {\n      // Fetch restaurants with their menu items\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .select(`\n          *,\n          menu_items (*)\n        `);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Map snake_case DB to camelCase Types\n        const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({\n          id: r.id,\n          ownerId: r.owner_id,\n          type: r.type,\n          name: r.name,\n          description: r.description,\n          latitude: r.latitude,\n          longitude: r.longitude,\n          city: r.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          isOpen: r.is_open,\n          rating: r.rating,\n          reviewCount: r.review_count,\n          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: r.estimated_delivery_time || 20, // Default to 20 if null\n          deliveryAvailable: r.delivery_available,\n          coverImage: r.cover_image || 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?grayscale',\n          menu: (r.menu_items || []).map((m: any) => ({\n            id: m.id,\n            name: m.name,\n            description: m.description,\n            price: m.price,\n            image: m.image,\n            category: m.category,\n            isAvailable: m.is_available\n          }))\n        }));\n        setRestaurants(mappedRestaurants);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error loading restaurants:\", err);\n      // Fallback to Mocks if DB is empty or error (optional)\n      // setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    setCurrentUser(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {\n    // Optimistic UI Update\n    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));\n    \n    // Update DB is handled in BusinessDashboard mostly, but for global refetch:\n    fetchRestaurants();\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-brand-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 1. Not Logged In -> Show Auth\n  if (!currentUser) {\n    return <AuthScreen onLogin={() => {}} />; // onLogin logic is now handled by auth state listener\n  }\n\n  // 2. Logged in as Business -> Show Dashboard\n  if (currentUser.role === 'business') {\n    const myRestaurant = restaurants.find(r => r.ownerId === currentUser.id);\n    // If business user but restaurant data not loaded yet or created\n    if (!myRestaurant) {\n         return (\n             <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center flex-col p-4 text-center\">\n                 <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\">Configuration en cours...</h2>\n                 <p className=\"text-gray-500\">Votre restaurant est en cours de création ou le chargement a échoué.</p>\n                 <button onClick={fetchRestaurants} className=\"mt-4 text-brand-600 underline\">Réessayer</button>\n                 <button onClick={handleLogout} className=\"mt-8 text-gray-400\">Se déconnecter</button>\n             </div>\n         )\n    }\n    \n    return (\n      <BusinessDashboard \n        user={currentUser} \n        restaurant={myRestaurant} \n        onUpdateRestaurant={handleUpdateRestaurant}\n        onLogout={handleLogout}\n      />\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 3. Logged in as Client -> Show Main App\n  return (\n    <CustomerView \n      user={currentUser}\n      allRestaurants={restaurants}\n      onLogout={handleLogout}\n    />\n  );\n}\n\nexport default App;"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city } // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          if (profileError) throw profileError;\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ?               "replacement": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Restaurant, MenuItem, User } from '../types';\nimport { Plus, Trash2, Power, LogOut, Coffee, DollarSign, Clock, Truck } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  restaurant: Restaurant;\n  onUpdateRestaurant: (updated: Restaurant) => void;\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const BusinessDashboard: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [updatingTimes, setUpdatingTimes] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ \n            preparation_time: newPrep,\n            estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv\n        })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n          ...restaurant,\n          preparationTime: newPrep,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv\n      });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating times\", err);\n        alert(\"Erreur lors de la mise à jour\");\n    } finally {\n        setUpdatingTimes(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      \n      // Update DB\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ is_open: newState })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n        \n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      // Update Local\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n        ...restaurant,\n        isOpen: newState\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de la mise à jour du statut\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    \n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('menu_items')\n        .delete()\n        .eq('id', itemId);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n        ...restaurant,\n        menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId)\n      });\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error deleting item:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`\n    };\n\n    try {\n      // Insert into DB\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('menu_items')\n        .insert(newItemPayload)\n        .select()\n        .single();\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Update Local\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id,\n          name: data.name,\n          description: data.description,\n          price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any,\n          isAvailable: data.is_available,\n          image: data.image\n        };\n\n        onUpdateRestaurant({\n          ...restaurant,\n          menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem]\n        });\n\n        // Reset Form\n        setNewItemName('');\n        setNewItemDesc('');\n        setNewItemPrice('');\n        setIsAddingItem(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding item:\", err);\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de l'ajout du plat\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-100 pb-20\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white shadow-sm px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center sticky top-0 z-10\">\n        <div>\n           <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600\">DashBoard<span className=\"text-gray-400 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">Pro</span></h1>\n           <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">Bienvenue, {user.name} ({restaurant.city})</p>\n        </div>\n        <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full text-gray-600 hover:text-red-500\">\n          <LogOut size={20} />\n        </button>\n      </header>\n\n      <main className=\"p-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-6\">\n        \n        {/* Status Card */}\n        <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n          <div>\n            <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-gray-800\">{restaurant.name}</h2>\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 capitalize\">{restaurant.type} • {restaurant.city}</p>\n            <div className={`mt-2 inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold ${restaurant.isOpen ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-700'}`}>\n              {restaurant.isOpen ? 'Établissement Ouvert' : 'Établissement Fermé'}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <button \n            onClick={toggleOpen}\n            className={`w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-colors shadow-inner ${restaurant.isOpen ? 'bg-green-500 text-white' : 'bg-red-500 text-white'}`}\n          >\n            <Power size={24} />\n            <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold mt-1\">{restaurant.isOpen ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</span>\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Time Management Card */}\n        <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-100\">\n           <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-4 flex items-center\">\n             <Clock size={16} className=\"mr-2\"/> Temps d'attente (minutes)\n           </h3>\n           <div className=\"flex space-x-4 mb-3\">\n             <div className=\"flex-1\">\n               <label className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 font-bold block mb-1\">Préparation Cuisine</label>\n               <input \n                 type=\"number\" \n                 value={prepTime}\n                 onChange={e => setPrepTime(e.target.value)}\n                 className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded text-sm font-bold text-center\"\n               />\n             </div>\n             <div className=\"flex-1\">\n               <label className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 font-bold block mb-1 flex items-center\"><Truck size={10} className=\"mr-1\"/> Livraison Moyenne</label>\n               <input \n                 type=\"number\" \n                 value={deliveryTime}\n                 onChange={e => setDeliveryTime(e.target.value)}\n                 className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded text-sm font-bold text-center text-brand-600\"\n               />\n             </div>\n           </div>\n           <button \n             onClick={updateTimes}\n             disabled={updatingTimes}\n             className=\"w-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 font-bold py-2 rounded-lg text-xs hover:bg-gray-200\"\n           >\n             {updatingTimes ? 'Mise à jour...' : 'Mettre à jour les temps'}\n           </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Menu Management */}\n        <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden\">\n          <div className=\"p-4 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50\">\n            <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\">\n              <Coffee size={18} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-500\"/>\n              Menu & Carte ({restaurant.menu.length})\n            </h3>\n            <button \n              onClick={() => setIsAddingItem(!isAddingItem)}\n              className=\"flex items-center text-xs font-bold bg-brand-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-brand-700\"\n            >\n              <Plus size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Ajouter\n            </button>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Add Item Form */}\n          {isAddingItem && (\n            <form onSubmit={addItem} className=\"p-4 className=\"space-y-3\">\n                <input \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm\" \n                  placeholder=\"Nom du produit (ex: Poulet Mayo)\"\n                  value={newItemName}\n                  onChange={e => setNewItemName(e.target.value)}\n                  required\n                />\n                <textarea \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm\" \n                  placeholder=\"Description courte\"\n                  value={newItemDesc}\n                  onChange={e => setNewItemDesc(e.target.value)}\n                  required\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-2\">\n                   <div className=\"relative flex-1\">\n                      <DollarSign size={14} className=\"absolute left-3 top-3 text-gray-400\"/>\n                      <input \n                        type=\"number\" \n                        step=\"0.1\"\n                        className=\"w-full pl-8 p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm\" \n                        placeholder=\"Prix\"\n                        value={newItemPrice}\n                        onChange={e => setNewItemPrice(e.target.value)}\n                        required\n                      />\n                   </div>\n                   <select \n                      className=\"p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm flex-1\"\n                      value={newItemCategory}\n                      onChange={(e) => setNewItemCategory(e.target.value as any)}\n                   >\n                     <option value=\"plat\">Plat</option>\n                     <option value=\"entrée\">Entrée</option>\n                     <option <button \n                    type=\"submit\" \n                    disabled={loading}\n                    className=\"px-4 py-1.5 bg-brand-600 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-lg shadow-sm disabled:opacity-50\"\n                  >\n                    {loading ? '...' : 'Enregistrer'}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </form>\n          )}\n\n          {/* List Items */}\n          <div className=\"divide-y divide-gray-100\">\n            {restaurant.menu.length === 0 ?               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { MapPin, ShoppingBag, List, Map, Zap, ArrowLeft, Plus, Bike, Footprints, LogOut, Navigation, Filter, Clock, Receipt } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT, KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG, CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { Restaurant, UserState, ViewMode, MenuItem, CartItem, User, Order } from '../types';\nimport { calculateTime, getDistanceFromLatLonInKm, formatDistance, formatTime } from '../utils/geo';\nimport { RestaurantCard } from './RestaurantCard';\nimport { MapView } from './MapView';\nimport { CartDrawer } from './CartDrawer';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`\n                *,\n                restaurant:restaurants(name)\n            `)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: o.restaurant\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n\n    // Filter by City\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') {\n      list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    }\n\n    // Filter by Urgent Mode\n    if (urgentMode) {\n      list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    }\n    \n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    // If cart has items from another restaurant, confirm clear\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) {\n            return;\n        }\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) {\n             return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        }\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n\n    try {\n        const restaurantId = cart[0].restaurantId;\n        \n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .insert({\n                user_id: user.id,\n                restaurant_id: restaurantId,\n                status: 'pending',\n                total_amount: cartTotal,\n                items: cart\n            });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setCart([]);\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            setShowSuccess(false);\n            setViewMode('orders'); // Redirect to orders view\n            fetchOrders();\n        }, 3000);\n\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Checkout error:\", err);\n        alert(\"Une erreur est survenue lors de la commande.\");\n    } finally {\n        setIsCheckingOut(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';\n        case 'preparing': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';\n        case 'ready': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';\n        case 'delivering': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';\n        case 'completed': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800';\n        default: return 'bg-gray-100';\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusLabel = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'En attente';\n        case 'preparing': return 'En cuisine';\n        case 'ready': return 'Prêt';\n        case 'delivering': return 'En livraison';\n        case 'completed': return 'Livré';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'Annulé';\n        default: return status;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-6 text-center animate-fade-in\">\n           <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600 tracking-tight mr-2\">DashMeals</h1>\n                <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && (\n                <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">\n                    {cart.length}\n                </span>\n                )}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500\">\n                <LogOut size={20} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        {/* Location & City Filter - Only show in list/map mode */}\n        {(viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map') && (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1 flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg truncate\">\n                <MapPin size={14} className=\"mr-1.5 text-brand-500 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                <span className=\"truncate\">\n                    {userState.locationError ? \"Mode Démo\" : \"Ma Position\"}\n                </span>\n                </div>\n                \n                <select \n                className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold py-2 pl-2 pr-6 rounded-lg border border-brand-200 outline-none appearance-none bg-[length:10px] bg-[right_8px_center] bg-no-repeat\"\n                value={selectedCity}\n                onChange={(e) => setSelectedCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                <option value=\"Toutes\">Toutes les villes</option>\n                {CITIES_RDC.map(city => (\n                    <option key={city} value={city}>{city}</option>\n                ))}\n                </select>\n            </div>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* MAIN CONTENT AREA */}\n      <main className=\"p-4\">\n        \n        {viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map' ? (\n            <>\n                {/* FILTERS */}\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-3 mb-6 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-1\">\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)}\n                        className={`flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-bold text-sm shadow-sm transition-all border whitespace-nowrap ${urgentMode ? 'bg-red-500 text-white border-red-500 animate-pulse-fast' : 'bg-white text-gray-700 border-gray-200'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Zap size={16} className={`mr-1 ${urgentMode ? 'fill-white' : 'fill-none'}`} />\n                        Urgent - J'ai faim !\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">\n                        🍖 Grillades\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">\n                        🍗 Poulet\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* CONTENT */}\n                {viewMode === 'list' ? (\n                    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                        {filteredRestaurants.map(restaurant => (\n                            <RestaurantCard \n                                key={restaurant.id} \n                                restaurant={restaurant} \n                                onClick={() => {\n                                    setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant);\n                                    setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n                                }} \n                            />\n                        ))}\n                        {filteredRestaurants.length === 0 && (\n                            <div className=\"text-center py-10 text-gray-500\">\n                                <p>Aucun restaurant trouvé à <strong>{selectedCity}</strong> :(</p>\n                                {urgentMode && <button onClick={() => setUrgentMode(false)} className=\"text-brand-500 underline mt-2\">Désactiver le mode urgent</button>}\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n                    </div>\n                ) : (\n                    <MapView \n                        restaurants={filteredRestaurants} \n                        userLocation={userState.location} \n                        onSelect={(r) => {\n                            setSelectedRestaurant(r);\n                            setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n                        }}\n                    />\n                )}\n            </>\n        ) : viewMode === 'restaurant_detail' && selectedRestaurant ? \n                <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden mb-6\">\n                    <img src={selectedRestaurant.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-48 rounded-lg\">{selectedRestaurant.city}</span>\n                        </div>\n                        <p className=\"text-gray-500 mb-4\">{selectedRestaurant.description}</p>\n                        \n                        {/* Primary Stats */}\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-4 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n                            <span className=\"flex    {/* Travel Times with Icons */}\n                        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-2\">\n                             <div className=\"flex items-center p-3 bg-orange-50 rounded-lg                <p className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-70\">À pied</p>\n                                     <p className=\"font-bold text-lg     </div>\n\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n\n                <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-3\">Menu</h3>\n                <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n <img src={item.image} className=\"w-20 h-20 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-100\" alt={item.name} />\n                            <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col justify-between\">\n                                <div>\n                                    <h4 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800\">{item.name}</h4>\n                                    <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500    <span className=\"font-bold text-brand-600\">${item.price.toFixed(2)}</span>\n                                    <button \n                                        onClick={() => addToCart(item, selectedRestaurant)}\n                                        className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-600 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-100 transition-colors\"\n                                    >\n                                        <Plus size={16} />\n                                    </button>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    ))}\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        ) : viewMode === 'orders' ?            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n    } catch (err) {\n estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv\n        })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n          ...restaurant,\n          preparationTime: lors de la mise à jour\");\n    } finally {\n        setUpdatingTimes(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { MapPin, ShoppingBag, List, Map, Zap, ArrowLeft, Plus, Bike, Footprints, LogOut, Navigation, Filter, Clock, Receipt, CheckCircle, ChefHat, Package } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT, KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG, CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { Restaurant, UserState, ViewMode, MenuItem, CartItem, User, Order } from '../types';\nimport { calculateTime, getDistanceFromLatLonInKm, formatDistance, formatTime } from '../utils/geo';\nimport { RestaurantCard } from './RestaurantCard';\nimport { MapView } from './MapView';\nimport { CartDrawer } from './CartDrawer';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`\n                *,\n                restaurant:restaurants(name)\n            `)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: o.restaurant\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n\n    // Filter by City\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') {\n      list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    }\n\n    // Filter by Urgent Mode\n    if (urgentMode) {\n      list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    }\n    \n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    // If cart has items from another restaurant, confirm clear\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) {\n            return;\n        }\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) {\n             return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        }\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n\n    try {\n        const restaurantId = cart[0].restaurantId;\n        \n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .insert({\n                user_id: user.id,\n                restaurant_id: restaurantId,\n                status: 'pending',\n                total_amount: cartTotal,\n                items: cart\n            });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setCart([]);\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            setShowSuccess(false);\n            setViewMode('orders'); // Redirect to orders view\n            fetchOrders();\n        }, 3000);\n\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Checkout error:\", err);\n        alert(\"Une erreur est survenue lors de la commande.\");\n    } finally {\n        setIsCheckingOut(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';\n        case 'preparing': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';\n        case 'ready': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';\n        case 'delivering': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';\n        case 'completed': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800';\n        default: return 'bg-gray-100';\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusLabel = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'En attente';\n        case 'preparing': return 'En cuisine';\n        case 'ready': return 'Prêt';\n        case 'delivering': return 'En livraison';\n        case 'completed': return 'Livré';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'Annulé';\n        default: return status;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getProgressWidth = (status: string) => {\n    switch(status) {\n      case 'pending': return '10%';\n      case 'preparing': return '35%';\n      case 'ready': return '60%';\n      case 'delivering': return '80%';\n      case 'completed': return '100%';\n      default: return '0%';\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-6 text-center animate-fade-in\">\n           <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600 tracking-tight mr-2\">DashMeals</h1>\n                <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && (\n                <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">\n                    {cart.length}\n                </span>\n                )}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400
