              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city } // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          if (profileError) throw profileError;\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (message.includes(\"rate limit exceeded\") || message.includes(\"Too many requests\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives. Veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (message.includes(\"Invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (message.includes(\"User already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center animate-pulse\">\n              <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n              <span>{error}</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ?               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: Create Profile in DB\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          if (profileError) throw profileError;\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (message.includes(\"rate limit exceeded\") || message.includes(\"Too many requests\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives. Veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (message.includes(\"Invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (message.includes(\"User already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ?               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Restaurant, MenuItem, User, Order, OrderStatus } from Restaurant;\n  onUpdateRestaurant: (updated: Restaurant) => void;\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const BusinessDashboard: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'menu' | 'orders'>('menu');\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  \n  // Menu Management State\n  const [isAddingItem, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory,    }\n  }, [activeTab]);\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`\n                *,\n                profiles:user_id(full_name)\n            `)\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                customer: { full_name: o.profiles?.full_name || 'Client Inconnu' }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching restaurant orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateOrderStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n        alert(\"Erreur lors de la mise à jour\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  // ... Existing functions (updateTimes, toggleOpen, deleteItem, addItem) ...\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ \n            preparation_time: newPrep,\n            estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv\n        })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n          ...restaurant,\n          preparationTime: newPrep,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv\n      });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating times\", err);\n        alert(\"Erreur lors de la mise à jour\");\n    } finally {\n        setUpdatingTimes(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de la mise à jour du statut\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error deleting item:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').insert(newItemPayload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (data) {\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id, name: data.name, description: data.description, price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any, isAvailable: data.is_available, image: data.image\n        };\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem] });\n        setNewItemName(''); setNewItemDesc(''); setNewItemPrice(''); setIsAddingItem(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding item:\", err);\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de l'ajout du plat\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusBadge = (status: OrderStatus) => {\n      switch(status) {\n          case 'pending': return <span className=\"bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">En attente</span>;\n          case 'preparing': return <span className=\"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase animate-pulse\">En cuisine</span>;\n          case 'ready': return <span className=\"bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Prêt</span>;\n          case 'delivering': return <span className=\"bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Livraison</span>;\n          case 'completed': return <span className=\"bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Terminé</span>;\n          case 'cancelled': return <span className=\"bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Annulé</span>;\n      }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-100 pb-20\">\n      {/* Header */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white shadow-sm px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center sticky top-0 z-10\">\n        <div>\n           <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600\">DashBoard<span className=\"text-gray-400 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">Pro</span></h1>\n           <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">Bienvenue, {user.name} ({restaurant.city})</p>\n        </div>\n        <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 'border-brand-600 text-brand-600' : 'border-transparent text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n              <Coffee size={18} className=\"inline mr-2 mb-1\"/> Menu & Infos\n          </button>\n          <button \n            onClick={() => setActiveTab('orders')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold border-b-2 ${activeTab === 'orders' ? 'border-brand-600 text-brand-600' : 'border-transparent text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n              <Receipt size={18} className=\"inline mr-2 mb-1\"/> Commandes\n          </button>\n      </div>\n\n      <main className=\"p-4 max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-6\">\n        \n        {activeTab === 'menu' ? 'Établissement Ouvert' : 'Établissement Fermé'}\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <button \n                    onClick={toggleOpen}\n                    className={`w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-colors shadow-inner ${restaurant.isOpen ? 'bg-green-500 text-white' : 'bg-red-500 text-white'}`}\n                >\n                    <Power size={24} />\n                    <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold mt-1\">{restaurant.isOpen ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</span>\n                </button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* Time Management Card */}\n                <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-100\">\n                <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-4 flex items-center\">\n                    <Clock size={16} className=\"mr-2\"/> Temps d'attente (minutes)\n                </h3>\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-4 mb-3\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                    <label className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 font-bold block mb-1\">Préparation Cuisine</label>\n                    <input \n                        type=\"number\" \n                        value={prepTime}\n                        onChange={e => setPrepTime(e.target.value)}\n                        className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded text-sm font-bold text-center\"\n                    />\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                    <label className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 font-bold block mb-1 flex items-center\"><Truck size={10} className=\"mr-1\"/> Livraison Moyenne</label>\n                    <input \n                        type=\"number\" \n                        value={deliveryTime}\n                        onChange={e => setDeliveryTime(e.target.value)}\n                        className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded text-sm font-bold text-center text-brand-600\"\n                    />\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <button \n                    onClick={updateTimes}\n                    disabled={updatingTimes}\n                    className=\"w-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 font-bold py-2 rounded-lg text-xs hover:bg-gray-200\"\n                >\n                    {updatingTimes ? 'Mise à jour...' : 'Mettre à jour les temps'}\n                </button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* Menu Management */}\n                <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden\">\n                <div className=\"p-4 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-50\">\n                    <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\">\n                    <Coffee size={18} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-500\"/>\n                    Menu & Carte ({restaurant.menu.length})\n                    </h3>\n                    <button \n                    onClick={() => setIsAddingItem(!isAddingItem)}\n                    className=\"flex items-center text-xs font-bold bg-brand-600 text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-brand-700\"\n                    >\n                    <Plus size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Ajouter\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* Add Item Form */}\n                {isAddingItem && (\n                    <form onSubmit={addItem} className=\"p-4 bg-brand-50 border-b border-brand-100 animate-in slide-in-from-top\">\n                    <h4 className=\"font-bold text-brand-800 mb-3 text-sm\">Nouveau Plat / Boisson</h4>\n                    <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                        <input \n                        className=\"w-full p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm\" \n                        placeholder=\"Nom du produit (ex: Poulet Mayo)\"\n                        value={newItemName}\n                        onChange={e => setNewItemName(e.target.value)}\n                        required\n                        />\n                        <textarea \n                        className=\"w-full p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm\" \n                        placeholder=\"Description courte\"\n                        value={newItemDesc}\n                        onChange={e => setNewItemDesc(e.target.value)}\n                        required\n                        />\n                        <div className=\"flex space-x-2\">\n                        <div className=\"relative flex-1\">\n                            <DollarSign size={14} className=\"absolute left-3 top-3 text-gray-400\"/>\n                            <input \n                                type=\"number\" \n                                step=\"0.1\"\n                                className=\"w-full pl-8 p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm\" \n                                placeholder=\"Prix\"\n                                value={newItemPrice}\n                                onChange={e => setNewItemPrice(e.target.value)}\n                                required\n                            />\n                        </div>\n                        <select \n                            className=\"p-2 rounded border border-gray-300 text-sm flex-1 bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                            value={newItemCategory}\n                            onChange={(e) => setNewItemCategory(e.target.value as any)}\n                        >\n                            <option value=\"plat\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Plat</option>\n                            <option value=\"entrée\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Entrée</option>\n                            <option value=\"boisson\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Boisson</option>\n                            <option value=\"dessert\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Dessert</option>\n                        </select>\n                        </div>\n                        <div className=\"flex justify-end space-x-2 pt-2\">\n                        <button type=\"button\" onClick={() => setIsAddingItem(false)} className=\"px-3 py-1 text-sm text-gray-500\">Annuler</button>\n                        <button \n                            type=\"submit\" \n                            disabled={loading}\n                            className=\"px-4 py-1.5 bg-brand-600 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-lg shadow-sm disabled:opacity-50\"\n                        >\n                            {loading ? '...' : 'Enregistrer'}\n                        </button>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    </form>\n                )}\n\n                {/* List Items */}\n                <div className=\"divide-y divide-gray-100\">\n                    {restaurant.menu.length === 0 ? (\n                        <div className=\"p-8 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm\">\n                            Votre carte est vide. Ajoutez votre premier plat !\n                        </div>\n                    ) : (\n                        restaurant.menu.map(item => (\n                        <div key={item.id} className=\"p-4 flex items-center justify-between hover:bg-gray-50\">\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-3\">\n                            <img src={item.image} alt={item.name} className=\"w-12 h-12 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-200\" />\n                            <div>\n                                <p className=\"font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm\">{item.name}</p>\n                                <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">{item.price.toFixed(2)} $ • {item.category}</p>\n                            </div>\n                            </div>\n                            <button onClick={() => deleteItem(item.id)} className=\"text-red-400 hover:text-red-600 p-2\">\n                            <Trash2 size={16} />\n                            </button>\n                        </div>\n                        ))\n                    )}\n                </div>\n                </div>\n            </>\n        ) : (\n            // ORDERS VIEW\n            <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n                    <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-700\">Commandes Reçues</h3>\n                    <button onClick={fetchRestaurantOrders} className=\"text-xs text-brand-600 font-bold hover:underline\">Actualiser</button>\n                </div>\n\n                {orders.length === 0 ? (\n                    <div className=\"bg-white p-10 rounded-2xl text-center text-gray-400\">\n                        <p>Aucune commande pour le moment.</p>\n                    </div>\n                ) : (\n                    orders.map(order => (\n                        <div key={order.id} className=\"bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden\">\n                            <div className=\"p-4 border-b border-gray-50 flex justify-between items-start bg-gray-50/50\">\n                                <div>\n                                    <p className=\"font-bold text-gray-800\">{order.customer?.full_name}</p>\n                                    <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">{new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR', {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}</p>\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"text-right\">\n                                    <p className=\"font-black text-brand-600 text-lg\">${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</p>\n                                    {getStatusBadge(order.status)}\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                            \n                            <div className=\"p-4 bg-white\">\n                                <ul className=\"space-y-2 mb-4\">\n                                    {order.items.map((item, i) => (\n                                        <li key={i} className=\"flex justify-between text-sm text-gray-700 border-b border-dashed border-gray-100 pb-1 last:border-0\">\n                                            <span><span className=\"font-bold\">x{item.quantity}</span> {item.name}</span>\n                                        </li>\n                                    ))}\n                                </ul>\n\n                                {/* Action Buttons */}\n                                <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 mt-2\">\n                                    {order.status === 'pending' && (\n                                        <>\n                                            <button \n                                                onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'cancelled')}\n                                                className=\"py-2 bg-red-50 text-red-600 text-xs font-bold rounded-lg\"\n                                            >\n                                                Refuser\n                                            </button>\n                                            <button \n                                                onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'preparing')}\n                                                className=\"py-2 bg-brand-600 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center\"\n                                            >\n                                                <ChefHat size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Cuisiner\n                                            </button>\n                                        </>\n                                    )}\n                                    {order.status === 'preparing' && (\n                                         <button \n                                            onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'ready')}\n                                            className=\"col-span-2 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center\"\n                                        >\n                                            <CheckCircle size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Prêt à servir\n                                        </button>\n updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'delivering')}\n                                            className=\"col-span-2 py-2 bg-orange-500 text-white text-xs font-bold rounded-lg flex justify-center items-center\"\n                                        >\n                                            <Bike size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Expédier\n                                        </button>\n                                    )}\n                                    {order.status === 'delivering' && (\n                                         <button \n flex justify-center items-center\"\n                                        >\n                                            <CheckCircle size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Confirmer Livraison\n                                        </button>\n                                    )}\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    ))\n                )}\n            </div>\n        )}\n\n      </main>\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city } // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        // Supabase sign up logic handling\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // Check for existing identity handling (Supabase sometimes returns user without error if exists)\n          if (authData.user.identities && authData.user.identities.length === 0) {\n             throw new Error(\"Cet email est déjà enregistré. Veuillez vous connecter.\");\n          }\n\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          // Using upsert can be safer, but insert helps catch duplicates if logic fails\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error for profiles if retrying signup\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                throw profileError;\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\") || err.status === 429) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives. Veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte. Connectez-vous.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center animate-pulse\">\n              <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n              <span>{error}</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ? 'Ville du commerce' : 'Votre Ville'}\n                </label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={city}\n                  onChange={(e) => setCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {availableCities.map(c => (\n                    <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business Specific Fields during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && role === 'business' && (\n            <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 space-y-3\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\"><Store size={14} className=\"mr-2\"/> Infos Établissement</h3>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du commerce</label>\n                <input \n                  type=\"text\" \n                  required \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Ntemba\"\n                  value={businessName}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessName(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type</label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessType(e.target.value as BusinessType)}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"restaurant\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Restaurant</option>\n                  <option value=\"bar\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Bar / Lounge</option>\n                  <option value=\"terrasse\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Terrasse</option>\n                  <option value=\"snack\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Snack / Fast-food</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Email</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"email\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n              placeholder=\"Ex: nom@mail.com\"\n              value={email}\n              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Mot de passe</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"password\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n              placeholder=\"••••••••\"\n              value={password}\n              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <button \n            type=\"submit\"\n            disabled={loading}\n            className={`w-full bg-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 mt-4 flex justify-center items-center ${loading ? 'opacity-70 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}\n          >\n            {loading ? <div className=\"w-5 h-5 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div> : (isLogin ? 'Se connecter' : \"S'inscrire\")}\n          </button>\n        </form>\n\n        <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 text-center border-t\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setIsLogin(!isLogin)}\n            className=\"text-sm text-brand-600 font-bold hover:underline\"\n          >\n            {isLogin ? \"Pas de compte ? S'inscrire\" : \"Déjà inscrit ? Se connecter\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport Veuillez vous connecter.\");\n          }\n\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          // Using upsert can be safer, but insert helps catch duplicates if logic fails\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error for profiles if retrying signup\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                throw profileError;\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte. Connectez-vous.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center animate-pulse\">\n              <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n              <span>{error}</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ? 'Ville du commerce' : 'Votre Ville'}\n                </label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={city}\n                  onChange={(e) => setCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {availableCities.map(c => (\n                    <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business Specific Fields during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && role === 'business' && (\n            <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 space-y-3\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\"><Store size={14} className=\"mr-2\"/> Infos Établissement</h3>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du commerce</label>\n                <input \n                  type=\"text\" \n                  required \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Ntemba\"\n                  value={businessName}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessName(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type</label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessType(e.target.value as BusinessType)}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"restaurant\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Restaurant</option>\n                  <option value=\"bar\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Bar / Lounge</option>\n                  <option value=\"terrasse\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Terrasse</option>\n                  <option value=\"snack\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Snack / Fast-food</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Email</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"email\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n              placeholder=\"Ex: nom@mail.com\"\n              value={email}\n              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Mot de passe</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"password\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n              placeholder=\"••••••••\"\n         className={`w-full bg-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 mt-4 flex justify-center items-center ${loading ? 'opacity-70 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}\n          >\n            {loading ? <div className=\"w-5 h-5 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div> : (isLogin ? S'inscrire\" : \"Déjà inscrit ? Se connecter\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};"

              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city } // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        // Supabase sign up logic handling\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // Check for existing identity handling (Supabase sometimes returns user without error if exists)\n          if (authData.user.identities && authData.user.identities.length === 0) {\n             throw new Error(\"Cet email est déjà enregistré. Veuillez vous connecter.\");\n          }\n\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          // Using upsert can be safer, but insert helps catch duplicates if logic fails\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error for profiles if retrying signup\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                throw profileError;\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"email rate limit exceeded\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives. Veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte. Connectez-vous.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center animate-pulse\">\n              <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n              <span>{error}</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ? 'Ville du commerce' : 'Votre Ville'}\n                </label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={city}\n                  onChange={(e) => setCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {availableCities.map(c => (\n                    <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business Specific Fields during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && role === 'business' && (\n            <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 space-y-3\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\"><Store size={14} className=\"mr-2\"/> Infos Établissement</h3>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du commerce</label>\n                <input \n                  type=\"text\" \n                  required \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Ntemba\"\n                  value={businessName}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessName(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type</label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessType(e.target.value as BusinessType)}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"restaurant\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Restaurant</option>\n                  <option               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city } // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        // Supabase sign up logic handling\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // Check for existing identity handling (Supabase sometimes returns user without error if exists)\n          if (authData.user.identities && authData.user.identities.length === 0) {\n             throw new Error(\"Cet email est déjà enregistré. Veuillez vous connecter.\");\n          }\n\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          // Using upsert can be safer, but insert helps catch duplicates if logic fails\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error for profiles if retrying signup\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                throw profileError;\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte. Connectez-vous.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center animate-pulse\">\n              <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n              <span>{error}</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ? 'Ville du commerce' : 'Votre Ville'}\n                </label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={city}\n                  onChange={(e) => setCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {availableCities.map(c => (\n                    <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business Specific Fields during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && role === 'business' && (\n            <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 space-y-3\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\"><Store size={14} className=\"mr-2\"/> Infos Établissement</h3>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du commerce</label>\n                <input \n                  type=\"text\" \n                  required \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Ntemba\"\n                  value={businessName}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessName(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type</label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) =>
