Veuillez vous connecter.\");\n          }\n\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          // Using upsert can be safer, but insert helps catch duplicates if logic fails\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error for profiles if retrying signup\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                throw profileError;\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) throw restoError;\n          }\n\n          // 3. Check if email confirmation is required (Session will be null if email confirm is on)\n          if (!authData.session) {\n            setNeedsConfirmation(true);\n            setLoading(false);\n            return;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"email rate limit exceeded\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives. Veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte. Connectez-vous.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"email not confirmed\")) {\n        message = \"Veuillez confirmer votre adresse email en cliquant sur le lien reçu.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Render Confirmation Message Screen\n  if (needsConfirmation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n        <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden p-8 text-center\">\n          <div className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4\">\n            <Mail size={32} className=\"text-green-600\" />\n          </div>\n          <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2\">Vérifiez vos emails</h2>\n          <p className=\"text-gray-600 mb-6\">\n            Un lien de confirmation a été envoyé à <strong>{email}</strong>. \n            Veuillez cliquer dessus pour activer votre compte.\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-lg text-sm text-blue-800 mb-6\">\n            <p>Une fois confirmé, vous pourrez vous connecter.</p>\n          </div>\n          <button \n            onClick={() => {\n              setNeedsConfirmation(false);\n              setIsLogin(true);\n            }}\n            className=\"w-full bg-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95\"\n          >\n            Retour à la connexion\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm flex items-center animate-pulse\">\n              <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n              <span>{error}</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ? 'Ville du commerce' : 'Votre Ville'}\n                </label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={city}\n                  onChange={(e) => setCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {availableCities.map(c => (\n                    <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business Specific Fields during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && role === 'business' && (\n            <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 space-y-3\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\"><Store size={14} className=\"mr-2\"/> Infos Établissement</h3>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du commerce</label>\n                <input \n                  type=\"text\" \n                  required \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Ntemba\"\n                  value={businessName}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessName(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type</label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessType(e.target.value as BusinessType)}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"restaurant\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Restaurant</option>\n                  <option value=\"bar\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Bar / Lounge</option>\n                  <option value=\"terrasse\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Terrasse</option>\n                  <option value=\"snack\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Snack / Fast-food</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Email</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"email\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n              placeholder=\"Ex: nom@mail.com\"\n              value={email}\n              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Mot de passe</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"password\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n              placeholder=\"••••••••\"\n              value={password}\n              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <button \n            type=\"submit\"\n            disabled={loading}\n            className={`w-full bg-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 mt-4 flex justify-center items-center ${loading ? 'opacity-70 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}\n          >\n            {loading ? <div className=\"w-5 h-5 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div> : (isLogin ? S'inscrire\" : \"Déjà inscrit ? Se connecter\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin, Mail, CheckCircle2, ArrowLeft, RefreshCw, Send } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [needsConfirmation, setNeedsConfirmation] = useState(false);\n  const [resendCooldown, setResendCooldown] = useState(0);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  // Cooldown timer for resend\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (resendCooldown > 0) {\n      const timer = setTimeout(() => setResendCooldown(c => c - 1), 1000);\n      return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n  }, [resendCooldown]);\n\n  const handleResendEmail = async () => {\n    if (!email) return;\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.auth.resend({\n        type: 'signup',\n        email: email,\n        options: {\n          emailRedirectTo: window.location.origin\n        }\n      });\n      if (error) throw error;\n      setResendCooldown(60); // 60 seconds cooldown\n      alert(\"Nouvel email de confirmation envoyé ! Vérifiez vos spams.\");\n      setNeedsConfirmation(true);\n      setError(null);\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      alert(\"Erreur lors de l'envoi : \" + err.message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city }, // Metadata\n            emailRedirectTo: window.location.origin\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        // Supabase sign up logic handling\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // Check for existing identity handling (Supabase sometimes returns user without error if exists)\n          if (authData.user.identities && authData.user.identities.length === 0) {\n             throw new Error(\"Cet email est déjà enregistré. Veuillez vous connecter.\");\n          }\n\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          // Using upsert can be safer, but insert helps catch duplicates if logic fails\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error for profiles if retrying signup\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                // Don't throw here, as auth user is created. Just log it.\n                console.warn(\"Profile creation warning:\", profileError);\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30 // Default 30 min delivery time\n            });\n            if (restoError) {\n               console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n            }\n          }\n\n          // 3. Check if email confirmation is required (Session will be null if email confirm is on)\n          if (!authData.session) {\n            setNeedsConfirmation(true);\n            setLoading(false);\n            return;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Translate common Supabase errors\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"email rate limit exceeded\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives. Veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n        message = \"Cet email est déjà associé à un compte. Connectez-vous.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"email not confirmed\")) {\n        message = \"Email non confirmé.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Render Confirmation Message Screen\n  if (needsConfirmation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n        <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden p-8 text-center\">\n          <div className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4\">\n            <Mail size={32} className=\"text-green-600\" />\n          </div>\n          <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 mb-2\">Vérifiez vos emails</h2>\n          <p className=\"text-gray-600 mb-6\">\n            Un lien de confirmation a été envoyé à <strong>{email}</strong>. \n            Veuillez cliquer dessus pour activer votre compte.\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"bg-blue-50 p-4 rounded-lg text-sm text-blue-800 mb-6\">\n            <p className=\"mb-2\"><strong>Important :</strong> Si vous avez déjà cliqué et que cela ne fonctionne pas, essayez de vous connecter ou demandez un nouveau lien.</p>\n          </div>\n          \n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n             <button \n                onClick={() => {\n                setNeedsConfirmation(false);\n                setIsLogin(true);\n                }}\n                className=\"w-full bg-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95\"\n            >\n                Retour à la connexion\n            </button>\n\n            <button \n                onClick={handleResendEmail}\n                disabled={resendCooldown > 0 || loading}\n                className=\"w-full bg-white border-2 border-brand-100 text-brand-600 font-bold py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-50 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center\"\n            >\n               {loading ? 'Envoi...' : (resendCooldown > 0 ? `Attendre ${resendCooldown}s` : \"Renvoyer l'email\")}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm animate-pulse flex flex-col\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center mb-1\">\n                 <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                 <span>{error}</span>\n              </div>\n              {error.includes(\"confirmé\") && (\n                  <button \n                    type=\"button\"\n                    onClick={handleResendEmail}\n                    className=\"mt-2 text-xs font-bold underline text-red-700 hover:text-red-900 self-start\"\n                  >\n                     {resendCooldown > 0 ? `Patientez ${resendCooldown}s` : \"Me renvoyer l'email de confirmation\"}\n                  </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ? 'Ville du commerce' : 'Votre Ville'}\n                </label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={city}\n                  onChange={(e) => setCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {availableCities.map(c => (\n                    <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business Specific Fields during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && role === 'business' && (\n            <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 space-y-3\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\"><Store size={14} className=\"mr-2\"/> Infos Établissement</h3>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du commerce</label>\n                <input \n                  type=\"text\" \n                  required \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Ntemba\"\n                  value={businessName}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessName(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type</label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) => value=\"bar\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Bar / Lounge</option>\n                  <option value=\"terrasse\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Terrasse</option>\n                  <option value=\"snack\" text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Email</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"email\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300        />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Mot de passe</label>\n            <input \n              type=\"password\" \n              required \n              className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n              placeholder=\"••••••••\"\n              value={password}\n              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <button \n            type=\"submit\"\n            disabled={loading}\n            className={`w-full bg-brand-600 hover:bg-brand-700 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 mt-4 flex justify-center items-center ${loading ? 'opacity-70 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}\n          >\n            {loading ? <div className=\"w-5 h-5 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div> : (isLogin ? 'Se connecter' : \"S'inscrire\")}\n          </button>\n        </form>\n\n        <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 text-center border-t\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setIsLogin(!isLogin)}\n            className=\"text-sm text-brand-600 font-bold hover:underline\"\n          >\n            {isLogin ? \"Pas de compte ? S'inscrire\" : \"Déjà inscrit ? Se connecter\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from './lib/supabase';\nimport { MOCK_RESTAURANTS } from './constants';\nimport { Restaurant, User, UserRole, MenuItem } from './types';\nimport { AuthScreen } from './components/AuthScreen';\nimport { CustomerView } from './components/CustomerView';\nimport { BusinessDashboard } from './components/BusinessDashboard';\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Initialisation et écoute de la session\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // 1. }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error fetching/creating profile:\", error);\n      // En cas d'erreur critique, on déconnecte pour éviter de bloquer l'UI\n      await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n    try {\n      // Fetch restaurants with their menu items\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .select(`\n          *,\n          menu_items (*)\n        `);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Map snake_case DB to camelCase Types\n        const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({\n          id: r.id,\n          ownerId: r.owner_id,\n          type: r.type,\n          name: r.name,\n          description: r.description,\n          latitude: r.latitude,\n          longitude: r.longitude,\n          city: r.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          isOpen: r.is_open,\n          rating: r.rating,\n          reviewCount: r.review_count,\n          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: r.estimated_delivery_time || 20, // Default to 20 if null\n setCurrentUser(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {\n    // Optimistic UI Update\n    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));\n    \n    // Update DB is handled in BusinessDashboard mostly, but for global refetch:\n    fetchRestaurants();\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div error);\n      // En cas d'erreur critique, on déconnecte pour éviter de bloquer l'UI\n      await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin, Mail } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (loading) return;\n    \n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        // Tente de s'inscrire\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city }, // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        // GESTION INTELLIGENTE : Si l'utilisateur existe déjà, on tente de le connecter directement\n        if (authError && authError.message.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n            console.log(\"Utilisateur existant, tentative de connexion automatique...\");\n            const { error: loginError } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n                email,\n                password\n            });\n            if (loginError) {\n                // Si le mot de passe est faux lors de l'auto-connexion\n                if (loginError.message.includes(\"Invalid login\")) {\n                    throw new Error(\"Cet email existe déjà mais le mot de passe est incorrect.\");\n                }\n                throw loginError;\n            }\n            // Si connexion réussie, on s'arrête là, le listener dans App.tsx fera le reste\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        // Création du profil si nouvelle inscription réussie\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error (race condition handled in App.tsx)\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                console.warn(\"Profile creation warning:\", profileError);\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30\n            });\n            if (restoError) console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Traduction et adoucissement des erreurs\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\")) {\n        message = \"Veuillez patienter quelques secondes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n      \n      // Si c'est une erreur de rate limit, on enlève le loading après un délai pour laisser l'utilisateur réessayer calmement\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\")) {\n          setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 2000);\n      } else {\n          setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }\n    // Note: On ne met pas setLoading(false) ici systématiquement car en cas de succès, \n    // le composant va être démonté par App.tsx qui détecte la session.\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"p-6 space-y-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n            {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n          </h2>\n\n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 text-red-600 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm animate-pulse flex flex-col\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center mb-1\">\n                 <AlertCircle size={16} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                 <span>{error}</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && (\n             <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1 flex items-center\">\n                  <MapPin size={12} className=\"mr-1\"/> \n                  {role === 'business' ? 'Ville du commerce' : 'Votre Ville'}\n                </label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={city}\n                  onChange={(e) => setCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                  {availableCities.map(c => (\n                    <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business Specific Fields during Signup */}\n          {!isLogin && role === 'business' && (\n            <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 space-y-3\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 flex items-center\"><Store size={14} className=\"mr-2\"/> Infos Établissement</h3>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du commerce</label>\n                <input \n                  type=\"text\" \n                  required \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                  placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Ntemba\"\n                  value={businessName}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessName(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type</label>\n                <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) => setBusinessType(e.target.value as BusinessType)}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"restaurant\" className=\"text-gray-900\">Restaurant</option>\n                  <option               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin, Mail } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleOAuthLogin = async (provider: 'google' | 'facebook') => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({\n        provider: provider,\n        options: {\n          redirectTo: window.location.origin,\n          queryParams: {\n            // On passe ces infos, mais elles ne seront stockées que si on utilise un trigger côté DB\n            // L'App.tsx gérera la création du profil par défaut (Client) si nécessaire\n            access_type: 'offline',\n            prompt: 'consent',\n          }\n        }\n      });\n      if (error) throw error;\n      // La redirection se fait automatiquement ici\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"OAuth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Erreur de connexion sociale\");\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (loading) return;\n    \n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        // Tente de s'inscrire\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city }, // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        // GESTION INTELLIGENTE : Si l'utilisateur existe déjà, on tente de le connecter directement\n        if (authError && authError.message.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n            console.log(\"Utilisateur existant, tentative de connexion automatique...\");\n            const { error: loginError } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n                email,\n                password\n            });\n            if (loginError) {\n                // Si le mot de passe est faux lors de l'auto-connexion\n                if (loginError.message.includes(\"Invalid login\")) {\n                    throw new Error(\"Cet email existe déjà mais le mot de passe est incorrect.\");\n                }\n                throw loginError;\n            }\n            // Si connexion réussie, on s'arrête là, le listener dans App.tsx fera le reste\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        // Création du profil si nouvelle inscription réussie\n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             // Ignore duplicate key error (race condition handled in App.tsx)\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                console.warn(\"Profile creation warning:\", profileError);\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30\n            });\n            if (restoError) console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // Traduction et adoucissement des erreurs\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\")) {\n        message = \"Veuillez patienter quelques secondes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n      \n      // Si c'est une erreur de rate limit, on enlève le loading après un délai pour laisser l'utilisateur réessayer calmement\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\")) {\n          setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 2000);\n      } else {\n          setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"p-6 pb-2\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n                {isLogin ? App.tsx les lira.\n      localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_pending_auth', JSON.stringify({ \n          role, \n          city,\n          // Si c'est un business, on ne peut pas créer le resto automatiquement via OAuth facilement\n          // On le gérera potentiellement après, mais on garde au moins le rôle.\n      }));\n\n      const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({\n   password\n            });\n            if (loginError) {\n                // Si le mot de passe est faux lors de l'auto-connexion\n                if (loginError.message.includes(\"Invalid login\")) {\n                    throw new Error(\"Cet email existe déjà mais le mot de passe est incorrect.\");\n                }\n                throw loginError;\n            }\n            // Si connexion preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30\n            });\n            if (restoError) console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n          }\n        }\n at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n      \n      // Si c'est une erreur de rate limit, on enlève le loading après un délai pour laisser l'utilisateur réessayer calmement\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\")) {\n          setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 2000);\n      } else {\n               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from './lib/supabase';\nimport { MOCK_RESTAURANTS } from './constants';\nimport { Restaurant, User, UserRole, MenuItem } from './types';\nimport { AuthScreen } from './components/AuthScreen';\nimport { CustomerView } from './components/CustomerView';\nimport { BusinessDashboard } from './components/BusinessDashboard';\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Initialisation et écoute de la session\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // 1. Check active session\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n      } else {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 2. Listen for changes\n    const {\n      data: { subscription },\n    } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n      } else {\n        setCurrentUser(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 3. Load Restaurants\n    fetchRestaurants();\n\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string, metadata: any = {}) => {\n    try {\n      // Get Profile Role and City\n      let { data: profile, error } = await supabase\n        .from('profiles')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', userId)\n        .single();\n\n      // CORRECTION: Si le profil n'existe pas (compte créé manuellement ou connexion immédiate après inscription), on le crée\n      if (error || !profile) {\n        console.warn(\"Profil introuvable. Tentative de création via métadonnées ou localStorage...\", metadata);\n        \n        // RECUPERATION DU ROLE EN ATTENTE (Pour OAuth Google/Facebook)\n        // On vérifie si l'utilisateur a choisi un rôle avant de cliquer sur \"Se connecter avec Google\"\n        const pendingAuthDataStr = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');\n        const pendingAuthData = pendingAuthDataStr ? JSON.parse(pendingAuthDataStr) : null;\n        \n        // On nettoie le storage pour ne pas polluer les futures connexions\n        if (pendingAuthData) {\n            localStorage.removeItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');\n        }\n\n        // On utilise les métadonnées sauvegardées lors du signup pour déterminer le bon rôle\n        const defaultProfile = {\n            id: userId,\n            full_name: metadata?.full_name || metadata?.name || email.split('@')[0],\n            // Priorité : 1. Pending (localStorage) 2. Metadata (SignUp Email) 3. Default 'client'\n            role: pendingAuthData?.role || metadata?.role || 'client', \n            city: pendingAuthData?.city || metadata?.city || 'Kinshasa'\n        };\n\n        const { error: insertError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert(defaultProfile);\n        \n        if (insertError) {\n             // Si erreur \"duplicate key\", c'est que le profil a été créé entre temps (race condition), on le recharge\n             if (insertError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                 const { data: retryProfile } = await supabase.from('profiles').select('*').eq('id', userId).single();\n                 if (retryProfile) profile = retryProfile;\n             } else {\n                 throw insertError;\n             }\n        } else {\n             profile = defaultProfile;\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (profile) {\n        let businessId = undefined;\n        // If business, get restaurant ID\n        if (profile.role === 'business') {\n          // IMPORTANT: Si c'est un nouveau business, on recharge la liste des restaurants pour voir le sien\n          await fetchRestaurants();\n\n          const { data: resto } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .select('id')\n            .eq('owner_id', userId)\n            .single();\n          if (resto) businessId = resto.id;\n        }\n\n        setCurrentUser({\n          id: userId,\n          email: email,\n          name: profile.full_name || 'Utilisateur',\n          role: profile.role as UserRole,\n          city: profile.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          businessId,\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Error fetching/creating profile:\", error);\n      // En cas d'erreur critique, on déconnecte pour éviter de bloquer l'UI\n      await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n    try {\n      // Fetch restaurants with their menu items\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .select(`\n          *,\n          menu_items (*)\n        `);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Map snake_case DB to camelCase Types\n        const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({\n          id: r.id,\n          ownerId: r.owner_id,\n          type: r.type,\n          name: r.name,\n          description: r.description,\n          latitude: r.latitude,\n          longitude: r.longitude,\n          city: r.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          isOpen: r.is_open,\n          rating: r.rating,\n          reviewCount: r.review_count,\n          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: r.estimated_delivery_time || 20, // Default to 20 if null\n          deliveryAvailable: r.delivery_available,\n          coverImage: r.cover_image || 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?grayscale',\n          menu: (r.menu_items || []).map((m: any) => ({\n            id: m.id,\n            name: m.name,\n            description: m.description,\n            price: m.price,\n            image: m.image,\n            category: m.category,\n            isAvailable: m.is_available\n          }))\n        }));\n        setRestaurants(mappedRestaurants);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error loading restaurants:\", err);\n      // Fallback to Mocks if DB is empty or error (optional)\n      // setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    setCurrentUser(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {\n    // Optimistic UI Update\n    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));\n    \n    // Update DB is handled in BusinessDashboard mostly, but for global refetch:\n    fetchRestaurants();\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-brand-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 1. Not Logged In -> Show Auth\n  if (!currentUser) {\n    return <AuthScreen onLogin={() => {}} />; // onLogin logic is now handled by auth state listener\n  }\n\n  // 2. Logged in as Business -> Show Dashboard\n  if (currentUser.role === 'business') {\n    const myRestaurant = restaurants.find(r => r.ownerId === currentUser.id);\n    // If business user but restaurant data not loaded yet or created\n    if (!myRestaurant) {\n         return (\n             <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center flex-col p-4 text-center\">\n                 <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-brand-600 mb-4\"></div>\n                 <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-2\">Configuration en cours...</h2>\n                 <p className=\"text-gray-500 max-w-xs\">Votre restaurant est en cours de création. Cela peut prendre quelques secondes.</p>\n                 <button onClick={fetchRestaurants} className=\"mt-6 bg-brand-50 text-brand-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm\">Actualiser maintenant</button>\n                 <button onClick={handleLogout} className=\"mt-4 text-gray-400 text-sm hover:text-red-500\">Se déconnecter</button>\n             </div>\n         )\n    }\n    \n    return (\n      <BusinessDashboard \n        user={currentUser} \n        restaurant={myRestaurant} \n        onUpdateRestaurant={handleUpdateRestaurant}\n        onLogout={handleLogout}\n      />\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 3. Logged in as Client -> Show Main App\n  return (\n    <CustomerView \n      user={currentUser}\n      allRestaurants={restaurants}\n      onLogout={handleLogout}\n    />\n  );\n}\n\nexport default App;"

Check active session\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n      } else {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 2. Listen for changes\n    const {\n      data: { subscription },\n    } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n      } else {\n        setCurrentUser(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    // 3. Load Restaurants\n    fetchRestaurants();\n\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string, metadata: any = {}) => {\n    try {\n      // Get Profile Role and City\n      // On utilise maybeSingle pour éviter une erreur 406 si plusieurs rows (ne devrait pas arriver) ou 0 rows\n      let { data: profile, error } = await supabase\n        .from('profiles')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', userId)\n        .maybeSingle();\n\n      if (error) {\n          console.warn(\"Erreur lecture profil (peut être lié aux permissions 403):\", error.message);\n      }\n\n      // CORRECTION: Si le profil n'existe pas (compte créé manuellement ou connexion immédiate après inscription), on le crée\n      if (!profile) {\n        console.log(\"Profil introuvable. Tentative de création...\");\n        \n        // RECUPERATION DU ROLE EN ATTENTE (Pour OAuth Google/Facebook)\n        const pendingAuthDataStr = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');\n        const pendingAuthData = pendingAuthDataStr ? pendingAuthData?.city || metadata?.city || 'Kinshasa'\n        };\n\n        const { error: insertError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert(defaultProfile);\n        \n        if (insertError) console.error(\"Erreur création profil:\", insertError);\n                 // On ne throw pas ici pour éviter de bloquer l'app, on crée un user temporaire en mémoire\n                 profile = defaultProfile;\n             }\n        } else {\n             profile = defaultProfile;\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (profile) {\n        let businessId = undefined;\n        // If business, get restaurant ID\n        if (profile.role === 'business') {\n          await fetchRestaurants();\n\n          const { data: resto } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .select('id')\n            .eq('owner_id', userId)\n            .maybeSingle();\n            \n          if (resto) businessId = resto.id;\n        }\n\n        setCurrentUser({\n          id: userId,\n          email: email,\n          name: profile.full_name || 'Utilisateur',\n          role: profile.role as UserRole,\n          city: profile.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          businessId,\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur critique chargement profil:\", error);\n      // NOTE: On ne déconnecte plus l'utilisateur ici pour éviter la boucle de login en cas d'erreur serveur\n      // await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n    try {\n      // Fetch restaurants with their menu items\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .select(`\n          *,\n          menu_items (*)\n        `);\n\n      if (error) {\n          console.warn(\"Erreur chargement restaurants:\", error.message);\n          throw error;\n      }\n\n      if (data) {\n        // Map snake_case DB to camelCase Types\n        const name: m.name,\n            description: m.description,\n            price: m.price,\n            image: m.image,\n            category: m.category,\n            isAvailable: m.is_available\n               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from './lib/supabase';\nimport { MOCK_RESTAURANTS } from './constants';\nimport { Restaurant, User, UserRole, MenuItem } from './types';\nimport { AuthScreen } from './components/AuthScreen';\nimport { CustomerView } from './components/CustomerView';\nimport { BusinessDashboard } from './components/BusinessDashboard';\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  // Initialisation et écoute de la session\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const initSession = async () => {\n        try {\n            const { data: { session }, error } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n            if (error) {\n                console.warn(\"Erreur session (Clé API invalide ?):\", error.message);\n                // On continue sans session pour ne pas crasher\n            }\n            if (session?.user) {\n                await fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n            }\n        } catch (err) {\n            console.error(\"Erreur init:\", err);\n        } finally {\n            setLoading(false);\n        }\n    };\n\n    initSession();\n\n    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n      } else {\n        setCurrentUser(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    fetchRestaurants();\n\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string, metadata: any = {}) => {\n    try {\n      // 1. Configuration de l'utilisateur courant\n      if (profile) {\n        let businessId = undefined;\n        \n        if (profile.role === 'business') {\n          // Recharger les restos pour voir si   .select('id')\n            .eq('owner_id', userId)\n            .maybeSingle();\n            \n          if (resto) businessId = resto.id;\n        }\n\n        setCurrentUser({\n          id: userId,\n          email: email,\n          name: profile.full_name || 'Utilisateur',\n          role: profile.role as UserRole,\n          city: profile.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          businessId,\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur critique profil:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n      const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({\n          id: r.id,\n          ownerId: r.owner_id,\n          type: r.type,\n          name: r.name,\n          description: reviewCount: r.review_count,\n          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: r.estimated_delivery_time || 20,\n          deliveryAvailable: r.delivery_available,\n   }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Impossible de charger les restaurants (Erreur connexion/403). Utilisation des données de démo.\");\n      setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    setCurrentUser(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {\n    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));\n    // Tenter une synchro DB silencieuse\n    fetchRestaurants();\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-brand-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 1.
