'../components/CartDrawer';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        // Note: join restaurant table to get name and phone\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`\n                *,\n                restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)\n            `)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             console.warn(\"Erreur chargement commandes (403):\", error.message);\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) {\n                 setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             }\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n\n    // Filter by City\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') {\n      list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    }\n\n    // Filter by Urgent Mode\n    if (urgentMode) {\n      list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    }\n\n    // Filter by Search Query\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n            r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n            r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    \n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    // If cart has items from another restaurant, confirm clear\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) {\n            return;\n        }\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) {\n             return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        }\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n\n    const newOrder: Order = {\n        id: `mock-${Date.now()}`,\n        userId: user.id,\n        restaurantId: cart[0].restaurantId,\n        status: 'pending',\n        totalAmount: cartTotal,\n        items: cart,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n        restaurant: { name: cart[0].restaurantName }\n    };\n\n    try {\n        const restaurantId = cart[0].restaurantId;\n        \n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .insert({\n                user_id: user.id,\n                restaurant_id: restaurantId,\n                status: 'pending',\n                total_amount: cartTotal,\n                items: cart\n            });\n\n        if (error) {\n            console.warn(\"Commande DB échouée (403), passage en simulation:\", error.message);\n            const existingMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify([newOrder, ...existingMockOrders]));\n        }\n\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setCart([]);\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            setShowSuccess(false);\n            setViewMode('orders'); \n            fetchOrders();\n            setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]);\n        }, 3000);\n\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Checkout error:\", err);\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            setShowSuccess(false);\n            setViewMode('orders');\n            setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]);\n        }, 3000);\n    } finally {\n        setIsCheckingOut(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';\n        case 'preparing': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';\n        case 'ready': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';\n        case 'delivering': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';\n        case 'completed': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800';\n        default: return 'bg-gray-100';\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusLabel = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'En attente';\n        case 'preparing': return 'En cuisine';\n        case 'ready': return 'Prêt';\n        case 'delivering': return 'En livraison';\n        case 'completed': return 'Livré';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'Annulé';\n        default: return status;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getProgressWidth = (status: string) => {\n    switch(status) {\n      case 'pending': return '10%';\n      case 'preparing': return '35%';\n      case 'ready': return '60%';\n      case 'delivering': return '80%';\n      case 'completed': return '100%';\n      default: return '0%';\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* CHAT OVERLAY */}\n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'client' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-6 text-center animate-fade-in\">\n           <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600 tracking-tight mr-2\">DashMeals</h1>\n                <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && (\n                <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">\n                    {cart.length}\n                </span>\n                )}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500\">\n                <LogOut size={20} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        {/* Location & City Filter - Only show in list/map mode */}\n        {(viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map') && (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1 flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg truncate\">\n                <MapPin size={14} className=\"mr-1.5 text-brand-500 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                <span className=\"truncate\">\n                    {userState.locationError ? \"Mode Démo\" : \"Ma Position\"}\n                </span>\n                </div>\n                \n                <select \n                className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold py-2 pl-2 pr-6 rounded-lg border border-brand-200 outline-none appearance-none bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;charset=US-ASCII,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20width%3D%22292.4%22%20height%3D%22292.4%22%3E%3Cpath%20fill%3D%22%23ea580c%22%20d%3D%22M287%2069.4a17.6%2017.6%200%200%200-13-5.4H18.4c-5%200-9.3%201.8-12.9%205.4A17.6%2017.6%200%200%200%200%2082.2c0%205%201.8%209.3%205.4%2012.9l128%20127.9c3.6%203.6%207.8%205.4%2012.8%205.4s9.2-1.8%2012.8-5.4L287%2095c3.5-3.5%205.4-7.8%205.4-12.8%200-5-1.9-9.2-5.5-12.8z%22%2F%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E')] bg-[length:10px] bg-[right_8px_center] bg-no-repeat\"\n                value={selectedCity}\n                onChange={(e) => setSelectedCity(e.target.value)}\n                >\n                <option value=\"Toutes\">Toutes les villes</option>\n                {CITIES_RDC.map(city => (\n                    <option key={city} value={city}>{city}</option>\n                ))}\n                </select>\n            </div>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* MAIN CONTENT AREA */}\n      <main className=\"p-4\">\n        \n        {viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map' ? (\n            <>\n                {/* SEARCH BAR */}\n                <div className=\"mb-4 relative\">\n                    <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400\" size={18} />\n                    <input \n                        type=\"text\"\n                        placeholder=\"Rechercher un restaurant...\"\n                        className=\"w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none text-sm bg-white shadow-sm\"\n                        value={searchQuery}\n                        onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                    {searchQuery && (\n                        <button \n                            onClick={() => setSearchQuery('')}\n                            className=\"absolute right-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 p-1\"\n                        >\n                            <X size={16} />\n                        </button>\n                    )}\n                </div>\n\n                {/* FILTERS */}\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-3 mb-6 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-1\">\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)}\n                        className={`flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-bold text-sm shadow-sm transition-all border whitespace-nowrap ${urgentMode ? 'bg-red-500 text-white border-red-500 animate-pulse-fast' : 'bg-white text-gray-700 border-gray-200'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Zap size={16} className={`mr-1 ${urgentMode ? 'fill-white' : 'fill-none'}`} />\n                        Urgent - J'ai faim !\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">\n                        🍖 Grillades\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">\n                        🍗 Poulet\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* CONTENT */}\n                {viewMode === 'list' ? (\n                    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                        {filteredRestaurants.map(restaurant => (\n                            <RestaurantCard \n                                key={restaurant.id} \n                                restaurant={restaurant} \n                                onClick={() => {\n                                    setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant);\n                                    setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n                                }} \n                            />\n                        ))}\n                        {filteredRestaurants.length === 0 && (\n                            <div className=\"text-center py-10 text-gray-500\">\n                                <p>Aucun restaurant trouvé {selectedCity !== 'Toutes' ? `à ${selectedCity}` : ''} {searchQuery ? `pour \"${searchQuery}\"` : ''} :(</p>\n                                {urgentMode && <button onClick={() => setUrgentMode(false)} className=\"text-brand-500 underline mt-2\">Désactiver le mode urgent</button>}\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n                    </div>\n                ) : (\n                    <MapView \n                        restaurants={filteredRestaurants} \n                        userLocation={userState.location} \n                        onSelect={(r) => {\n                            setSelectedRestaurant(r);\n                            setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n                        }}\n                    />\n                )}\n            </>\n        ) : viewMode === 'restaurant_detail' && selectedRestaurant ? (\n            <div className=\"animate-in slide-in-from-right duration-300\">\n                <button \n                    onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} \n                    className=\"mb-4 flex items-center text-gray-600 font-medium hover:text-brand-600\"\n                >\n                    <ArrowLeft size={18} className=\"mr-1\" /> Retour\n                </button>\n                \n                <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden mb-6\">\n                    <img src={selectedRestaurant.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-48 object-cover\" alt=\"Cover\" />\n                    <div className=\"p-4\">\n                        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-start\">\n                           <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900\">{selectedRestaurant.name}</h1>\n                           <span className=\"text-xs bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg\">{selectedRestaurant.city}</span>\n                        </div>\n                        <p className=\"text-gray-500 mb-4\">{selectedRestaurant.description}</p>\n                        \n                        {/* Primary Stats */}\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-4 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n                            <span className=\"flex items-center bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1 rounded\"><Navigation size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> {formatDistance(selectedRestaurant.distance || 0)}</span>\n                            <span className=\"flex items-center bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1 rounded\"><Zap size={14} className=\"mr-1 text-yellow-500\"/> {selectedRestaurant.preparationTime} min</span>\n                        </div>\n\n                        {/* Travel Times with Icons */}\n                        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-2\">\n                             <div className=\"flex items-center p-3 bg-orange-50 rounded-lg text-orange-700 border border-orange-100\">\n                                <Bike size={20} className=\"mr-3\" />\n                                <div>\n                                    <p className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-70\">En Moto</p>\n                                    <p className=\"font-bold text-lg leading-none\">{selectedRestaurant.timeMoto ? formatTime(selectedRestaurant.timeMoto) : '--'}</p>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg text-blue-700 border border-blue-100\">\n                                <Footprints size={20} className=\"mr-3\" />\n                                <div>\n                                     <p className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-70\">À pied</p>\n                                     <p className=\"font-bold text-lg leading-none\">{selectedRestaurant.timeWalking ? formatTime(selectedRestaurant.timeWalking) : '--'}</p>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n\n                <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-3\">Menu</h3>\n                <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                    {selectedRestaurant.menu.map(item => (\n                        <div key={item.id} className=\"bg-white p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm flex space-x-3\">\n                            <img src={item.image} className=\"w-20 h-20 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-100\" alt={item.name} />\n                            <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col justify-between\">\n                                <div>\n                                    <h4 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800\">{item.name}</h4>\n                                    <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-1\">{item.description}</p>\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"flex justify-between items-end mt-2\">\n                                    <span className=\"font-bold text-brand-600\">${item.price.toFixed(2)}</span>\n                                    <button \n                                        onClick={() => addToCart(item, selectedRestaurant)}\n                                        className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-600 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-100 transition-colors\"\n                                    >\n                                        <Plus size={16} />\n                                    </button>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    ))}\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        ) : viewMode === 'orders' ? (\n            <div className=\"animate-in slide-in-from-right duration-300\">\n                <h2 className=\"text-xl font-black text-gray-800 mb-4 flex items-center\">\n                    <Receipt className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\"/> Historique\n                </h2>\n                \n                {orders.length === 0 ? (\n                    <div className=\"text-center text-gray-400 py-10\">\n                        <ShoppingBag size={48} className=\"mx-auto mb-2 opacity-20\"/>\n                        <p>Aucune commande effectuée.</p>\n                        <button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className=\"mt-4 text-brand-600 font-bold underline\">Commander un plat</button>\n                    </div>\n                ) : (\n                    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                        {orders.map(order => {\n                           const isCompleted = order.status === 'completed';\n                           const isCancelled = order.status === 'cancelled';\n                           return (\n                            <div key={order.id} className=\"bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 p-4\">\n                                <div className=\"flex justify-between items-start mb-2\">\n                                    <div>\n                                        <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800\">{order.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant inconnu'}</h3>\n                                        <p className=\"text-[10px] text-gray-400\">\n                                            {new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', { day: 'numeric', month: 'short', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit'})}\n                                        </p>\n                                    </div>\n                                    <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wide ${getStatusColor(order.status)}`}>\n                                        {getStatusLabel(order.status)}\n                                    </span>\n                                </div>\n                                \n                                {/* Progress Bar for Active Orders */}\n                                {!isCompleted && !isCancelled && (\n                                    <div className=\"mb-4 mt-2\">\n                                        <div className=\"h-1.5 w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden\">\n                                            <div \n                                                className=\"h-full bg-brand-500 transition-all duration-1000 ease-out\"\n                                                style={{ width: getProgressWidth(order.status) }}\n                                            ></div>\n                                        </div>\n                                        <div className=\"flex justify-between text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-1 font-medium\">\n                                            <span>Reçu</span>\n                                            <span>Préparation</span>\n                                            <span>Livraison</span>\n                                        </div>\n                                    </div>\n                                )}\n\n                                <div className=\"space-y-1 mb-3 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg\">\n                                    {order.items.map((item, idx) => (\n                                        <div key={idx} className=\"flex justify-between text-sm text-gray-700\">\n                                            <span>{item.quantity}x {item.name}</span>\n                                            <span className=\"font-medium\">${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}</span>\n                                        </div>\n                                    ))}\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center pt-2 border-t border-gray-100\">\n                                    <span className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-500\">Total</span>\n                                    <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-3\">\n                                        <span className=\"text-lg font-black text-brand-600\">${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</span>\n                                    </div>\n                                </div>\n                                \n                                {/* ACTIONS: CHAT & CALL (Visible pour les commandes en cours) */}\n                                {!isCompleted && !isCancelled && (\n                                    <div className=\"mt-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2\">\n                                        <button \n                                            onClick={() => window.open(`tel:${order.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}`)}\n                                            className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-2 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\"\n                                        >\n                                            <Phone size={14} className=\"mr-2\" /> Appeler\n                                        </button>\n                                        <button \n                                            onClick={() => setActiveChatOrder(order)}\n                                            className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-2 bg-brand-100 text-brand-700 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-brand-200 transition-colors\"\n                                        >\n                                            <MessageSquare size={14} className=\"mr-2\" /> Message\n                                        </button>\n                                    </div>\n                                )}\n                            </div>\n                           );\n                        })}\n                    </div>\n React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<DashboardView>('overview');\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); // For mobile\n\n  // Menu Management State\n  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [updatingTimes, setUpdatingTimes] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Settings State\n  const [settingsForm, setSettingsForm] = useState({\n      name: restaurant.name,\n      description: restaurant.description,\n      coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n      city: restaurant.city\n  });\n  const [isSavingSettings, setIsSavingSettings] = useState(false);\n\n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n\n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Load orders\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchRestaurantOrders();\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRestaurantOrders, 30000); // Auto-refresh every 30s\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Sync settings form if restaurant prop changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setSettingsForm({\n          name: restaurant.name,\n          description: restaurant.description,\n          coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n          city: restaurant.city\n      });\n  }, [restaurant]);\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, profiles:user_id(full_name, id)`) // Note: real schema would have phone here\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             // Fallback for demo mode if table doesn't exist or permission denied\n             console.warn(\"Fetch orders failed, using local/demo mode if needed\");\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) {\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(localOrders).filter((o:any) => o.restaurantId === restaurant.id);\n                setOrders(parsed);\n             }\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                customer: { \n                    full_name: o.profiles?.full_name || 'Client Inconnu',\n                    // Mock phone number since not in profile yet\n                    phone_number: '+243000000000'\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching restaurant orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateOrderStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) {\n            // Demo mode fallback\n            const updatedOrders = orders.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            setOrders(updatedOrders);\n            // Update local storage for persistence in demo\n            const allMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            const newAllMock = allMockOrders.map((o:any) => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify(newAllMock));\n        } else {\n            setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ \n            preparation_time: newPrep,\n            estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv\n        })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({\n          ...restaurant,\n          preparationTime: newPrep,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv\n      });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating times\", err);\n        // Fallback demo\n        onUpdateRestaurant({\n            ...restaurant,\n            preparationTime: parseInt(prepTime),\n            estimatedDeliveryTime: parseInt(deliveryTime)\n        });\n    } finally {\n        setUpdatingTimes(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n        // Fallback demo\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: !restaurant.isOpen });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveSettings = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setIsSavingSettings(true);\n      try {\n          const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .update({\n                name: settingsForm.name,\n                description: settingsForm.description,\n                cover_image: settingsForm.coverImage,\n                city: settingsForm.city\n            })\n            .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n            \n          if(error) throw error;\n\n          onUpdateRestaurant({\n              ...restaurant,\n              ...settingsForm\n          });\n ...restaurant,\n            ...settingsForm\n        });\n      } finally {\n          setIsSavingSettings(false);\n      }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n       // Demo\n       onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').insert(newItemPayload).select().single();\n      \n      if (error) throw error;\n      \n      if (data) {\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id, name: data.name, description: data.description, price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any, isAvailable: data.is_available, image: data.image\n        };\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem] });\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      // Demo Fallback\n      const mockItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: `mock-item-${Date.now()}`,\n          name: newItemName,\n          description: newItemDesc,\n          price: price,\n          category: newItemCategory,\n          isAvailable: true,\n          image: newItemPayload.image\n      };\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, mockItem] });\n    } finally {\n      setNewItemName(''); setNewItemDesc(''); setNewItemPrice(''); setIsAddingItem(false);\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusBadge = (status: OrderStatus) => {\n      switch(status) {\n          case 'pending': return <span className=\"bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">En attente</span>;\n          case 'preparing': return <span className=\"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase animate-pulse\">En cuisine</span>;\n          case 'ready': return <span className=\"bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Prêt</span>;\n          case 'delivering': return <span className=\"bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Livraison</span>;\n          case 'completed': return <span className=\"bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Terminé</span>;\n          case 'cancelled': return <span className=\"bg-red-100 <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-green-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-green-600\">\n                      <DollarSign size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n </div>\n                      ))}\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n      );\n  };\n\n  const renderMenu = () => (\n      <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in              required\n                      />\n                      <select \n                          className=\"p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 w-full bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                          value={newItemCategory}\n                          onChange={(e) => setNewItemCategory(e.target.value as any)}\n                      >\n                          <option value=\"plat\"      placeholder=\"Prix ($)\" \n                          value={newItemPrice}\n                          onChange={e => setNewItemPrice(e.target.value)}\n                          required\n                      />\n                      <input \n                          className=\"p-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 w-full\" \n                          placeholder=\"Description courte\" \n                          value={newItemDesc}\n                          onChange={e => setNewItemDesc(e.target.value)}\n                      />\n                  </div>\n                  <div             {loading ?                       <button onClick={() => deleteItem(item.id)} className=\"text-gray-300 hover:text-red-500 p-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity\">\n                                  <Trash2 size={16} />\n                              </button>\n                          </div>\n                          <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-2                          </div>\n                      </div>\n                  </div>\n              ))}\n          </div>\n      </div>\n  );\n\n  const renderSettings = () => (\n      <div              <MapPin className=\"absolute left-3 top-3 text-gray-400\" size={18}/>\n                    <input \n                        type=\"text\" \n                        className=\"w-full               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Restaurant, MenuItem, User, Order, OrderStatus, Promotion } from '../types';\nimport { \n  Plus, Trash2, Power, LogOut, Coffee, DollarSign, Clock, Truck, \n  Receipt, CheckCircle, ChefHat, Bike, LayoutDashboard, Settings, \n  TrendingUp, Users, ShoppingBag, X, Save, Image as ImageIcon, MapPin,\n  MessageSquare, Phone, Megaphone, Video, PlayCircle\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  restaurant: Restaurant;\n  onUpdateRestaurant: (updated: Restaurant) => void;\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\ntype DashboardView = 'overview' | 'orders' | 'menu' | 'settings' | 'marketing';\n\nexport const BusinessDashboard: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<DashboardView>('overview');\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); // For mobile\n\n  // Menu Management State\n  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [updatingTimes, setUpdatingTimes] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Marketing State\n  const [promotions, setPromotions] = useState<Promotion[]>([]);\n  const [newPromoUrl, setNewPromoUrl] = useState('');\n  const [newPromoType, setNewPromoType] = useState<'image' | 'video'>('image');\n  const [newPromoCaption, setNewPromoCaption] = useState('');\n  const [isAddingPromo, setIsAddingPromo] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Settings State\n  const [settingsForm, setSettingsForm] = useState({\n      name: restaurant.name,\n      description: restaurant.description,\n      coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n      city: restaurant.city\n  });\n  const [isSavingSettings, setIsSavingSettings] = useState(false);\n\n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n\n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Load orders and promotions\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchRestaurantOrders();\n    fetchPromotions();\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRestaurantOrders, 30000); // Auto-refresh every 30s\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Sync settings form if restaurant prop changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setSettingsForm({\n          name: restaurant.name,\n          description: restaurant.description,\n          coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n          city: restaurant.city\n      });\n  }, [restaurant]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('promotions')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      \n      if (data) {\n        setPromotions(data.map((p: any) => ({\n          id: p.id,\n          restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n          mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n          mediaType: p.media_type,\n          caption: p.caption,\n          createdAt: p.created_at\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Promotions fetch error (likely 403 in demo)\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, profiles:user_id(full_name, id)`) // Note: real schema would have phone here\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             // Fallback for demo mode if table doesn't exist or permission denied\n             console.warn(\"Fetch orders failed, using local/demo mode if needed\");\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) {\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(localOrders).filter((o:any) => o.restaurantId === restaurant.id);\n                setOrders(parsed);\n             }\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                customer: { \n                    full_name: o.profiles?.full_name || 'Client Inconnu',\n                    // Mock phone number since not in profile yet\n                    phone_number: '+243000000000'\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching restaurant orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateOrderStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) {\n            // Demo mode fallback\n            const updatedOrders = orders.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            setOrders(updatedOrders);\n            // Update local storage for persistence in demo\n            const allMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            const newAllMock = allMockOrders.map((o:any) => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify(newAllMock));\n        } else {\n            setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addPromotion = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    \n    const payload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      media_url: newPromoUrl,\n      media_type: newPromoType,\n      caption: newPromoCaption\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('promotions').insert(payload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      \n      if (data) {\n        const newPromo: Promotion = {\n          id: data.id,\n          restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n          mediaUrl: data.media_url,\n          mediaType: data.media_type,\n          caption: data.caption,\n          createdAt: data.created_at\n        };\n        setPromotions([newPromo, ...promotions]);\n        setNewPromoUrl('');\n        setNewPromoCaption('');\n        setIsAddingPromo(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding promo:\", err);\n      // Demo logic\n      const mockPromo: Promotion = {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n        mediaUrl: newPromoUrl,\n        mediaType: newPromoType,\n        caption: newPromoCaption,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n      };\n      setPromotions([mockPromo, ...promotions]);\n      setNewPromoUrl('');\n      setNewPromoCaption('');\n      setIsAddingPromo(false);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deletePromotion = async (id: string) => {\n    if (!confirm(\"Supprimer cette publicité ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      await supabase.from('promotions').delete().eq('id', id);\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    } catch (err) {\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    }\n  };\n\n  // ... (Other existing handler functions remain same: updateTimes, toggleOpen, saveSettings, deleteItem, addItem, getStatusBadge)\n  // ... Copied for context from previous version to ensure file completeness if full replace\n  \n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ preparation_time: newPrep, estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: newPrep, estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: parseInt(prepTime), estimatedDeliveryTime: parseInt(deliveryTime) });\n    } finally { setUpdatingTimes(false); }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: !restaurant.isOpen });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveSettings = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setIsSavingSettings(true);\n      try {\n          const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({\n                name: settingsForm.name,\n                description: settingsForm.description,\n                cover_image: settingsForm.coverImage,\n                city: settingsForm.city\n            }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n          if(error) throw error;\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm });\n          alert(\"Paramètres enregistrés !\");\n      } catch (err) {\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm });\n      } finally { setIsSavingSettings(false); }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n       onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`\n    };\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').insert(newItemPayload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (data) {\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id, name: data.name, description: data.description, price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any, isAvailable: data.is_available, image: data.image\n        };\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem] });\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      const mockItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: `mock-item-${Date.now()}`, name: newItemName, description: newItemDesc, price: price,\n          category: newItemCategory, isAvailable: true, image: newItemPayload.image\n      };\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, mockItem] });\n    } finally {\n      setNewItemName(''); setNewItemDesc(''); setNewItemPrice(''); setIsAddingItem(false); setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusBadge = (status: OrderStatus) => {\n      switch(status) {\n          case 'pending': return <span className=\"bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">En attente</span>;\n          case 'preparing': return <span className=\"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase animate-pulse\">En cuisine</span>;\n          case 'ready': return <span className=\"bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Prêt</span>;\n          case 'delivering': return <span className=\"bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Livraison</span>;\n          case 'completed': return <span className=\"bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Terminé</span>;\n          case 'cancelled': return <span className=\"bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Annulé</span>;\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Stats Calculations\n  const completedOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'completed');\n  const revenue = completedOrders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.totalAmount, 0);\n  const activeOrders = orders.filter(o => ['pending', 'preparing', 'ready', 'delivering'].includes(o.status));\n\n  // --- RENDER HELPERS ---\n\n  const renderSidebarItem = (view: DashboardView, icon: React.ReactNode, label: string) => (\n      <button \n        onClick={() => { setActiveView(view); setIsSidebarOpen(false); }}\n        className={`w-full flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium ${activeView === view ? 'bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 font-bold shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900'}`}\n      >\n          {icon}\n          <span>{label}</span>\n      </button>\n  );\n\n  const renderOverview = () => (\n      <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n              {/* Revenue Card */}\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-400\">Chiffre d'affaires</p>\n                      <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 mt-1\">${revenue.toFixed(2)}</h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-green-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-green-600\">\n                      <DollarSign size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [promotionsMap, setPromotionsMap] = useState<Record<string, Promotion[]>>({});\n  \n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const [activeStoryRestaurant, setActiveStoryRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In a real app, join query is better, but here we simulate or fetch separately\n      const { data } = await supabase.from('promotions').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      if (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)`)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    if (urgentMode) list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query));\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n    const newOrder: Order = {\n        id: `mock-${Date.now()}`, userId: user.id, restaurantId: cart[0].restaurantId,\n        status: 'pending', totalAmount: cartTotal, items: cart, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n        restaurant: { name: cart[0].restaurantName }\n    };\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id, restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId, status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal, items: cart\n        });\n        if (error) {\n            const existingMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify([newOrder, ...existingMockOrders]));\n        }\n        setIsCartOpen(false); setShowSuccess(true); setCart([]);\n        setTimeout(() => { setShowSuccess(false); setViewMode('orders'); fetchOrders(); setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]); }, 3000);\n    } catch (err) {\n        setIsCartOpen(false); setShowSuccess(true); setTimeout(() => { setShowSuccess(false); setViewMode('orders'); setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]); }, 3000);\n    } finally { setIsCheckingOut(false); }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';\n        case 'preparing': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';\n        case 'ready': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';\n        case 'delivering': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';\n        case 'completed': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800';\n        default: return 'bg-gray-100';\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusLabel = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'En attente';\n        case 'preparing': return 'En cuisine';\n        case 'ready': return 'Prêt';\n        case 'delivering': return 'En livraison';\n        case 'completed': return 'Livré';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'Annulé';\n        default: return status;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getProgressWidth = (status: string) => {\n    switch(status) {\n      case 'pending': return '10%'; case 'preparing': return '35%'; case 'ready': return '60%'; case 'delivering': return '80%'; case 'completed': return '100%'; default: return '0%';\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Get list of restaurants that have promotions\n  const restaurantsWithStories = restaurants.filter(r => promotionsMap[r.id] && promotionsMap[r.id].length > 0);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* STORY VIEWER OVERLAY */}\n      {activeStoryRestaurant && promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id] && (\n          <StoryViewer \n            restaurant={activeStoryRestaurant}\n            promotions={promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id]}\n            onClose={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(null)}\n            onVisitRestaurant={() => {\n                setActiveStoryRestaurant(null);\n                setSelectedRestaurant(activeStoryRestaurant);\n                setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n            }}\n          />\n otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() =>     <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} useState({\n      name: restaurant.name,\n      description: restaurant.description,\n      coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n      city: restaurant.city\n  });\n  const [isSavingSettings, setIsSavingSettings] = useState(false);\n\n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n\n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder,
