setInterval(fetchRestaurantOrders, 30000); // Auto-refresh every 30s\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Sync settings form if restaurant prop changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setSettingsForm({\n          name: restaurant.name,\n          description: restaurant.description,\n          coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n          city: restaurant.city\n      });\n  }, [restaurant]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('promotions')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      \n      if (data) {\n        setPromotions(data.map((p: any) => ({\n          id: p.id,\n          restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n          mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n          mediaType: p.media_type,\n          caption: p.caption,\n          createdAt: p.created_at\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Promotions fetch error (likely 403 in demo)\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, profiles:user_id(full_name, id)`) // Note: real schema would have phone here\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             // Fallback for demo mode if table doesn't exist or permission denied\n             console.warn(\"Fetch orders failed, using local/demo mode if needed\");\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) {\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(localOrders).filter((o:any) => o.restaurantId === restaurant.id);\n                setOrders(parsed);\n             }\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                customer: { \n                    full_name: o.profiles?.full_name || 'Client Inconnu',\n                    // Mock phone number since not in profile yet\n                    phone_number: '+243000000000'\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching restaurant orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateOrderStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) {\n            // Demo mode fallback\n            const updatedOrders = orders.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            setOrders(updatedOrders);\n            // Update local storage for persistence in demo\n            const allMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            const newAllMock = allMockOrders.map((o:any) => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify(newAllMock));\n        } else {\n            setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addPromotion = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    \n    const payload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      media_url: newPromoUrl,\n      media_type: newPromoType,\n      caption: newPromoCaption\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('promotions').insert(payload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      \n      if (data) {\n        const newPromo: Promotion = {\n          id: data.id,\n          restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n          mediaUrl: data.media_url,\n          mediaType: data.media_type,\n          caption: data.caption,\n          createdAt: data.created_at\n        };\n        setPromotions([newPromo, ...promotions]);\n        setNewPromoUrl('');\n        setNewPromoCaption('');\n        setIsAddingPromo(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding promo:\", err);\n      // Demo logic\n      const mockPromo: Promotion = {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n        mediaUrl: newPromoUrl,\n        mediaType: newPromoType,\n        caption: newPromoCaption,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n      };\n      setPromotions([mockPromo, ...promotions]);\n      setNewPromoUrl('');\n      setNewPromoCaption('');\n      setIsAddingPromo(false);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deletePromotion = async (id: string) => {\n    if (!confirm(\"Supprimer cette publicité ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      await supabase.from('promotions').delete().eq('id', id);\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    } catch (err) {\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ preparation_time: newPrep, estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: newPrep, estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: parseInt(prepTime), estimatedDeliveryTime: parseInt(deliveryTime) });\n    } finally { setUpdatingTimes(false); }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: !restaurant.isOpen });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveSettings = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setIsSavingSettings(true);\n      try {\n          const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({\n                name: settingsForm.name,\n                description: settingsForm.description,\n                cover_image: settingsForm.coverImage,\n                city: settingsForm.city\n            }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n          if(error) throw error;\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm });\n          alert(\"Paramètres enregistrés !\");\n      } catch (err) {\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm });\n      } finally { setIsSavingSettings(false); }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n       onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`\n    };\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').insert(newItemPayload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (data) {\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id, name: data.name, description: data.description, price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any, isAvailable: data.is_available, image: data.image\n        };\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem] });\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      const mockItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: `mock-item-${Date.now()}`, name: newItemName, description: newItemDesc, price: price,\n          category: newItemCategory, isAvailable: true, image: newItemPayload.image\n      };\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, mockItem] });\n    } finally {\n      setNewItemName(''); setNewItemDesc(''); setNewItemPrice(''); setIsAddingItem(false); setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusBadge = (status: OrderStatus) => {\n      switch(status) {\n          case 'pending': return <span className=\"bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">En attente</span>;\n          case 'preparing': return <span className=\"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase animate-pulse\">En cuisine</span>;\n          case 'ready': return <span className=\"bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Prêt</span>;\n          case 'delivering': return <span className=\"bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Livraison</span>;\n          case 'completed': return <span className=\"bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Terminé</span>;\n          case 'cancelled': return <span className=\"bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Annulé</span>;\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Stats Calculations\n  const completedOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'completed');\n  const revenue = completedOrders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.totalAmount, 0);\n  const activeOrders = orders.filter(o => ['pending', 'preparing', 'ready', 'delivering'].includes(o.status));\n\n  // --- RENDER HELPERS ---\n\n  const renderSidebarItem = (view: DashboardView, icon: React.ReactNode, label: string) => (\n      <button \n        onClick={() => { setActiveView(view); setIsSidebarOpen(false); }}\n        className={`w-full flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium ${activeView === view ? 'bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 font-bold shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900'}`}\n      >\n          {icon}\n          <span>{label}</span>\n      </button>\n  );\n\n  const renderOverview = () => (\n      <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n              {/* Revenue Card */}\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-400\">Chiffre d'affaires</p>\n                      <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 mt-1\">${revenue.toFixed(2)}</h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-green-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-green-600\">\n                      <DollarSign size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n              {/* Active Orders Card */}\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-400\">En cours</p>\n                      <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 mt-1\">{activeOrders.length}</h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-orange-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-orange-600\">\n                      <Clock size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n              {/* Total Orders Card */}\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-400\">Total Commandes</p>\n                      <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 mt-1\">{orders.length}</h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-blue-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-blue-600\">\n                      <ShoppingBag size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6\">\n              {/* Status & Times */}\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex-1\">\n                  <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800 mb-4 flex items-center\">\n                      <Power size={18} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\"/> Statut & Horaires\n                  </h3>\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6 p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl\">\n                      <div>\n                          <p className=\"font-bold text-gray-700\">{restaurant.isOpen ? 'Ouvert aux clients' : 'Fermé actuellement'}</p>\n                          <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">Changez le statut à tout moment.</p>\n                      </div>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={toggleOpen}\n                        className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm transition-colors ${restaurant.isOpen ? 'bg-green-500 text-white hover:bg-green-600' : 'bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600'}`}\n                      >\n                          {restaurant.isOpen ? 'Fermer' : 'Ouvrir'}\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n                  \n                  <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                      <div>\n                          <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1\">Temps de préparation (min)</label>\n                          <input \n                              type=\"number\" \n                              className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                              value={prepTime}\n                              onChange={e => setPrepTime(e.target.value)}\n                          />\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                          <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1\">Temps de livraison moyen (min)</label>\n                          <input \n                              type=\"number\" \n                              className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                              value={deliveryTime}\n                              onChange={e => setDeliveryTime(e.target.value)}\n                          />\n                      </div>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={updateTimes}\n                        disabled={updatingTimes}\n                        className=\"w-full bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 font-bold py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-brand-100\"\n                      >\n                          {updatingTimes ? 'Mise à jour...' : 'Sauvegarder les temps'}\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n\n              {/* Recent Orders Shortlist */}\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex-1\">\n                  <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800 mb-4 flex items-center\">\n                      <TrendingUp size={18} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\"/> Activité Récente\n                  </h3>\n                  <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                      {orders.slice(0, 5).map(order => (\n                          <div key={order.id} className=\"flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors\" onClick={() => setActiveView('orders')}>\n                              <div>\n                                  <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700\">{order.customer?.full_name}</p>\n                                  <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-400\">{new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}</p>\n                              </div>\n                              <div className=\"text-right\">\n                                  <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-900\">${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</p>\n                                  <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${order.status === 'completed' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-600'}`}>\n                                      {order.status}\n                                  </span>\n                              </div>\n                          </div>\n                      ))}\n                      {orders.length === 0 && <p className=\"text-gray-400 text-center text-sm\">Aucune activité récente.</p>}\n                  </div>\n                  <button onClick={() => setActiveView('orders')} className=\"w-full mt-4 text-brand-600 text-sm font-bold hover:underline\">\n                      Voir toutes les commandes\n                  </button>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n      </div>\n  );\n\n  const renderOrders = () => {\n      const active = orders.filter(o => ['pending', 'preparing', 'ready', 'delivering'].includes(o.status));\n      return (\n          <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n              <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800\">Gestion des Commandes</h2>\n              <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden\">\n                  <div className=\"bg-brand-50 p-4 border-b border-brand-100\">\n                      <h3 className=\"font-bold text-brand-800 flex items-center\">\n                          <Clock className=\"mr-2\" size={20}/> En cours ({active.length})\n                      </h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"divide-y divide-gray-100\">\n                      {active.length === 0 ? <div className=\"p-8 text-center text-gray-400\">Aucune commande en cours.</div> : active.map(order => (\n                          <div key={order.id} className=\"p-4 md:flex justify-between items-start hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors\">\n                              <div className=\"mb-4 md:mb-0\">\n                                  <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2 mb-1\">\n                                      <span className=\"bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded\">#{order.id.slice(0,4)}</span>\n                                      <h4 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800\">{order.customer?.full_name}</h4>\n                                  </div>\n                                  <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2\">{new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString()} • {order.items.length} articles</p>\n                                  {/* BUTTONS */}\n                                  <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2 mt-3\">\n                                      <button onClick={() => setActiveChatOrder(order)} className=\"flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-blue-100\"><MessageSquare size={14} className=\"mr-1.5\"/> Chat Client</button>\n                                      <button onClick={() => window.open(`tel:${order.customer?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}`)} className=\"flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-gray-200\"><Phone size={14} className=\"mr-1.5\"/> Appeler</button>\n                                  </div>\n                              </div>\n                              <div className=\"flex flex-col items-end space-y-2\">\n                                  <span className=\"font-black text-xl text-brand-600\">${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</span>\n                                  <div className=\"flex space-x-2\">\n                                     {/* Action buttons based on status */}\n                                      {order.status === 'pending' && <><button onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'cancelled')} className=\"px-3 py-2 bg-red-100 text-red-700 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold\">Refuser</button><button onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'preparing')} className=\"px-3 py-2 bg-brand-600 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center\"><ChefHat size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Accepter</button></>}\n                                      {order.status === 'preparing' && <button onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'ready')} className=\"px-3 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center\"><CheckCircle size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Prêt</button>}\n                                      {order.status === 'ready' && <button onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'delivering')} className=\"px-3 py-2 bg-orange-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center\"><Bike size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Expédier</button>}\n                                      {order.status === 'delivering' && <button onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'completed')} className=\"px-3 py-2 bg-green-600 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center\"><CheckCircle size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Livré</button>}\n                                  </div>\n                                  {getStatusBadge(order.status)}\n                              </div>\n                          </div>\n                      ))}\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n      );\n  };\n\n  const renderMarketing = () => (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800\">Publicité & Stories</h2>\n        <button \n          onClick={() => setIsAddingPromo(!isAddingPromo)}\n          className=\"flex items-center bg-brand-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-brand-700 transition-colors shadow-lg\"\n        >\n          <Plus size={18} className=\"mr-2\"/> Créer une Story\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      {isAddingPromo && (\n        <form onSubmit={addPromotion} className=\"bg-brand-50 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-brand-100 shadow-sm\">\n           <h4 className=\"font-bold text-brand-800 mb-4\">Nouvelle Publicité</h4>\n           <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n              <div>\n                  <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Type de média</label>\n                  <div className=\"flex space-x-4\">\n                      <button \n                        type=\"button\" \n                        onClick={() => setNewPromoType('image')}\n                        className={`flex-1 p-3 rounded-lg border font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${newPromoType === 'image' ? 'bg-white border-brand-500 text-brand-600 ring-2 ring-brand-100' : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200 text-gray-500'}`}\n                      >\n                         <ImageIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\"/> Image\n                      </button>\n                      <button \n                        type=\"button\" \n                        onClick={() => setNewPromoType('video')}\n                        className={`flex-1 p-3 rounded-lg border font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${newPromoType === 'video' ? 'bg-white border-brand-500 text-brand-600 ring-2 ring-brand-100' : 'bg-gray-50 border-gray-200 text-gray-500'}`}\n                      >\n                         <Video size={18} className=\"mr-2\"/> Vidéo\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n              \n              <div>\n                  <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">URL du média (Image ou Vidéo MP4)</label>\n                  <input \n                      type=\"text\" \n                      className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                      placeholder={newPromoType === 'image' ? \"https://...image.jpg\" : \"https://...video.mp4\"}\n                      value={newPromoUrl}\n                      onChange={e => setNewPromoUrl(e.target.value)}\n                      required\n                  />\n                  <p className=\"text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-1\">Utilisez un lien direct.</p>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                  <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Légende (Optionnel)</label>\n                  <input \n                      type=\"text\" \n                      className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                      placeholder=\"Ex: Promo spéciale ce soir !\"\n                      value={newPromoCaption}\n                      onChange={e => setNewPromoCaption(e.target.value)}\n                  />\n              </div>\n\n              <button \n                  type=\"submit\" \n                  disabled={loading}\n                  className=\"w-full bg-brand-600 text-white font-bold py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-700\"\n              >\n                  {loading ? 'Publication...' : 'Publier la Story'}\n              </button>\n           </div>\n        </form>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4\">\n          {promotions.map(promo => (\n              <div key={promo.id} className=\"relative aspect-[9/16] rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-md group\">\n                  {promo.mediaType === 'video' ? (\n                      <video src={promo.mediaUrl} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover bg-black\" muted />\n                  ) : (\n                      <img src={promo.mediaUrl} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover bg-gray-200\" alt=\"Promo\" />\n                  )}\n                  \n                  <div className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-transparent to-transparent flex flex-col justify-end p-3\">\n                      {promo.mediaType === 'video' && <PlayCircle className=\"text-white absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 opacity-80\" size={40} />}\n                      <p className=\"text-white text-xs font-medium line-clamp-2\">{promo.caption || 'Sans légende'}</p>\n                      <p className=\"text-gray-300 text-[10px] mt-1\">{new Date(promo.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</p>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <button \n                      onClick={() => deletePromotion(promo.id)}\n                      className=\"absolute top-2 right-2 bg-white/20 hover:bg-red-500 text-white p-2 rounded-full backdrop-blur-sm opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all\"\n                  >\n                      <Trash2 size={16} />\n                  </button>\n              </div>\n          ))}\n          {promotions.length === 0 && !isAddingPromo && (\n              <div className=\"col-span-full py-10 text-center text-gray-400 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200\">\n                  <Megaphone size={48} className=\"mx-auto mb-2 opacity-20\"/>\n                  <p>Aucune promotion active.</p>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs\">Ajoutez des stories pour attirer plus de clients !</p>\n              </div>\n          )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  const renderMenu = () => (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800\">Menu & Carte</h2>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => setIsAddingItem(!isAddingItem)}\n          className=\"flex items-center bg-brand-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-brand-700 transition-colors shadow-lg\"\n        >\n          <Plus size={18} className=\"mr-2\" /> Ajouter un plat\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      {isAddingItem && (\n        <form onSubmit={addItem} className=\"bg-brand-50 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-brand-100 shadow-sm animate-slide-in-down\">\n          <h4 className=\"font-bold text-brand-800 mb-4\">Nouveau Plat</h4>\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du plat</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"text\"\n                required\n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Poulet Mayo\"\n                value={newItemName}\n                onChange={e => setNewItemName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Prix ($)</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"number\"\n                step=\"0.1\"\n                required\n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: 15.0\"\n                value={newItemPrice}\n                onChange={e => setNewItemPrice(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { MapPin, ShoppingBag, List, Map, Zap, ArrowLeft, Plus, Bike, Footprints, LogOut, Navigation, Filter, formatDistance, formatTime } from '../utils/geo';\nimport { RestaurantCard } from '../components/RestaurantCard';\nimport { MapView } from '../components/MapView';\nimport { CartDrawer } from '../components/CartDrawer';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\nimport { StoryViewer } from '../components/StoryViewer';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [promotionsMap, setPromotionsMap] = useState<Record<string, Promotion[]>>({});\n  \n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const [activeStoryRestaurant, setActiveStoryRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In a real app, join query is better, but here we simulate or fetch separately\n      const { data } = await supabase.from('promotions').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      if (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)`)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    if (urgentMode) list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n          r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n    const newOrder: Order = {\n        id: `mock-${Date.now()}`, userId: user.id, restaurantId: cart[0].restaurantId,\n        status: 'pending', totalAmount: cartTotal, items: cart, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n        restaurant: { name: cart[0].restaurantName }\n    };\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id, restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId, status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal, items: cart\n        });\n        if (error) {\n            const existingMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify([newOrder, ...existingMockOrders]));\n        }\n        setIsCartOpen(false); setShowSuccess(true); setCart([]);\n        setTimeout(() => { setShowSuccess(false); setViewMode('orders'); fetchOrders(); setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]); }, 3000);\n    } catch (err) {\n        setIsCartOpen(false); setShowSuccess(true); setTimeout(() => { setShowSuccess(false); setViewMode('orders'); setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]); }, 3000);\n    } finally { setIsCheckingOut(false); }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';\n        case 'preparing': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';\n        case 'ready': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';\n        case 'delivering': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';\n        case 'completed': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800';\n        default: return 'bg-gray-100';\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusLabel = (status: string) => {\n    switch (status) {\n        case 'pending': return 'En attente';\n        case 'preparing': return 'En cuisine';\n        case 'ready': return 'Prêt';\n        case 'delivering': return 'En livraison';\n        case 'completed': return 'Livré';\n        case 'cancelled': return 'Annulé';\n        default: return status;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getProgressWidth = (status: string) => {\n    switch(status) {\n      case 'pending': return '10%'; case 'preparing': return '35%'; case 'ready': return '60%'; case 'delivering': return '80%'; case 'completed': return '100%'; default: return '0%';\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Get list of restaurants that have promotions\n  const restaurantsWithStories = restaurants.filter(r => promotionsMap[r.id] && promotionsMap[r.id].length > 0);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* STORY VIEWER OVERLAY */}\n      {activeStoryRestaurant && promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id] && (\n          <StoryViewer \n {\n                setActiveStoryRestaurant(null);\n                setSelectedRestaurant(activeStoryRestaurant);\n                setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n            }}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* CHAT OVERLAY */}\n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'client' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex         <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} rounded-full border-2 border-white\">{cart.length}</span>}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500\">\n                <LogOut               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [phone, setPhone] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleOAuthLogin = async (provider: 'google' | 'facebook') => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_pending_auth', JSON.stringify({ \n          role, \n          city,\n      }));\n\n      const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({\n        provider: provider,\n        options: {\n          redirectTo: window.location.origin,\n          queryParams: {\n            access_type: 'offline',\n            prompt: 'consent',\n          }\n        }\n      });\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"OAuth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Erreur de connexion sociale\");\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (loading) return;\n    \n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city }, // Metadata\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError && authError.message.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n            console.log(\"Utilisateur existant, tentative de connexion automatique...\");\n            const { error: loginError } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n                email,\n                password\n            });\n            if (loginError) {\n                if (loginError.message.includes(\"Invalid login\")) {\n                    throw new Error(\"Cet email existe déjà mais le mot de passe est incorrect.\");\n                }\n                throw loginError;\n            }\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 1. Create Profile in DB with phone number\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city,\n            phone_number: phone // Save phone number\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                console.warn(\"Profile creation warning:\", profileError);\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 2. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30,\n              phone_number: phone // Set restaurant phone number to owner's phone initially\n            });\n            if (restoError) console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\")) {\n        message = \"Veuillez patienter quelques secondes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n      \n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\")) {\n          setTimeout(() => setLoading(false), 2000);\n      } else {\n          setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"p-6 pb-2\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n                {isLogin ?                  <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business 'marketing';\n\nexport const BusinessDashboard: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [updatingTimes, setUpdatingTimes] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Marketing State\n  const [promotions, setPromotions] = useState<Promotion[]>([]);\n  const [newPromoUrl, setNewPromoUrl] = useState('');\n  const [newPromoType, setNewPromoType] = useState<'image' | 'video'>('image');\n  const [newPromoCaption, setNewPromoCaption] = useState('');\n  const [isAddingPromo, setIsAddingPromo] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Settings State\n  const [settingsForm, setSettingsForm] = useState({\n      name: restaurant.name,\n      description: restaurant.description,\n      coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n      city: restaurant.city,\n      phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n  });\n  const [isSavingSettings, setIsSavingSettings] = useState(false);\n\n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n\n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Load orders and promotions\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchRestaurantOrders();\n    fetchPromotions();\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRestaurantOrders, 30000); // Auto-refresh every 30s\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Sync settings form if restaurant prop changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setSettingsForm({\n          name: restaurant.name,\n          description: restaurant.description,\n          coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n          city: restaurant.city,\n          phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n      });\n  }, [restaurant]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('promotions')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      \n      if (data) {\n        setPromotions(data.map((p: any) => ({\n          id: p.id,\n          restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n          mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n          mediaType: p.media_type,\n          caption: p.caption,\n          createdAt: p.created_at\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Promotions fetch error (likely 403 in demo)\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, profiles:user_id(full_name, id, phone_number)`) // Retrieve phone_number from profile\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             // Fallback for demo mode\n             console.warn(\"Fetch orders failed, using local/demo mode if needed\");\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) {\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(localOrders).filter((o:any) => o.restaurantId === restaurant.id);\n                setOrders(parsed);\n             }\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                customer: { \n                    full_name: o.profiles?.full_name || 'Client Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.profiles?.phone_number || ''\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching restaurant orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateOrderStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) {\n            const updatedOrders = orders.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            setOrders(updatedOrders);\n            const allMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            const newAllMock = allMockOrders.map((o:any) => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify(newAllMock));\n        } else {\n            setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addPromotion = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    \n    const payload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      media_url: newPromoUrl,\n      media_type: newPromoType,\n      caption: newPromoCaption\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('promotions').insert(payload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      \n      if (data) {\n        const newPromo: Promotion = {\n          id: data.id,\n          restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n          mediaUrl: data.media_url,\n          mediaType: data.media_type,\n          caption: data.caption,\n          createdAt: data.created_at\n        };\n        setPromotions([newPromo, ...promotions]);\n        setNewPromoUrl('');\n        setNewPromoCaption('');\n        setIsAddingPromo(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding promo:\", err);\n      // Demo logic\n      const mockPromo: Promotion = {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n        mediaUrl: newPromoUrl,\n        mediaType: newPromoType,\n        caption: newPromoCaption,\n        createdAt: setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deletePromotion = async (id: string) => {\n    if (!confirm(\"Supprimer cette publicité ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      await supabase.from('promotions').delete().eq('id', id);\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    } catch (err) {\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ preparation_time: newPrep, estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: newPrep, estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: parseInt(prepTime), estimatedDeliveryTime: parseInt(deliveryTime) });\n    } finally { setUpdatingTimes(false); }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: !restaurant.isOpen });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveSettings = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setIsSavingSettings(true);\n      try {\n          const { error } = await setIsSavingSettings(false); }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n       onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n text-blue-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Prêt</span>;\n          case 'delivering': return <span className=\"bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Livraison</span>;\n          case 'completed': return <span className=\"bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Terminé</span>;\n          case 'cancelled': return <span className=\"bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Annulé</span>;\n      }\n  };\n\n  const completedOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'completed');\n  const revenue = completedOrders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.totalAmount, 0);\n  const activeOrders = orders.filter(o => ['pending', 'preparing', 'ready', */}\n                                      {order.status === 'pending' && <><button onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'cancelled')} className=\"px-3 py-2 bg-red-100 text-red-700 rounded-lg  {order.status === 'ready' && <button onClick={() => updateOrderStatus(order.id, 'delivering')} className=\"px-3 py-2 bg-orange-500 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center\"><Bike                                {getStatusBadge(order.status)}\n                              </div>\n                          </div>\n                      ))}\n                  </div>\n placeholder=\"Ex: 15.0\"\n                value={newItemPrice}\n                onChange={e => setNewItemPrice(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div             type=\"button\"\n                    onClick={() => setNewItemCategory(cat)}\n                    className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold capitalize whitespace-nowrap ${newItemCategory {restaurant.menu.map(item => (\n          <div key={item.id} className=\"bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm flex space-x-4 hover:border-brand-200 transition-colors group\">\n            <img src={item.image} className=\"w-24 h-24 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-100\" alt={item.name} />\n            <div className=\"flex-1\">\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between deleteItem(item.id)}\n                  className=\"p-2 text-red-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-full transition-colors opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100\"\n                >\n                  <Trash2 size={18} />\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  const renderSettings = () => (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n      <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800\">Paramètres du Restaurant</h2>\n      <div className=\"bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl         <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2\">Numéro de téléphone (Public)</label>\n            <input\n              type=\"tel\"\n              className=\"w-full p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none transition-all\"\n              placeholder=\"+243...\"\n              value={settingsForm.phoneNumber}\n              onChange={e => setSettingsForm({ ...settingsForm, phoneNumber: e.target.value })}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2\">Description</label>\n            <textarea\n              className=\"w-full p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-end\">\n            <button\n              type=\"submit\"\n         >\n              {isSavingSettings ?   </button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex\">\n      \n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'business' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.customer?.full_name || 'Client'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.customer?.phone_number || ''}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      <aside className=\"hidden md:flex w-64                 <LogOut size={20}/> <span>Déconnexion</span>\n                  </button>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n      )}\n\n      <main className=\"flex-1 p-6 md:p-10 pt-20 md:pt-10 {activeView === 'marketing' && renderMarketing()}\n          {activeView === 'settings' && renderSettings()}\n      </main>\n\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Send, X, Phone, User, Store, Check, CheckCheck } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Message } from '../types';\n\ninterface Props {\n  orderId: string;\n  currentUser: { id: string; role: 'client' | 'business' };\n  otherUserName: string;\n  otherUserPhone?: string;\n  onClose: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const ChatWindow: React.FC<Props> = ({ orderId, currentUser, otherUserName, otherUserPhone, onClose }) => {\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);\n  const [newMessage, setNewMessage] = useState('');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  // Scroll to bottom helper\n  const scrollToBottom = () => {\n    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchMessages();\n    markMessagesAsRead();\n    \n    // Subscribe to new messages\n    const channel = supabase\n      .channel(`chat:${orderId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: 'INSERT',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'messages',\n        filter: `order_id=eq.${orderId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        const newMsg = {\n            id: payload.new.id,\n            orderId: payload.new.order_id,\n            senderId: payload.new.sender_id,\n            content: payload.new.content,\n            createdAt: payload.new.created_at,\n            isRead: payload.new.is_read\n        };\n        setMessages(prev => [...prev, newMsg]);\n        \n        // If message is from other user, mark as read immediately since window is open\n        if (newMsg.senderId !== currentUser.id) {\n            markMessagesAsRead();\n        }\n        \n        scrollToBottom();\n      })\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n          event: 'UPDATE',\n          schema: 'public',\n          table: 'messages',\n          filter: `order_id=eq.${orderId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n          setMessages(prev => prev.map(m => m.id === payload.new.id ? { ...m, isRead: payload.new.is_read } : m));\n      })\n      .subscribe();\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel);\n    };\n  }, [orderId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    scrollToBottom();\n  }, [messages]);\n\n  const fetchMessages = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('messages')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('order_id', orderId)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: true });\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        setMessages(data.map((m: any) => ({\n          id: m.id,\n          orderId: m.order_id,\n          senderId: m.sender_id,\n          content: m.content,\n          createdAt: m.created_at,\n          isRead: m.is_read\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Erreur chargement messages (Mode démo possible)\", err);\n      // Demo fallback\n      const local = localStorage.getItem(`chat_${orderId}`);\n      if (local) setMessages(JSON.parse(local));\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const markMessagesAsRead = async () => {\n      try {\n          await supabase.from('messages')\n            .update({ is_read: true })\n            .eq('order_id', orderId)\n            .neq('sender_id', currentUser.id)\n            .eq('is_read', false);\n      } catch (err) {\n          console.error(\"Error marking messages as read\", err);\n      }\n  };\n\n  const handleSend = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!newMessage.trim()) return;\n\n    const tempId = Date.now().toString();\n    const content = newMessage.trim();\n    setNewMessage(''); // Clear immediately\n\n    const msgPayload = {\n      order_id: orderId,\n      sender_id: currentUser.id,\n      content: content,\n      is_read: false\n    };\n\n    // Optimistic UI update\n    const optimisticMsg: Message = {\n      id: tempId,\n      orderId: orderId,\n      senderId: currentUser.id,\n      content: content,\n      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n      isRead: false\n    };\n    \n    setMessages(prev => [...prev, optimisticMsg]);\n    \n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('messages').insert(msgPayload);\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur envoi:\", err);\n      // Demo Mode Fallback\n      const current = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(`chat_${orderId}`) || '[]');\n      localStorage.setItem(`chat_${orderId}`, JSON.stringify([...current, optimisticMsg]));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCall = () => {\n      if (otherUserPhone) {\n          window.open(`tel:${otherUserPhone}`);\n      } else {\n          alert(\"Numéro de téléphone non disponible.\");\n      }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-end sm:items-center justify-center pointer-events-none\">\n      <div className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/20 pointer-events-auto backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity\" onClick={onClose}></div>\n      \n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full sm:w-[400px] h-[85vh] sm:h-[600px] rounded-t-2xl sm:rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col pointer-events-auto overflow-hidden animate-slide-in-up\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-4 text-white flex justify-between items-center shadow-md z-10\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-3\">\n             <div className=\"w-10 h-10 bg-white/20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/30\">\n                {currentUser.role === 'client' ? <Store size={20}/> : <User size={20}/>}\n             </div>\n             <div>\n                <h3 className=\"font-bold text-sm leading-tight\">{otherUserName}</h3>\n                <p className=\"text-[10px] opacity-80 flex items-center\">\n                    <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-green-400 rounded-full mr-1\"></span>\n                    Commande #{orderId.slice(0,4)}\n                </p>\n             </div>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-1\">\n             <button \n                onClick={handleCall} \n                disabled={!otherUserPhone}\n                className={`p-2 rounded-full transition-colors ${otherUserPhone ? 'hover:bg-white/10 text-white' : 'text-white/40 cursor-not-allowed'}`}\n             >\n                <Phone size={20} />\n             </button>\n             <button onClick={onClose} className=\"p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full transition-colors\">\n                <X size={20} />\n             </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Messages Area */}\n        <div className=\"flex-1 bg-gray-50 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-3\" style={{ backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(#e5e7eb 1px, transparent 1px)', backgroundSize: '20px 20px' }}>\n            {messages.length === 0 && !loading && (\n                <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-400 text-xs\">\n                    <div className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-2\">\n                        <MessageSquare size={24} className=\"opacity-50\"/>\n                    </div>\n                    <p>Commencez la discussion avec {otherUserName}.</p>\n                </div>\n            )}\n            \n            {messages.map((msg) => {\n                const isMe = msg.senderId === currentUser.id;\n                return (\n                    <div key={msg.id} className={`flex flex-col ${isMe ?               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { Send, X, Phone, User, Store, Check, CheckCheck, MessageSquare } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Message } from '../types';\n\ninterface Props {\n  orderId: string;\n  currentUser: { id: string; role: 'client' | 'business' };\n  otherUserName: string;\n  otherUserPhone?: string;\n  onClose: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const ChatWindow: React.FC<Props> = ({ orderId, currentUser, otherUserName, otherUserPhone, onClose }) => {\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);\n  const [newMessage, setNewMessage] = useState('');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  // Scroll to bottom helper\n  const scrollToBottom = () => {\n    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchMessages();\n    markMessagesAsRead();\n    \n    // Subscribe to new messages\n    const channel = supabase\n      .channel(`chat:${orderId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: 'INSERT',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'messages',\n        filter: `order_id=eq.${orderId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        const newMsg = {\n            id: payload.new.id,\n            orderId: payload.new.order_id,\n            senderId: payload.new.sender_id,\n            content: payload.new.content,\n            createdAt: payload.new.created_at,\n            isRead: payload.new.is_read\n        };\n        setMessages(prev => [...prev, newMsg]);\n        \n        // If message is from other user, mark as read immediately since window is open\n        if (newMsg.senderId !== currentUser.id) {\n            markMessagesAsRead();\n        }\n        \n        scrollToBottom();\n      })\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n          event: 'UPDATE',\n          schema: 'public',\n          table: 'messages',\n          filter: `order_id=eq.${orderId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n          setMessages(prev => prev.map(m => m.id === payload.new.id ? { ...m, isRead: payload.new.is_read } : m));\n      })\n      .subscribe();\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel);\n    };\n  }, [orderId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    scrollToBottom();\n  }, [messages]);\n\n  const fetchMessages = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('messages')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('order_id', orderId)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: true });\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data) {\n        setMessages(data.map((m: any) => ({\n          id: m.id,\n          orderId: m.order_id,\n          senderId: m.sender_id,\n          content: m.content,\n          createdAt: m.created_at,\n          isRead: m.is_read\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Erreur chargement messages (Mode démo possible)\", err);\n      // Demo fallback\n      const local = localStorage.getItem(`chat_${orderId}`);\n      if (local) setMessages(JSON.parse(local));\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const markMessagesAsRead = async () => {\n      try {\n          await supabase.from('messages')\n            .update({ is_read: true })\n            .eq('order_id', orderId)\n            .neq('sender_id', currentUser.id)\n            .eq('is_read', false);\n      } catch (err) {\n          console.error(\"Error marking messages as read\", err);\n      }\n  };\n\n  const handleSend = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!newMessage.trim()) return;\n\n    const tempId = Date.now().toString();\n    const content = newMessage.trim();\n    setNewMessage(''); // Clear immediately\n\n    const msgPayload = {\n      order_id: orderId,\n      sender_id: currentUser.id,\n      content: content,\n      is_read: false\n    };\n\n    // Optimistic UI update\n    const optimisticMsg: Message = {\n      id: tempId,\n      orderId: orderId,\n      senderId: currentUser.id,\n      content: content,\n      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n      isRead: false\n    };\n    \n    setMessages(prev => [...prev, optimisticMsg]);\n    \n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('messages').insert(msgPayload);\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur envoi:\", err);\n      // Demo Mode Fallback\n      const current = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(`chat_${orderId}`) || '[]');\n      localStorage.setItem(`chat_${orderId}`, JSON.stringify([...current, optimisticMsg]));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleCall = () => {\n      if (otherUserPhone) {\n          window.open(`tel:${otherUserPhone}`);\n      } else {\n          alert(\"Numéro de téléphone non disponible.\");\n      }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-end sm:items-center justify-center pointer-events-none\">\n      <div className=\"absolute inset-0 bg-black/20 pointer-events-auto backdrop-blur-sm transition-opacity\" onClick={onClose}></div>\n      \n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full sm:w-[400px] h-[85vh] sm:h-[600px] rounded-t-2xl sm:rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col pointer-events-auto overflow-hidden animate-slide-in-up\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-4 text-white flex justify-between items-center shadow-md z-10\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-3\">\n             <div className=\"w-10 h-10 bg-white/20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/30\">\n                {currentUser.role === 'client' ? <Store size={20}/> : <User size={20}/>}\n             </div>\n             <div>\n                <h3 className=\"font-bold text-sm leading-tight\">{otherUserName}</h3>\n                <p className=\"text-[10px] opacity-80 flex items-center\">\n                    <span className=\"w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-green-400 rounded-full mr-1\"></span>\n                    Commande #{orderId.slice(0,4)}\n                </p>\n             </div>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-1\">\n             <button \n                onClick={handleCall} \n                disabled={!otherUserPhone}\n                className={`p-2 rounded-full transition-colors ${otherUserPhone ? 'hover:bg-white/10 text-white' : 'text-white/40 cursor-not-allowed'}`}\n             >\n                <Phone size={20} />\n             </button>\n             <button onClick={onClose} className=\"p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full transition-colors\">\n                <X size={20} />\n             </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Messages Area */}\n        <div className=\"flex-1 bg-gray-50 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-3\" style={{ backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(#e5e7eb 1px, transparent 1px)', backgroundSize: '20px 20px' }}>\n            {messages.length === 0 && !loading && (\n                <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-400 text-xs\">\n                    <div className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-2\">\n                        <MessageSquare size={24} className=\"opacity-50\"/>\n                    </div>\n                    <p>Commencez la discussion avec {otherUserName}.</p>\n                </div>\n            )}\n            \n            {messages.map((msg) => {\n                const isMe = msg.senderId === currentUser.id;\n                return (\n                    <div key={msg.id} className={`flex flex-col ${isMe ?               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { MapPin, ShoppingBag, List, Map, Zap, ArrowLeft, Plus, Bike, Footprints, LogOut, Navigation, Search, State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const [activeStoryRestaurant, setActiveStoryRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant |
