supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId:   if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n          r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n    const newOrder: Order = {\n        id: `mock-${Date.now()}`, userId: user.id, restaurantId:      const { error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id, restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId, status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal, items: cart\n        });\n        if (error) {\n            const existingMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders',           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex         <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [phone, setPhone] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleOAuthLogin = async (provider: 'google' | 'facebook') => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_pending_auth', JSON.stringify({ \n          role, \n          city,\n      }));\n\n      const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({\n        provider: provider,\n        options: {\n          redirectTo: window.location.origin,\n          queryParams: {\n            access_type: 'offline',\n            prompt: 'consent',\n          }\n        }\n      });\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"OAuth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Erreur de connexion sociale\");\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (loading) return;\n    \n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        // 1. Create Auth User\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city }, // Metadata fallback\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) {\n             if (authError.message.includes(\"already registered\")) {\n                setError(\"Cet email est déjà utilisé. Essayez de vous connecter.\");\n                setLoading(false);\n                return;\n             }\n             throw authError;\n        }\n        \n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 2. Create Profile in DB with phone number explicitely\n          // We wait for this to finish to ensure consistency\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city,\n            phone_number: phone\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             console.error(\"Erreur création profil:\", profileError);\n             // On ne bloque pas tout si le profil échoue (peut-être déjà créé par trigger), \n             // mais on loggue l'erreur.\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                 throw new Error(\"Erreur lors de la création du profil utilisateur.\");\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 3. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30,\n              phone_number: phone // Set restaurant phone number to owner's phone initially\n            });\n            if (restoError) {\n                console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n            }\n          }\n          \n          // Si inscription réussie mais pas de session auto (ex: email confirm), on prévient\n          if (!authData.session) {\n              setError(\"Compte créé ! Veuillez vérifier vos emails pour confirmer (si nécessaire) ou connectez-vous.\");\n              setIsLogin(true);\n              setLoading(false);\n              return;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives.         </div>\n\n            <div className=\"relative flex items-center justify-center mb-6\">\n                <hr className=\"w-full border-gray-300\" />\n                <span user: User;\n  restaurant: Restaurant;\n  onUpdateRestaurant: (updated: Restaurant) => void;\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\ntype DashboardView = 'overview' | 'orders' | 'menu' | 'settings' | 'marketing';\n\nexport const BusinessDashboard: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<DashboardView>('overview');\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); // For mobile\n\n  // Menu Management State\n  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [updatingTimes, setUpdatingTimes] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Marketing State\n  const [promotions, setPromotions] = useState<Promotion[]>([]);\n  const [newPromoUrl, setNewPromoUrl] = useState('');\n  const [newPromoType, setNewPromoType] = useState<'image' | 'video'>('image');\n  const [newPromoCaption, setNewPromoCaption] = useState('');\n  const [isAddingPromo, setIsAddingPromo] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Settings State\n  const [settingsForm, setSettingsForm] = useState({\n      name: restaurant.name,\n      description: restaurant.description,\n      coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n      city: restaurant.city,\n      phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n  });\n  const [isSavingSettings, setIsSavingSettings] = useState(false);\n  const [coverImageFile, setCoverImageFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n\n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n  const [newItemImageFile, setNewItemImageFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n\n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Load orders and promotions\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchRestaurantOrders();\n    fetchPromotions();\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRestaurantOrders, 30000); // Auto-refresh every 30s\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Sync settings form if restaurant prop changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setSettingsForm({\n          name: restaurant.name,\n          description: restaurant.description,\n          coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n          city: restaurant.city,\n          phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n      });\n  }, [restaurant]);\n\n  // UPLOAD HELPER FUNCTION\n  const uploadImage = async (file: File, bucket: string = 'images'): Promise<string | null> => {\n      try {\n          const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();\n          const fileName = `${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15)}_${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;\n          const filePath = `${fileName}`;\n\n          const { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage.from(bucket).upload(filePath, file);\n\n          if (uploadError) {\n              console.error(\"Upload error:\", uploadError);\n              alert(\"Erreur upload image (Vérifiez que le bucket 'images' existe dans Supabase)\");\n              return null;\n          }\n\n          const { data } = supabase.storage.from(bucket).getPublicUrl(filePath);\n          return data.publicUrl;\n      } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"Upload exception:\", error);\n          return null;\n      }\n  };\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('promotions')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      \n      if (data) {\n        setPromotions(data.map((p: any) => ({\n          id: p.id,\n          restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n          mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n          mediaType: p.media_type,\n          caption: p.caption,\n          createdAt: p.created_at\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Promotions fetch error (likely 403 in demo)\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, profiles:user_id(full_name, id, phone_number)`) // Retrieve phone_number from profile\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             // Fallback for demo mode\n             console.warn(\"Fetch orders failed, using local/demo mode if needed\");\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) {\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(localOrders).filter((o:any) => o.restaurantId === restaurant.id);\n                setOrders(parsed);\n             }\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                customer: { \n                    full_name: o.profiles?.full_name || 'Client Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.profiles?.phone_number || ''\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching restaurant orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateOrderStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) {\n            const updatedOrders = orders.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            setOrders(updatedOrders);\n            const allMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            const newAllMock = allMockOrders.map((o:any) => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify(newAllMock));\n        } else {\n            setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addPromotion = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    \n    const payload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      media_url: newPromoUrl,\n      media_type: newPromoType,\n      caption: newPromoCaption\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('promotions').insert(payload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      \n      if (data) {\n        const newPromo: Promotion = {\n          id: data.id,\n          restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n          mediaUrl: data.media_url,\n          mediaType: data.media_type,\n          caption: data.caption,\n          createdAt: data.created_at\n        };\n        setPromotions([newPromo, ...promotions]);\n        setNewPromoUrl('');\n        setNewPromoCaption('');\n        setIsAddingPromo(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding promo:\", err);\n      // Demo logic\n      const mockPromo: Promotion = {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n        mediaUrl: newPromoUrl,\n        mediaType: newPromoType,\n        caption: newPromoCaption,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n      };\n      setPromotions([mockPromo, ...promotions]);\n      setNewPromoUrl('');\n      setNewPromoCaption('');\n      setIsAddingPromo(false);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deletePromotion = async (id: string) => {\n    if (!confirm(\"Supprimer cette publicité ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      await supabase.from('promotions').delete().eq('id', id);\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    } catch (err) {\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ preparation_time: newPrep, estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: newPrep, estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: parseInt(prepTime), estimatedDeliveryTime: parseInt(deliveryTime) });\n    } finally { setUpdatingTimes(false); }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: !restaurant.isOpen });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveSettings = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setIsSavingSettings(true);\n      \n      let imageUrl = settingsForm.coverImage;\n\n      if (coverImageFile) {\n          const uploadedUrl = await uploadImage(coverImageFile);\n          if (uploadedUrl) {\n              imageUrl = uploadedUrl;\n          }\n      }\n\n      try {\n          const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({\n                name: settingsForm.name,\n                description: settingsForm.description,\n                cover_image: imageUrl,\n                city: settingsForm.city,\n                phone_number: settingsForm.phoneNumber\n            }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n          if(error) throw error;\n          \n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm, coverImage: imageUrl });\n          setCoverImageFile(null);\n          alert(\"Paramètres enregistrés !\");\n      } catch (err) {\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm, coverImage: imageUrl });\n      } finally { setIsSavingSettings(false); }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n       onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    \n    let imageUrl = `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`;\n    if (newItemImageFile) {\n        const uploadedUrl = await uploadImage(newItemImageFile);\n        if (uploadedUrl) imageUrl = uploadedUrl;\n    }\n\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: imageUrl\n    };\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').insert(newItemPayload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (data) {\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id, name: data.name, description: data.description, price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any, isAvailable: data.is_available, image: data.image\n        };\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem] });\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      const mockItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: `mock-item-${Date.now()}`, name: newItemName, description: newItemDesc, price: price,\n          category: newItemCategory, isAvailable: true, image: newItemPayload.image\n      };\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, mockItem] });\n    } finally {\n      setNewItemName(''); setNewItemDesc(''); setNewItemPrice(''); setIsAddingItem(false); setLoading(false);\n      setNewItemImageFile(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusBadge = (status: OrderStatus) => {\n      switch(status) {\n          case 'pending': return <span className=\"bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">En attente</span>;\n          case 'preparing': return <span className=\"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase animate-pulse\">En cuisine</span>;\n          case 'ready': return <span className=\"bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Prêt</span>;\n          case 'delivering': return <span className=\"bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Livraison</span>;\n          case 'completed': return <span className=\"bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Terminé</span>;\n          case 'cancelled': return <span className=\"bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Annulé</span>;\n      }\n  };\n\n  const completedOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'completed');\n  const revenue = completedOrders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.totalAmount, 0);\n  const activeOrders = orders.filter(o => ['pending', 'preparing', 'ready', 'delivering'].includes(o.status));\n\n  const renderSidebarItem = (view: DashboardView, icon: React.ReactNode, label: string) => (\n      <button \n        onClick={() => { setActiveView(view); setIsSidebarOpen(false); }}\n        className={`w-full flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium ${activeView === view ? 'bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 font-bold shadow-sm' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:text-gray-900'}`}\n      >\n          {icon}\n          <span>{label}</span>\n      </button>\n  );\n\n  const renderOverview = () => (\n      <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6\">\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-400\">Chiffre d'affaires</p>\n                      <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 mt-1\">${revenue.toFixed(2)}</h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-green-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-green-600\">\n                      <DollarSign size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-400\">En cours</p>\n                      <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 mt-1\">{activeOrders.length}</h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-orange-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-orange-600\">\n                      <Clock size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-400\">Total Commandes</p>\n                      <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 mt-1\">{orders.length}</h3>\n                  </div>\n                  <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-blue-50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-blue-600\">\n                      <ShoppingBag size={24} />\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6\">\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex-1\">\n                  <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800 mb-4 flex items-center\">\n                      <Power size={18} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\"/> Statut & Horaires\n                  </h3>\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-6 p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl\">\n                      <div>\n                          <p className=\"font-bold text-gray-700\">{restaurant.isOpen ? 'Ouvert aux clients' : 'Fermé actuellement'}</p>\n                          <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">Changez le statut à tout moment.</p>\n                      </div>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={toggleOpen}\n                        className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm transition-colors ${restaurant.isOpen ? 'bg-green-500 text-white hover:bg-green-600' : 'bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600'}`}\n                      >\n                          {restaurant.isOpen ? 'Fermer' : 'Ouvrir'}\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n                  \n                  <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                      <div>\n                          <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1\">Temps de préparation (min)</label>\n                          <input \n                              type=\"number\" \n                              className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                              value={prepTime}\n                              onChange={e => setPrepTime(e.target.value)}\n                          />\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                          <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 block mb-1\">Temps de livraison moyen (min)</label>\n                          <input \n                              type=\"number\" \n                              className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                              value={deliveryTime}\n                              onChange={e => setDeliveryTime(e.target.value)}\n                          />\n                      </div>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={updateTimes}\n                        disabled={updatingTimes}\n                        className=\"w-full bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 font-bold py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-brand-100\"\n                      >\n                          {updatingTimes ? 'Mise à jour...' : 'Sauvegarder les temps'}\n                      </button>\n                  </div>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex-1\">\n                  <h3 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800 mb-4 flex items-center\">\n                      <TrendingUp size={18} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\"/> Activité Récente\n                  </h3>\n                  <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                      {orders.slice(0, 5).map(order => (\n                          <div key={order.id} className=\"flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors\" onClick={() => setActiveView('orders')}>\n                              <div>\n                                  <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-700\">{order.customer?.full_name}</p>\n                                  <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-400\">{new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}</p>\n                              </div>\n                              <div className=\"text-right\">\n                                  <p className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-900\">${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</p>\n                                  <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${order.status === 'completed' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-600'}`}>\n                                      {order.status}\n                                  </span>\n                              </div>\n                          </div>\n                      ))}\n                      {orders.length === 0 && <p className=\"text-gray-400 text-center text-sm\">Aucune activité récente.</p>}\n                  </div>\n                  <button onClick={() => setActiveView('orders')} className=\"w-full mt-4 text-brand-600 text-sm font-bold hover:underline\">\n                      Voir toutes les commandes\n                  </button>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n      </div>\n  );\n\n  const renderMenu = () => (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n      <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800\">Menu & Carte</h2>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => setIsAddingItem(!isAddingItem)}\n          className=\"flex items-center bg-brand-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-brand-700 transition-colors shadow-lg\"\n        >\n          <Plus size={18} className=\"mr-2\" /> Ajouter un plat\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      {isAddingItem && (\n        <form onSubmit={addItem} className=\"bg-brand-50 p-6 rounded-2xl border border-brand-100 shadow-sm animate-slide-in-down\">\n          <h4 className=\"font-bold text-brand-800 mb-4\">Nouveau Plat</h4>\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Nom du plat</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"text\"\n                required\n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Poulet Mayo\"\n                value={newItemName}\n                onChange={e => setNewItemName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Prix ($)</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"number\"\n                step=\"0.1\"\n                required\n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: 15.0\"\n                value={newItemPrice}\n                onChange={e => setNewItemPrice(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Description</label>\n              <textarea\n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                placeholder=\"Description appétissante...\"\n                value={newItemDesc}\n                onChange={e => setNewItemDesc(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            \n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n                 <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Photo du plat</label>\n                 <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                    <label className=\"cursor-pointer bg-white border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold flex items-center\">\n                        <Upload size={16} className=\"mr-2\"/>\n                        {newItemImageFile ? 'Photo sélectionnée' : 'Choisir une photo'}\n                        <input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" className=\"hidden\" onChange={(e) => setNewItemImageFile(e.target.files?.[0] || null)} />\n                    </label>\n                    {newItemImageFile && <span className=\"text-xs text-brand-600\">{newItemImageFile.name}</span>}\n                 </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Catégorie</label>\n              <div className=\"flex space-x-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2\">\n                {(['entrée', 'plat', 'dessert', 'boisson'] as const).map(cat => (\n                  <button\n                    key={cat}\n                    type=\"button\"\n                    onClick={() => setNewItemCategory(cat)}\n                    className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold capitalize whitespace-nowrap ${newItemCategory === cat ? 'bg-brand-600 text-white' : 'bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600'}`}\n                  >\n                    {cat}\n                  </button>\n                ))}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex justify-end mt-4 space-x-3\">\n            <button\n              type=\"button\"\n              onClick={() => setIsAddingItem(false)}\n              className=\"px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100\"\n            >\n              Annuler\n            </button>\n            <button\n              type=\"submit\"\n              disabled={loading}\n              className=\"px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold bg-brand-600 text-white hover:bg-brand-700 shadow-lg\"\n            >\n              {loading ? 'Ajout...' : 'Ajouter au menu'}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4\">\n        {restaurant.menu.map(item => (\n          <div key={item.id} className=\"bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm flex space-x-4 hover:border-brand-200 transition-colors group\">\n            <img src={item.image} className=\"w-24 h-24 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-100\" alt={item.name} />\n            <div className=\"flex-1\">\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between items-start\">\n                <h4 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800 text-lg\">{item.name}</h4>\n                <span className=\"text-xs font-bold bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-2 py-1 rounded capitalize\">{item.category}</span>\n              </div>\n              <p className=\"text-gray-500 text-sm line-clamp-2 mt-1\">{item.description}</p>\n              <div className=\"flex justify-between items-end mt-3\">\n                <span className=\"font-black text-brand-600 text-xl\">${item.price.toFixed(2)}</span>\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => deleteItem(item.id)}\n                  className=\"p-2 text-red-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-full transition-colors opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100\"\n                >\n                  <Trash2 size={18} />\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  const renderSettings = () => (\n    <div className=\"space-y-6 animate-in fade-in duration-500\">\n      <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800\">Paramètres du Restaurant</h2>\n      <div className=\"bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 max-w-2xl\">\n        <form onSubmit={saveSettings} className=\"space-y-6\">\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2\">Nom de l'établissement</label>\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              className=\"w-full p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none transition-all\"\n              value={settingsForm.name}\n              onChange={e => setSettingsForm({ ...settingsForm, name: e.target.value })}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n           <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2\">Numéro de téléphone (Public)</label>\n            <input\n              type=\"tel\"\n              className=\"w-full p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none transition-all\"\n              placeholder=\"+243...\"\n              value={settingsForm.phoneNumber}\n              onChange={e => setSettingsForm({ ...settingsForm, phoneNumber: e.target.value })}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2\">Description</label>\n            <textarea\n              className=\"w-full p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none transition-all h-32\"\n              value={settingsForm.description}\n              onChange={e => setSettingsForm({ ...settingsForm, description: e.target.value })}\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 mb-2\">Ville</label>\n              <input\n                type=\"text\"\n                disabled\n                className=\"w-full p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 text-gray-500 coverImage: e.target.value })}\n                    placeholder=\"URL ou Upload\"\n                  />\n                   <label className=\"cursor-pointer bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold flex items-center justify-center border border-gray-300\">\n                        <Upload size={16} className=\"mr-2\"/>\n                        {coverImageFile ? 'Image sélectionnée' : 'Uploader une image'}\n                        <input type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" className=\"hidden\" onChange={(e) => setCoverImageFile(e.target.files?.[0] || null)} />\n                    </label>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"pt-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-end\">\n            <button\n              type=\"submit\"\n              disabled={isSavingSettings}\n              className=\"bg-brand-600 text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-xl hover:bg-brand-700 shadow-lg transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center\"\n            >\n              {isSavingSettings ? (\n                <>\n                  <div className=\"w-5 h-5 border-2 border-white border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin mr-2\"></div>\n                  Sauvegarde...\n                </>\n              ) : (\n                <>\n                  <Save className=\"mr-2\" size={20} />\n                  Enregistrer les modifications\n                </>\n              )}\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </form>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex\">\n      \n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'business' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.customer?.full_name || 'Client'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.customer?.phone_number || ''}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      <aside className=\"hidden md:flex w-64 tracking-tight\">DashPro</h1>\n              <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1\">Espace Partenaire</p>\n          </div>\n          <nav className=\"flex-1 p-4 space-y-2\">\n              {renderSidebarItem('overview', <LayoutDashboard size={20}/>, 'Vue d\\'ensemble')}\n              {renderSidebarItem('orders', <ShoppingBag size={20}/>, 'Commandes')}\n                 <LogOut size={20}/> <span>Déconnexion</span>\n                  </button>\n              </div>\n          </div>\n      )}\n\n      <main className=\"flex-1 p-6 md:p-10 pt-20 md:pt-10               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { MapPin, ShoppingBag, List, Map, Zap, ArrowLeft, Plus, Bike, Footprints, LogOut, Navigation, Search, X, Receipt, Phone, Info } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT, KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG, CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { Restaurant, UserState, ViewMode, MenuItem, CartItem, User, Order, Promotion } from '../types';\nimport { calculateTime, getDistanceFromLatLonInKm, formatDistance, formatTime } from '../utils/geo';\nimport { RestaurantCard } from '../components/RestaurantCard';\nimport { MapView } from '../components/MapView';\nimport { CartDrawer } from '../components/CartDrawer';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\nimport { StoryViewer } from '../components/StoryViewer';\nimport { OrdersView } from '../components/OrdersView';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [promotionsMap, setPromotionsMap] = useState<Record<string, Promotion[]>>({});\n  \n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const [activeStoryRestaurant, setActiveStoryRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In a real app, join query is better, but here we simulate or fetch separately\n      const { data } = await supabase.from('promotions').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      if (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)`)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    if (urgentMode) list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n          r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n    const newOrder: Order = {\n        id: `mock-${Date.now()}`, userId: user.id, restaurantId: cart[0].restaurantId,\n        status: 'pending', totalAmount: cartTotal, items: cart, createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),\n        restaurant: { name: cart[0].restaurantName }\n    };\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id, restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId, status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal, items: cart\n        });\n        if (error) {\n            const existingMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify([newOrder, ...existingMockOrders]));\n        }\n        setIsCartOpen(false); setShowSuccess(true); setCart([]);\n        setTimeout(() => { setShowSuccess(false); setViewMode('orders'); fetchOrders(); setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]); }, 3000);\n    } catch (err) {\n        setIsCartOpen(false); setShowSuccess(true); setTimeout(() => { setShowSuccess(false); setViewMode('orders'); setOrders(prev => [newOrder, ...prev]); }, 3000);\n    } finally { setIsCheckingOut(false); }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Get list of restaurants that have promotions\n  const restaurantsWithStories = restaurants.filter(r => promotionsMap[r.id] && promotionsMap[r.id].length > 0);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* STORY VIEWER OVERLAY */}\n      {activeStoryRestaurant && promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id] && (\n          <StoryViewer \n            restaurant={activeStoryRestaurant}\n            promotions={promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id]}\n            onClose={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(null)}\n            onVisitRestaurant={() => {\n                setActiveStoryRestaurant(null);\n                setSelectedRestaurant(activeStoryRestaurant);\n                setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n            }}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* CHAT OVERLAY */}\n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'client' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-6 text-center animate-fade-in\">\n           <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600 tracking-tight mr-2\">DashMeals</h1>\n                <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">{cart.length}</span>}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500\">\n                <LogOut size={20} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        {(viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map') && (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1 flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg truncate\">\n                <MapPin size={14} className=\"mr-1.5 text-brand-500 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                <span className=\"truncate\">{userState.locationError ? \"Mode Démo\" : \"Ma Position\"}</span>\n                </div>\n                <select className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold py-2 pl-2 pr-6 rounded-lg border border-brand-200 outline-none appearance-none\" value={selectedCity} onChange={(e) => setSelectedCity(e.target.value)}>\n                <option value=\"Toutes\">Toutes les villes</option>\n                {CITIES_RDC.map(city => <option key={city} value={city}>{city}</option>)}\n                </select>\n            </div>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* MAIN CONTENT AREA */}\n      <main className=\"p-4 pt-2\">\n        \n        {viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map' ? (\n            <>\n                {/* SEARCH BAR - Moved to Top */}\n                <div className=\"mb-4 relative z-20\">\n                    <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400\" size={18} />\n                    <input \n                        type=\"text\"\n                        placeholder=\"Rechercher un restaurant par nom...\"\n                        className=\"w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none text-sm bg-white shadow-sm transition-shadow focus:shadow-md\"\n                        value={searchQuery}\n                        onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                    {searchQuery && (\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => setSearchQuery('')} \n                        className=\"absolute right-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 p-1\"\n                      >\n                        <X size={16} />\n                      </button>\n                    )}\n                </div>\n\n                {/* STORIES BAR (Professional Look) - Hidden during search */}\n                {!searchQuery && restaurantsWithStories.length > 0 && (\n                    <div className=\"mb-6 -mx-4 px-4 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar\">\n                        <div className=\"flex space-x-4\">\n                            {restaurantsWithStories.map(r => (\n                                <button \n                                    key={r.id} \n                                    onClick={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(r)}\n                                    className=\"flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 min-w-[64px]\"\n                                >\n                                    <div className=\"w-16 h-16 rounded-full p-[2px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-500 to-yellow-500\">\n                                        <div className=\"w-full h-full rounded-full border-2 border-white overflow-hidden\">\n                                            <img src={r.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\" alt={r.name} />\n                                        </div>\n                                    </div>\n                                    <span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-600 truncate w-full text-center\">{r.name}</span>\n                                </button>\n                            ))}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n\n                {/* FILTERS */}\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-3 mb-6 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-1\">\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)}\n                        className={`flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-bold text-sm shadow-sm transition-all border whitespace-nowrap ${urgentMode ? 'bg-red-500 text-white border-red-500 animate-pulse-fast' : 'bg-white text-gray-700 border-gray-200'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Zap size={16} className={`mr-1 ${urgentMode ? 'fill-white' : 'fill-none'}`} />\n                        Urgent - J'ai faim !\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍖 Grillades</button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍗 Poulet</button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* CONTENT */}\n                {viewMode === 'list' ? (\n            <div className=\"animate-in slide-in-from-right duration-300\">\n                <button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className=\"mb-4 flex items-center text-gray-600 font-medium               <img src={selectedRestaurant.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-48 object-cover\" alt=\"Cover\" />\n                    <div className=\"p-4\">\n                        <div                 <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n                                    <div className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-gray-600\">\n                                     </button>\n                                    )}\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-4 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n                            <span className=\"flex items-center bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Restaurant, MenuItem, User, Order, OrderStatus, Promotion } from '../types';\nimport { \n  Plus, Trash2, Power, LogOut, Coffee, DollarSign, Clock, Truck, \n  Receipt, CheckCircle, ChefHat, Bike, LayoutDashboard, Settings, \n  TrendingUp, Users, ShoppingBag, X, Save, Image as ImageIcon, MapPin,\n  MessageSquare, Phone, Megaphone, Video, PlayCircle, Upload\n} from 'lucide-react';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  restaurant: Restaurant;\n  onUpdateRestaurant: (updated: Restaurant) => void;\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\ntype DashboardView = 'overview' | 'orders' | 'menu' | 'settings' | 'marketing';\n\nexport const BusinessDashboard: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, restaurant, onUpdateRestaurant, onLogout }) => {\n  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<DashboardView>('overview');\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); // For mobile\n\n  // Menu Management State\n  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [updatingTimes, setUpdatingTimes] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Marketing State\n  const [promotions, setPromotions] = useState<Promotion[]>([]);\n  const [newPromoUrl, setNewPromoUrl] = useState('');\n  const [newPromoType, setNewPromoType] = useState<'image' | 'video'>('image');\n  const [newPromoCaption, setNewPromoCaption] = useState('');\n  const [isAddingPromo, setIsAddingPromo] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Settings State\n  const [settingsForm, setSettingsForm] = useState({\n      name: restaurant.name,\n      description: restaurant.description,\n      coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n      city: restaurant.city,\n      phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n  });\n  const [isSavingSettings, setIsSavingSettings] = useState(false);\n  const [coverImageFile, setCoverImageFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n\n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n  const [newItemImageFile, setNewItemImageFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n\n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Load orders and promotions\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchRestaurantOrders();\n    fetchPromotions();\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchRestaurantOrders, 30000); // Auto-refresh every 30s\n    return () => clearInterval(interval);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Sync settings form if restaurant prop changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setSettingsForm({\n          name: restaurant.name,\n          description: restaurant.description,\n          coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n          city: restaurant.city,\n          phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n      });\n  }, [restaurant]);\n\n  // UPLOAD HELPER FUNCTION\n  const uploadImage = async (file: File, bucket: string = 'images'): Promise<string | null> => {\n      try {\n          const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();\n          const fileName = `${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15)}_${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;\n          const filePath = `${fileName}`;\n\n          const { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage.from(bucket).upload(filePath, file);\n\n          if (uploadError) {\n              console.error(\"Upload error:\", uploadError);\n              alert(\"Erreur upload image (Vérifiez que le bucket 'images' existe dans Supabase)\");\n              return null;\n          }\n\n          const { data } = supabase.storage.from(bucket).getPublicUrl(filePath);\n          return data.publicUrl;\n      } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"Upload exception:\", error);\n          return null;\n      }\n  };\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('promotions')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      \n      if (data) {\n        setPromotions(data.map((p: any) => ({\n          id: p.id,\n          restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n          mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n          mediaType: p.media_type,\n          caption: p.caption,\n          createdAt: p.created_at\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Promotions fetch error (likely 403 in demo)\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, profiles:user_id(full_name, id, phone_number)`) // Retrieve phone_number from profile\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             // Fallback for demo mode\n             console.warn(\"Fetch orders failed, using local/demo mode if needed\");\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) {\n                const parsed = JSON.parse(localOrders).filter((o:any) => o.restaurantId === restaurant.id);\n                setOrders(parsed);\n             }\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                customer: { \n                    full_name: o.profiles?.full_name || 'Client Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.profiles?.phone_number || ''\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching restaurant orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateOrderStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) {\n            const updatedOrders = orders.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            setOrders(updatedOrders);\n            const allMockOrders = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders') || '[]');\n            const newAllMock = allMockOrders.map((o:any) => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o);\n            localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_mock_orders', JSON.stringify(newAllMock));\n        } else {\n            setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addPromotion = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    \n    const payload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      media_url: newPromoUrl,\n      media_type: newPromoType,\n      caption: newPromoCaption\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('promotions').insert(payload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      \n      if (data) {\n        const newPromo: Promotion = {\n          id: data.id,\n          restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n          mediaUrl: data.media_url,\n          mediaType: data.media_type,\n          caption: data.caption,\n          createdAt: data.created_at\n        };\n        setPromotions([newPromo, ...promotions]);\n        setNewPromoUrl('');\n        setNewPromoCaption('');\n        setIsAddingPromo(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding promo:\", err);\n      // Demo logic\n      const mockPromo: Promotion = {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n        mediaUrl: newPromoUrl,\n        mediaType: newPromoType,\n        caption: newPromoCaption,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n      };\n      setPromotions([mockPromo, ...promotions]);\n      setNewPromoUrl('');\n      setNewPromoCaption('');\n      setIsAddingPromo(false);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deletePromotion = async (id: string) => {\n    if (!confirm(\"Supprimer cette publicité ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      await supabase.from('promotions').delete().eq('id', id);\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    } catch (err) {\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ preparation_time: newPrep, estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: newPrep, estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: parseInt(prepTime), estimatedDeliveryTime: parseInt(deliveryTime) });\n    } finally { setUpdatingTimes(false); }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: !restaurant.isOpen });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveSettings = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setIsSavingSettings(true);\n      \n      let imageUrl = settingsForm.coverImage;\n\n      if (coverImageFile) {\n          const uploadedUrl = await uploadImage(coverImageFile);\n          if (uploadedUrl) {\n              imageUrl = uploadedUrl;\n          }\n      }\n\n      try {\n          const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({\n                name: settingsForm.name,\n                description: settingsForm.description,\n                cover_image: imageUrl,\n                city: settingsForm.city,\n                phone_number: settingsForm.phoneNumber\n            }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n          if(error) throw error;\n          \n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm, coverImage: imageUrl });\n          setCoverImageFile(null);\n          alert(\"Paramètres enregistrés !\");\n      } catch (err) {\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, ...settingsForm, coverImage: imageUrl });\n      } finally { setIsSavingSettings(false); }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n       onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    \n    let imageUrl = `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`;\n    if (newItemImageFile) {\n        const uploadedUrl = await uploadImage(newItemImageFile);\n        if (uploadedUrl) imageUrl = uploadedUrl;\n    }\n\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: imageUrl\n    };\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').insert(newItemPayload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (data) {\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id, name: data.name, description: data.description, price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any, isAvailable: data.is_available, image: data.image\n        };\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, newItem] });\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      const mockItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: `mock-item-${Date.now()}`, name: newItemName, description: newItemDesc, price: price,\n          category: newItemCategory, isAvailable: true, image: newItemPayload.image\n      };\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, mockItem] });\n    } finally {\n      setNewItemName(''); setNewItemDesc(''); setNewItemPrice(''); setIsAddingItem(false); setLoading(false);\n      setNewItemImageFile(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getStatusBadge = (status: OrderStatus) => {\n      switch(status) {\n          case 'pending': return <span className=\"bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">En attente</span>;\n          case 'preparing': return <span className=\"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase animate-pulse\">En cuisine</span>;\n          case 'ready': return <span className=\"bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Prêt</span>;\n          case 'delivering': return <span className=\"bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Livraison</span>;\n          case 'completed': return <span className=\"bg-green-100 text-green-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Terminé</span>;\n          case 'cancelled': return <span className=\"bg-red-100 text-red-700 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase\">Annulé</span>;\n      }\n  };\n\n  const completedOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'completed');\n  const revenue = completedOrders.reduce((sum, o) => sum + o.totalAmount, 0);\n  const activeOrders = orders.filter(o => ['pending', 'preparing', 'ready', 'delivering'].includes(o.status));\n\n  const renderSidebarItem = (view: DashboardView, icon: React.ReactNode, label: string) => (\n      <button \n        onClick={() => { setActiveView(view); setIsSidebarOpen(false); }}\n        className={`w-full flex items-center space-x-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium ${activeView === view ?      <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                  <div>\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-bold    </div>\n\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6\">\n              <div className=\"bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex-1\">\n                  <h3 'Ouvert aux clients' : 'Fermé actuellement'}</p>\n                          <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">Changez le statut à tout moment.</p>\n                      </div>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={toggleOpen}\n                        className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-bold text-sm transition-colors ${restaurant.isOpen ?
