renderSettings()}\n      </main>\n\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { MapPin, ShoppingBag, List, Map, Zap, ArrowLeft, Plus, Bike, Footprints, LogOut, Navigation, Search, X, Receipt, Phone, Info } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT, KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG, CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { Restaurant, UserState, ViewMode, MenuItem, CartItem, User, Order, Promotion } from '../types';\nimport { calculateTime, getDistanceFromLatLonInKm, formatDistance, formatTime } from '../utils/geo';\nimport { RestaurantCard } from '../components/RestaurantCard';\nimport { MapView } from '../components/MapView';\nimport { CartDrawer } from '../components/CartDrawer';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\nimport { StoryViewer } from '../components/StoryViewer';\nimport { OrdersView } from '../components/OrdersView';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [promotionsMap, setPromotionsMap] = useState<Record<string, Promotion[]>>({});\n  \n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const [activeStoryRestaurant, setActiveStoryRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In a real app, join query is better, but here we simulate or fetch separately\n      const { data } = await supabase.from('promotions').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      if (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)`)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    if (urgentMode) list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n          r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id,\n            restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId,\n            status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal,\n            items: cart // Supabase will stringify this automatically for jsonb\n        }).select().single();\n\n        if (error) {\n            console.error(\"Erreur commande:\", error);\n            throw new Error(\"Impossible d'envoyer la commande. Vérifiez votre connexion.\");\n        }\n\n        // Success Path\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setCart([]);\n        \n        // Optimistic UI update not needed here as we refetch orders in viewMode change\n        setTimeout(() => {\n             setShowSuccess(false);\n             setViewMode('orders');\n             fetchOrders(); // Refresh list from DB\n        }, 2000);\n\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        alert(err.message || \"Erreur inconnue lors de la commande.\");\n    } finally {\n        setIsCheckingOut(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Get list of restaurants that have promotions\n  const restaurantsWithStories = restaurants.filter(r => promotionsMap[r.id] && promotionsMap[r.id].length > 0);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* STORY VIEWER OVERLAY */}\n      {activeStoryRestaurant && promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id] && (\n          <StoryViewer \n            restaurant={activeStoryRestaurant}\n            promotions={promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id]}\n            onClose={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(null)}\n            onVisitRestaurant={() => {\n                setActiveStoryRestaurant(null);\n                setSelectedRestaurant(activeStoryRestaurant);\n                setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n            }}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* CHAT OVERLAY */}\n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'client' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-6 text-center animate-fade-in\">\n           <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600 tracking-tight mr-2\">DashMeals</h1>\n                <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">{cart.length}</span>}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500\">\n                <LogOut size={20} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        {(viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map') && (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1 flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg truncate\">\n                <MapPin size={14} className=\"mr-1.5 text-brand-500 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                <span className=\"truncate\">{userState.locationError ? \"Mode Démo\" : \"Ma Position\"}</span>\n                </div>\n                <select className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold py-2 pl-2 pr-6 rounded-lg border border-brand-200 outline-none appearance-none\" value={selectedCity} onChange={(e) => setSelectedCity(e.target.value)}>\n                <option value=\"Toutes\">Toutes les villes</option>\n                {CITIES_RDC.map(city => <option key={city} value={city}>{city}</option>)}\n                </select>\n            </div>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* MAIN CONTENT AREA */}\n      <main className=\"p-4 pt-2\">\n        \n        {viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map' ? (\n            <>\n                {/* SEARCH BAR - Moved to Top */}\n                <div className=\"mb-4 relative z-20\">\n                    <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400\" size={18} />\n                    <input \n                        type=\"text\"\n                        placeholder=\"Rechercher un restaurant par nom...\"\n                        className=\"w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none text-sm bg-white shadow-sm transition-shadow focus:shadow-md\"\n                        value={searchQuery}\n                        onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                    {searchQuery && (\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => setSearchQuery('')} \n                        className=\"absolute right-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 p-1\"\n                      >\n                        <X size={16} />\n                      </button>\n                    )}\n                </div>\n\n                {/* STORIES BAR (Professional Look) - Hidden during search */}\n                {!searchQuery && restaurantsWithStories.length > 0 && (\n                    <div className=\"mb-6 -mx-4 px-4 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar\">\n                        <div className=\"flex space-x-4\">\n                            {restaurantsWithStories.map(r => (\n                                <button \n                                    key={r.id} \n                                    onClick={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(r)}\n                                    className=\"flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 min-w-[64px]\"\n                                >\n                                    <div className=\"w-16 h-16 rounded-full p-[2px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-500 to-yellow-500\">\n                                        <div className=\"w-full h-full rounded-full border-2 border-white overflow-hidden\">\n                                            <img src={r.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\" alt={r.name} />\n                                        </div>\n                                    </div>\n                                    <span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-600 truncate w-full text-center\">{r.name}</span>\n                                </button>\n                            ))}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n\n                {/* FILTERS */}\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-3 mb-6 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-1\">\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)}\n                        className={`flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-bold text-sm shadow-sm transition-all border whitespace-nowrap ${urgentMode ? 'fill-white' : 'fill-none'}`} />\n                        Urgent - J'ai faim !\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍖 Grillades</button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍗 Poulet</button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* CONTENT */}\n                {viewMode === 'list' ? (\n                    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                        {filteredRestaurants.map(restaurant => (\n                            <RestaurantCard \n                                key={restaurant.id} \n                                restaurant={restaurant} \n                                onClick={() => { setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant); setViewMode('restaurant_detail'); }} \n                            />\n                        ))}\n                        {filteredRestaurants.length === 0 && (\n                            <div className=\"text-center py-10 text-gray-500\">\n                                <p>Aucun restaurant trouvé {selectedCity !== 'Toutes' ? `à ${selectedCity}` : ''} {searchQuery ? `pour \"${searchQuery}\"` : ''} :(</p>\n                                {urgentMode && <button onClick={() => setUrgentMode(false)} className=\"text-brand-500 underline mt-2\">Désactiver le mode urgent</button>}\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n                    </div>\n                ) : (\n                    <MapView \n                        restaurants={filteredRestaurants} \n                        userLocation={userState.location} \n                        onSelect={(r) => { setSelectedRestaurant(r); setViewMode('restaurant_detail'); }}\n                    />\n                )}\n            </>\n        ) : viewMode === 'restaurant_detail' && selectedRestaurant ? (\n            <div className=\"animate-in slide-in-from-right duration-300\">\n                <button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className=\"mb-4 flex items-center text-gray-600 font-medium hover:text-brand-600\"><ArrowLeft size={18} className=\"mr-1\" /> Retour</button>\n                <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden mb-6\">\n                    <img src={selectedRestaurant.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-48 object-cover\" alt=\"Cover\" />\n                    <div className=\"p-4\">\n                        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-start\">\n                           <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900\">{selectedRestaurant.name}</h1>\n                           <span className=\"text-xs bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg\">{selectedRestaurant.city}</span>\n                        </div>\n                        <p className=\"text-gray-500 mb-4 mt-2\">{selectedRestaurant.description}</p>\n                        \n                        {/* Info & Contact Section */}\n                        <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-xl mb-4 border border-gray-100\">\n                            <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 flex items-center\"><Info size={16} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\"/> Informations & Contact</h3>\n                            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                                <div className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-gray-600\">\n                                    <MapPin size={16} className=\"mr-2 text-gray-400\"/>\n                                    <span>{selectedRestaurant.city || 'Kinshasa'}</span>\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n                                    <div className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-gray-600\">\n                                        <Phone size={16} className=\"mr-2 text-gray-400\"/>\n                                        <span>{selectedRestaurant.phoneNumber || 'Numéro non disponible'}</span>\n                                    </div>\n                                    {selectedRestaurant.phoneNumber && (\n                                        <button \n                                            onClick={() => window.open(`tel:${selectedRestaurant.phoneNumber}`)}\n                                            className=\"bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center shadow-md transition-transform active:scale-95\"\n                                        >\n                                            <Phone size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Appeler\n                                        </button>\n                                    )}\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-4 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n                            <span className=\"flex items-center bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1 rounded\"><Navigation size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> {formatDistance(selectedRestaurant.distance || 0)}</span>\n                            <span className=\"flex items-center bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1 rounded\"><Zap size={14} className=\"mr-1 text-yellow-500\"/> {selectedRestaurant.preparationTime} min</span>\n                        </div>\n\n                        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-2\">\n                             <div className=\"flex items-center p-3 bg-orange-50 rounded-lg text-orange-700 border border-orange-100\">\n                                <Bike size={20} className=\"mr-3\" />\n                                <div><p className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-70\">En Moto</p><p className=\"font-bold text-lg leading-none\">{selectedRestaurant.timeMoto ? formatTime(selectedRestaurant.timeMoto) : '--'}</p></div>\n                            </div>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg text-blue-700 border border-blue-100\">\n                                <Footprints size={20} className=\"mr-3\" />\n                                <div><p className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-70\">À pied</p><p className=\"font-bold text-lg leading-none\">{selectedRestaurant.timeWalking ? formatTime(selectedRestaurant.timeWalking) : '--'}</p></div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n\n                <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-3\">Menu</h3>\n                <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                    {selectedRestaurant.menu.map(item => (\n                        <div key={item.id} className=\"bg-white p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm flex space-x-3\">\n                            <img src={item.image} className=\"w-20 h-20 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-100\" alt={item.name} />\n                            <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col justify-between\">\n                                <div>\n                                    <h4 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800\">{item.name}</h4>\n                                    <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-1\">{item.description}</p>\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"flex justify-between items-end mt-2\">\n                                    <span className=\"font-bold text-brand-600\">${item.price.toFixed(2)}</span>\n                                    <button onClick={() => addToCart(item, selectedRestaurant)} className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-600 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-100 transition-colors\"><Plus size={16} /></button>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    ))}\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        ) : viewMode === 'orders' ? (\n            <OrdersView \n                orders={orders} \n                onChat={(order) => setActiveChatOrder(order)} \n                onBrowse={() => setViewMode('list')} \n            />\n        ) : null}\n      </main>\n\n      <nav className=\"fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 px-6 py-3 flex justify-around items-center z-40 max-w-md mx-auto\">\n        <button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className={`flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 ${viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'restaurant_detail' ? 'text-brand-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}><List size={22} /><span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium\">Liste</span></button>\n        <div className=\"relative -top-6\"><button onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)} className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg border-4 border-gray-50 transition-all ${urgentMode ? 'bg-red-500 text-white scale-110' : 'bg-brand-500 text-white'}`}><Zap size={24} className={urgentMode ? 'animate-pulse' : ''} /></button></div>\n        <button onClick={() => setViewMode('map')} className={`flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 ${viewMode === 'map' ? 'text-brand-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}><Map size={22} /><span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium\">Carte</span></button>\n        <button onClick={() => setViewMode('orders')} className={`flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 ${viewMode === 'orders' ? 'text-brand-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}><Receipt size={22} /><span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium\">Commandes</span></button>\n      </nav>\n\n      <CartDrawer isOpen={isCartOpen} onClose={() => setIsCartOpen(false)} items={cart} onRemove={removeFromCart} onCheckout={handleCheckout} total={cartTotal} isLoading={isCheckingOut} />\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';\nimport { MapPin, ShoppingBag, List, Map, Zap, ArrowLeft, Plus, Bike, Footprints, LogOut, Navigation, Search, X, Receipt, Phone, Info, Image as ImageIcon, PlayCircle } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT, KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG, CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { Restaurant, UserState, ViewMode, MenuItem, CartItem, User, Order, Promotion } from '../types';\nimport { calculateTime, getDistanceFromLatLonInKm, formatDistance, formatTime } from '../utils/geo';\nimport { RestaurantCard } from '../components/RestaurantCard';\nimport { MapView } from '../components/MapView';\nimport { CartDrawer } from '../components/CartDrawer';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\nimport { StoryViewer } from '../components/StoryViewer';\nimport { OrdersView } from '../components/OrdersView';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [promotionsMap, setPromotionsMap] = useState<Record<string, Promotion[]>>({});\n  \n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const [activeStoryRestaurant, setActiveStoryRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [storyStartIndex, setStoryStartIndex] = useState(0);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In a real app, join query is better, but here we simulate or fetch separately\n      const { data } = await supabase.from('promotions').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      if (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)`)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    if (urgentMode) list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n          r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id,\n            restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId,\n            status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal,\n            items: cart // Supabase will stringify this automatically for jsonb\n        }).select().single();\n\n        if (error) {\n            console.error(\"Erreur commande:\", error);\n            throw new Error(\"Impossible d'envoyer la commande. Vérifiez votre connexion.\");\n        }\n\n        // Success Path\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setCart([]);\n        \n        // Optimistic UI update not needed here as we refetch orders in viewMode change\n        setTimeout(() => {\n             setShowSuccess(false);\n             setViewMode('orders');\n             fetchOrders(); // Refresh list from DB\n        }, 2000);\n\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        alert(err.message || \"Erreur inconnue lors de la commande.\");\n    } finally {\n        setIsCheckingOut(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Get list of restaurants that have promotions\n  const restaurantsWithStories = restaurants.filter(r => promotionsMap[r.id] && promotionsMap[r.id].length > 0);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative\">\n      \n      {/* STORY VIEWER OVERLAY */}\n      {activeStoryRestaurant && promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id] && (\n          <StoryViewer \n            restaurant={activeStoryRestaurant}\n            promotions={promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id]}\n            onClose={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(null)}\n            onVisitRestaurant={() => {\n                setActiveStoryRestaurant(null);\n                setSelectedRestaurant(activeStoryRestaurant);\n                setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n            }}\n            initialIndex={storyStartIndex}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* CHAT OVERLAY */}\n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'client' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-6 text-center animate-fade-in\">\n           <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600 tracking-tight mr-2\">DashMeals</h1>\n                <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">{cart.length}</span>}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500\">\n                <LogOut size={20} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        {(viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map') && (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1 flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg truncate\">\n                <MapPin size={14} className=\"mr-1.5 text-brand-500 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                <span className=\"truncate\">{userState.locationError ? \"Mode Démo\" : \"Ma Position\"}</span>\n                </div>\n                <select className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold py-2 pl-2 pr-6 rounded-lg border border-brand-200 outline-none appearance-none\" value={selectedCity} onChange={(e) => setSelectedCity(e.target.value)}>\n                <option value=\"Toutes\">Toutes les villes</option>\n                {CITIES_RDC.map(city => <option key={city} value={city}>{city}</option>)}\n                </select>\n            </div>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* MAIN CONTENT AREA */}\n      <main className=\"p-4 pt-2\">\n        \n        {viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map' ? (\n            <>\n                {/* SEARCH BAR - Moved to Top */}\n                <div className=\"mb-4 relative z-20\">\n                    <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400\" size={18} />\n                    <input \n                        type=\"text\"\n                        placeholder=\"Rechercher un restaurant par nom...\"\n                        className=\"w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none text-sm bg-white shadow-sm transition-shadow focus:shadow-md\"\n                        value={searchQuery}\n                        onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                    {searchQuery && (\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => setSearchQuery('')} \n                        className=\"absolute right-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 p-1\"\n                      >\n                        <X size={16} />\n                      </button>\n                    )}\n                </div>\n\n                {/* STORIES BAR (Professional Look) - Hidden during search */}\n                {!searchQuery && restaurantsWithStories.length > 0 && (\n                    <div className=\"mb-6 -mx-4 px-4 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar\">\n                        <div className=\"flex space-x-4\">\n                            {restaurantsWithStories.map(r => (\n                                <button \n                                    key={r.id} \n                                    onClick={() => {\n                                        setStoryStartIndex(0);\n                                        setActiveStoryRestaurant(r);\n                                    }}\n                                    className=\"flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 min-w-[64px]\"\n                                >\n                                    <div className=\"w-16 h-16 rounded-full p-[2px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-500 to-yellow-500\">\n                                        <div className=\"w-full h-full rounded-full border-2 border-white overflow-hidden\">\n                                            <img src={r.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\" alt={r.name} />\n                                        </div>\n                                    </div>\n                                    <span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-600 truncate w-full text-center\">{r.name}</span>\n                                </button>\n                            ))}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n\n                {/* FILTERS */}\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-3 mb-6 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-1\">\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)}\n                        className={`flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-bold text-sm shadow-sm transition-all border whitespace-nowrap ${urgentMode ? 'bg-red-500 text-white border-red-500 animate-pulse-fast' : 'bg-white text-gray-700 border-gray-200'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Zap size={16} className={`mr-1 ${urgentMode ? 'fill-white' : 'fill-none'}`} />\n                        Urgent - J'ai faim !\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍖 Grillades</button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍗 Poulet</button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* CONTENT */}\n                {viewMode === 'list' ? (\n                    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                        {filteredRestaurants.map(restaurant => (\n                            <RestaurantCard \n                                key={restaurant.id} \n                                restaurant={restaurant} \n                                onClick={() => { setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant); setViewMode('restaurant_detail'); }} \n                            />\n                        ))}\n                        {filteredRestaurants.length === 0 && (\n                            <div className=\"text-center py-10 text-gray-500\">\n                                <p>Aucun restaurant trouvé {selectedCity !== 'Toutes' ? `à ${selectedCity}` : ''} {searchQuery ? `pour \"${searchQuery}\"` : ''} :(</p>\n                                {urgentMode && <button onClick={() => setUrgentMode(false)} className=\"text-brand-500 underline mt-2\">Désactiver le mode urgent</button>}\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n                    </div>\n                ) : (\n                    <MapView \n                        restaurants={filteredRestaurants} \n                        userLocation={userState.location} \n                        onSelect={(r) => { setSelectedRestaurant(r); setViewMode('restaurant_detail'); }}\n                    />\n                )}\n            </>\n        ) : viewMode === 'restaurant_detail' && selectedRestaurant ? CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin, Mail, Phone } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [phone, setPhone] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleOAuthLogin = async (provider: 'google' | 'facebook') => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_pending_auth', JSON.stringify({ \n          role, \n          city,\n      }));\n\n      const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({\n        provider: provider,\n        options: {\n          redirectTo: window.location.origin,\n          queryParams: {\n            access_type: 'offline',\n            prompt: 'consent',\n          }\n        }\n      });\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"OAuth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Erreur de connexion sociale\");\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (loading) return;\n    \n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        // 1. Create Auth User\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            data: { full_name: name, role: role, city: city }, // Metadata fallback\n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 2. Create Profile in DB with phone number explicitely\n          // We wait for this to finish to ensure consistency\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').insert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city,\n            phone_number: phone\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             console.error(\"Erreur création profil:\", profileError);\n             // On ne bloque pas tout si le profil échoue (peut-être déjà créé par trigger), \n             // mais on loggue l'erreur.\n             if (!profileError.message.includes('duplicate key')) {\n                 throw new Error(\"Erreur lors de la création du profil utilisateur.\");\n             }\n          }\n\n          // 3. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30,\n              phone_number: phone // Set restaurant phone number to owner's phone initially\n            });\n            if (restoError) {\n                console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n            }\n          }\n          \n          // Si inscription réussie mais pas de session auto (ex: email confirm), on prévient\n          if (!authData.session) {\n              setError(\"Compte créé ! Veuillez vérifier vos emails pour confirmer votre adresse avant de vous connecter.\");\n              setIsLogin(true);\n              setLoading(false);\n              return;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // MAPPING DES ERREURS SUPABASE\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives de connexion. Pour votre sécurité, veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect. Vérifiez vos identifiants.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"email not confirmed\")) {\n        message = \"Votre adresse email n'a pas encore été confirmée. Veuillez vérifier votre boîte de réception (et vos spams).\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already exists\")) {\n        message = \"Cette adresse email est déjà associée à un compte. Essayez de vous connecter.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe est trop court. Il doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"fetch failed\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"network request failed\")) {\n        message = \"Problème de connexion internet. Vérifiez votre réseau.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"p-6 pb-2\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n                {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n            </h2>\n\n            {/* Social Login Buttons */}\n            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-6\">\n                <button \n                    type=\"button\"\n                    onClick={() => handleOAuthLogin('google')}\n                    className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-2.5 px-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors bg-white text-gray-700 font-bold text-sm\"\n                >\n                    Google\n                </button>\n                <button \n                    type=\"button\"\n                    onClick={() => handleOAuthLogin('facebook')}\n                    className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-2.5 px-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg         </div>\n\n            <div className=\"relative flex items-center justify-center mb-6\">\n                <hr className=\"w-full border-gray-300\" />\n                <span
