} from '../utils/geo';\nimport { RestaurantCard } from '../components/RestaurantCard';\nimport { MapView } from '../components/MapView';\nimport { CartDrawer } from '../components/CartDrawer';\nimport { ChatWindow } from '../components/ChatWindow';\nimport { StoryViewer } from '../components/StoryViewer';\nimport { OrdersView } from '../components/OrdersView';\n\n// Speed constants\nconst SPEED_WALKING = 5;\nconst SPEED_MOTO = 30;\n\ninterface Props {\n  user: User;\n  allRestaurants: Restaurant[];\n  onLogout: () => void;\n}\n\nexport const CustomerView: React.FC<Props> = ({ user, allRestaurants, onLogout }) => {\n  // State\n  const [userState, setUserState] = useState<UserState>({\n    location: null,\n    locationError: null,\n    loadingLocation: true,\n  });\n  \n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [promotionsMap, setPromotionsMap] = useState<Record<string, Promotion[]>>({});\n  \n  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<ViewMode>('list');\n  const [selectedRestaurant, setSelectedRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [cart, setCart] = useState<CartItem[]>([]);\n  const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [urgentMode, setUrgentMode] = useState(false);\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n  const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [selectedCity, setSelectedCity] = useState<string>(user.city || 'Kinshasa');\n  \n  // Order States\n  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([]);\n  const [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const [activeStoryRestaurant, setActiveStoryRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant | null>(null);\n  const [storyStartIndex, setStoryStartIndex] = useState(0);\n\n  // Initial Geolocation\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In a real app, join query is better, but here we simulate or fetch separately\n      const { data } = await supabase.from('promotions').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      if (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)`)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    if (urgentMode) list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n          r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id,\n            restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId,\n            status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal,\n            items: cart // Supabase will stringify this automatically for jsonb\n        }).select().single();\n\n        if (error) {\n            console.error(\"Erreur commande:\", error);\n            throw new Error(\"Impossible d'envoyer la commande. Vérifiez votre connexion.\");\n        }\n\n        // Success Path\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setCart([]);\n        \n        // Optimistic UI update not needed here as we refetch orders in viewMode change\n        setTimeout(() => {\n             setShowSuccess(false);\n             setViewMode('orders');\n             fetchOrders(); // Refresh list from DB\n        }, 2000);\n\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        alert(err.message || \"Erreur inconnue lors de la commande.\");\n    } finally {\n        setIsCheckingOut(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Get list of restaurants that have promotions\n  const restaurantsWithStories = restaurants.filter(r => promotionsMap[r.id] && promotionsMap[r.id].length > 0);\n\n  return (\n    // AJOUT DE 'transform-gpu' POUR FORCER LE RENDU PIXEL-PERFECT ET ÉVITER LE FLOU SUR LES MARGES AUTO\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative transform-gpu\">\n      \n      {/* STORY VIEWER OVERLAY */}\n      {activeStoryRestaurant && promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id] && (\n          <StoryViewer \n            restaurant={activeStoryRestaurant}\n            promotions={promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id]}\n            onClose={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(null)}\n            onVisitRestaurant={() => {\n                setActiveStoryRestaurant(null);\n                setSelectedRestaurant(activeStoryRestaurant);\n                setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n            }}\n            initialIndex={storyStartIndex}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* CHAT OVERLAY */}\n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'client' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-[60] bg-brand-500 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white p-6 text-center animate-fade-in\">\n           <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Vous pouvez suivre le statut dans \"Commandes\"</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black text-brand-600 tracking-tight mr-2\">DashMeals</h1>\n                <span className=\"text-xs bg-brand-100 text-brand-800 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-bold\">Client</span>\n            </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">{cart.length}</span>}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500\">\n                <LogOut size={20} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        {(viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map') && (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1 flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg truncate\">\n                <MapPin size={14} className=\"mr-1.5 text-brand-500 flex-shrink-0\" />\n                <span className=\"truncate\">{userState.locationError ? \"Mode Démo\" : \"Ma Position\"}</span>\n                </div>\n                <select className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-700 text-xs font-bold py-2 pl-2 pr-6 rounded-lg border border-brand-200 outline-none appearance-none\" value={selectedCity} onChange={(e) => setSelectedCity(e.target.value)}>\n                <option value=\"Toutes\">Toutes les villes</option>\n                {CITIES_RDC.map(city => <option key={city} value={city}>{city}</option>)}\n                </select>\n            </div>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* MAIN CONTENT AREA */}\n      <main className=\"p-4 pt-2\">\n        \n        {viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'map' ? (\n            <>\n                {/* SEARCH BAR - Moved to Top */}\n                <div className=\"mb-4 relative z-20\">\n                    <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400\" size={18} />\n                    <input \n                        type=\"text\"\n                        placeholder=\"Rechercher un restaurant par nom...\"\n                        className=\"w-full pl-10 pr-10 py-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none text-sm bg-white shadow-sm transition-shadow focus:shadow-md\"\n                        value={searchQuery}\n                        onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                    />\n                    {searchQuery && (\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => setSearchQuery('')} \n                        className=\"absolute right-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 p-1\"\n                      >\n                        <X size={16} />\n                      </button>\n                    )}\n                </div>\n\n                {/* STORIES BAR (Professional Look) - Hidden during search */}\n                {!searchQuery && restaurantsWithStories.length > 0 && (\n                    <div className=\"mb-6 -mx-4 px-4 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar\">\n                        <div className=\"flex space-x-4\">\n                            {restaurantsWithStories.map(r => (\n                                <button \n                                    key={r.id} \n                                    onClick={() => {\n                                        setStoryStartIndex(0);\n                                        setActiveStoryRestaurant(r);\n                                    }}\n                                    className=\"flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 min-w-[64px]\"\n                                >\n                                    <div className=\"w-16 h-16 rounded-full p-[2px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-brand-500 to-yellow-500\">\n                                        <div className=\"w-full h-full rounded-full border-2 border-white overflow-hidden\">\n                                            <img src={r.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\" alt={r.name} />\n                                        </div>\n                                    </div>\n                                    <span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-600 truncate w-full text-center\">{r.name}</span>\n                                </button>\n                            ))}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n\n                {/* FILTERS */}\n                <div className=\"flex space-x-3 mb-6 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar pb-1\">\n                    <button \n                        onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)}\n                        className={`flex items-center px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-bold text-sm shadow-sm transition-all border whitespace-nowrap ${urgentMode ? 'bg-red-500 text-white border-red-500 animate-pulse-fast' : 'bg-white text-gray-700 border-gray-200'}`}\n                    >\n                        <Zap size={16} className={`mr-1 ${urgentMode ? 'fill-white' : 'fill-none'}`} />\n                        Urgent - J'ai faim !\n                    </button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍖 Grillades</button>\n                    <button className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap shadow-sm\">🍗 Poulet</button>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* CONTENT */}\n                {viewMode === 'list' ? (\n                    <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                        {filteredRestaurants.map(restaurant => (\n                            <RestaurantCard \n                                key={restaurant.id} \n                                restaurant={restaurant} \n                                onClick={() => { setSelectedRestaurant(restaurant); setViewMode('restaurant_detail'); }} \n                            />\n                        ))}\n                        {filteredRestaurants.length === 0 && (\n                            <div className=\"text-center py-10 text-gray-500\">\n                                <p>Aucun restaurant trouvé {selectedCity !== 'Toutes' ? `à ${selectedCity}` : ''} {searchQuery ? `pour \"${searchQuery}\"` : ''} :(</p>\n                                {urgentMode && <button onClick={() => setUrgentMode(false)} className=\"text-brand-500 underline mt-2\">Désactiver le mode urgent</button>}\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n                    </div>\n                ) : (\n                    <MapView \n                        restaurants={filteredRestaurants} \n                        userLocation={userState.location} \n                        onSelect={(r) => { setSelectedRestaurant(r); setViewMode('restaurant_detail'); }}\n                    />\n                )}\n            </>\n        ) : viewMode === 'restaurant_detail' && selectedRestaurant ? (\n            <div className=\"animate-in slide-in-from-right duration-300\">\n                <button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className=\"mb-4 flex items-center text-gray-600 font-medium hover:text-brand-600\"><ArrowLeft size={18} className=\"mr-1\" /> Retour</button>\n                <div className=\"bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden mb-6\">\n                    <img src={selectedRestaurant.coverImage} className=\"w-full h-48 object-cover\" alt=\"Cover\" />\n                    <div className=\"p-4\">\n                        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-start\">\n                           <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900\">{selectedRestaurant.name}</h1>\n                           <span className=\"text-xs bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg\">{selectedRestaurant.city}</span>\n                        </div>\n                        <p className=\"text-gray-500 mb-4 mt-2\">{selectedRestaurant.description}</p>\n                        \n                        {/* Info & Contact Section */}\n                        <div className=\"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-xl mb-4 border border-gray-100\">\n                            <h3 className=\"text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 mb-3 flex items-center\"><Info size={16} className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\"/> Informations & Contact</h3>\n                            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n                                <div className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-gray-600\">\n                                    <MapPin size={16} className=\"mr-2 text-gray-400\"/>\n                                    <span>{selectedRestaurant.city || 'Kinshasa'}</span>\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between\">\n                                    <div className=\"flex items-center text-sm text-gray-600\">\n                                        <Phone size={16} className=\"mr-2 text-gray-400\"/>\n                                        <span>{selectedRestaurant.phoneNumber || 'Numéro non disponible'}</span>\n                                    </div>\n                                    {selectedRestaurant.phoneNumber && (\n                                        <button \n                                            onClick={() => window.open(`tel:${selectedRestaurant.phoneNumber}`)}\n                                            className=\"bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold flex items-center shadow-md transition-transform active:scale-95\"\n                                        >\n                                            <Phone size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> Appeler\n                                        </button>\n                                    )}\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-4 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n                            <span className=\"flex items-center bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1 rounded\"><Navigation size={14} className=\"mr-1\"/> {formatDistance(selectedRestaurant.distance || 0)}</span>\n                            <span className=\"flex items-center bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1 rounded\"><Zap size={14} className=\"mr-1 text-yellow-500\"/> {selectedRestaurant.preparationTime} min</span>\n                        </div>\n\n                        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-2\">\n                             <div className=\"flex items-center p-3 bg-orange-50 rounded-lg text-orange-700 border border-orange-100\">\n                                <Bike size={20} className=\"mr-3\" />\n                                <div><p className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-70\">En Moto</p><p className=\"font-bold text-lg leading-none\">{selectedRestaurant.timeMoto ? formatTime(selectedRestaurant.timeMoto) : '--'}</p></div>\n                            </div>\n                            <div className=\"flex items-center p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg text-blue-700 border border-blue-100\">\n                                <Footprints size={20} className=\"mr-3\" />\n                                <div><p className=\"text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider opacity-70\">À pied</p><p className=\"font-bold text-lg leading-none\">{selectedRestaurant.timeWalking ? formatTime(selectedRestaurant.timeWalking) : '--'}</p></div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n\n                {/* GALLERY SECTION (NEW) */}\n                {promotionsMap[selectedRestaurant.id] && promotionsMap[selectedRestaurant.id].length > 0 && (\n                    <div className=\"mb-6\">\n                        <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-3 text-gray-800 flex items-center\">\n                            <ImageIcon className=\"mr-2 text-brand-600\" size={18} />\n                            Galerie ({promotionsMap[selectedRestaurant.id].length})\n                        </h3>\n                        <div className=\"grid grid-cols-3 gap-2\">\n                            {promotionsMap[selectedRestaurant.id].map((item, idx) => (\n                                <button\n                                    key={item.id}\n                                    onClick={() => {\n                                        setStoryStartIndex(idx);\n                                        setActiveStoryRestaurant(selectedRestaurant);\n                                    }}\n                                    className=\"relative aspect-square rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm border border-gray-100 group\"\n                                >\n                                    {item.mediaType === 'video' ? (\n                                        <>\n                                            <video src={item.mediaUrl} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover opacity-90\" muted />\n                                            <div className=\"absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/20 group-hover:bg-black/40 transition-colors\">\n                                                <PlayCircle className=\"text-white opacity-90\" size={24} />\n                                            </div>\n                                        </>\n                                    ) : (\n                                        <img src={item.mediaUrl} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-110\" alt=\"Gallery\" />\n                                    )}\n                                </button>\n                            ))}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n\n                <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-3\">Menu</h3>\n                <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                    {selectedRestaurant.menu.map(item => (\n                        <div key={item.id} className=\"bg-white p-3 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm flex space-x-3\">\n                            <img src={item.image} className=\"w-20 h-20 rounded-lg object-cover bg-gray-100\" alt={item.name} />\n                            <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col justify-between\">\n                                <div>\n                                    <h4 className=\"font-bold text-gray-800\">{item.name}</h4>\n                                    <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-1\">{item.description}</p>\n                                </div>\n                                <div className=\"flex justify-between items-end mt-2\">\n                                    <span className=\"font-bold text-brand-600\">${item.price.toFixed(2)}</span>\n                                    <button onClick={() => addToCart(item, selectedRestaurant)} className=\"bg-brand-50 text-brand-600 p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-brand-100 transition-colors\"><Plus size={16} /></button>\n                                </div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    ))}\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        ) : viewMode === 'orders' ? (\n            <OrdersView \n                orders={orders} \n                onChat={(order) => setActiveChatOrder(order)} \n                onBrowse={() => setViewMode('list')} \n            />\n        ) : null}\n      </main>\n\n      <nav className=\"fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 px-6 py-3 flex justify-around items-center z-40 max-w-md mx-auto\">\n        <button onClick={() => setViewMode('list')} className={`flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 ${viewMode === 'list' || viewMode === 'restaurant_detail' ? 'text-brand-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}><List size={22} /><span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium\">Liste</span></button>\n        <div className=\"relative -top-6\"><button onClick={() => setUrgentMode(!urgentMode)} className={`w-14 h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg border-4 border-gray-50 transition-all ${urgentMode ? 'bg-red-500 text-white scale-110' : 'bg-brand-500 text-white'}`}><Zap size={24} className={urgentMode ? 'animate-pulse' : ''} /></button></div>\n        <button onClick={() => setViewMode('map')} className={`flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 ${viewMode === 'map' ? 'text-brand-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}><Map size={22} /><span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium\">Carte</span></button>\n        <button onClick={() => setViewMode('orders')} className={`flex flex-col items-center space-y-1 ${viewMode === 'orders' ? 'text-brand-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}><Receipt size={22} /><span className=\"text-[10px] font-medium\">Commandes</span></button>\n      </nav>\n\n      <CartDrawer isOpen={isCartOpen} onClose={() => setIsCartOpen(false)} items={cart} onRemove={removeFromCart} onCheckout={handleCheckout} total={cartTotal} isLoading={isCheckingOut} />\n    </div>\n  );\n};"
              "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { Restaurant, MenuItem, User, Order, OrderStatus, Management State\n  const [isAddingItem, setIsAddingItem] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [updatingTimes, setUpdatingTimes] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Marketing State\n  const [promotions, setPromotions] = useState<Promotion[]>([]);\n  const [newPromoUrl, setNewPromoUrl] = useState('');\n  const [newPromoType, setNewPromoType] = useState<'image' | 'video'>('image');\n  const [newPromoCaption, setNewPromoCaption] = useState('');\n  const [isAddingPromo, setIsAddingPromo] = useState(false);\n  const [promoFile, setPromoFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n  \n  // Settings State\n  const [settingsForm, setSettingsForm] = useState({\n      name: restaurant.name,\n      description: restaurant.description,\n      coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n      city: restaurant.city,\n      phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n  });\n  const [isSavingSettings, setIsSavingSettings] = useState(false);\n  const [coverImageFile, setCoverImageFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n\n  // Time editing state\n  const [prepTime, setPrepTime] = useState(restaurant.preparationTime.toString());\n  const [deliveryTime, setDeliveryTime] = useState(restaurant.estimatedDeliveryTime.toString());\n\n  // New Item State\n  const [newItemName, setNewItemName] = useState('');\n  const [newItemDesc, setNewItemDesc] = useState('');\n  const [newItemPrice, setNewItemPrice] = useState('');\n  const [newItemCategory, setNewItemCategory] = useState<MenuItem['category']>('plat');\n  const [newItemImageFile, setNewItemImageFile] = useState<File | null>(null);\n\n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Load orders and promotions\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchRestaurantOrders();\n    fetchPromotions();\n    \n    // Subscribe to REALTIME orders\n    const channel = supabase\n      .channel('orders-dashboard')\n      .on(\n        'postgres_changes',\n        {\n          event: '*', // Listen to INSERT and UPDATE\n          schema: 'public',\n          table: 'orders',\n          filter: `restaurant_id=eq.${restaurant.id}`,\n        },\n        (payload) => {\n          console.log(\"Mise à jour commande reçue:\", payload);\n          // On recharge tout pour avoir les relations (infos client)\n          fetchRestaurantOrders();\n          \n          if (payload.eventType === 'INSERT') {\n             // Play notification sound\n             const audio = new Audio('https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2869/2869-preview.mp3');\n             audio.play().catch(e => console.log(\"Audio play failed\", e));\n             alert(\"🔔 Nouvelle commande reçue !\");\n          }\n        }\n      )\n      .subscribe();\n\n    return () => {\n        supabase.removeChannel(channel);\n    };\n  }, [restaurant.id]); // Re-run if restaurant ID changes\n\n  // Sync settings form if restaurant prop changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n      setSettingsForm({\n          name: restaurant.name,\n          description: restaurant.description,\n          coverImage: restaurant.coverImage,\n          city: restaurant.city,\n          phoneNumber: restaurant.phoneNumber || ''\n      });\n  }, [restaurant]);\n\n  // UPLOAD HELPER FUNCTION\n  const uploadImage = async (file: File, bucket: string = 'images'): Promise<string | null> => {\n      try {\n          const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();\n          const fileName = `${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15)}_${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;\n          const filePath = `${fileName}`;\n\n          const { error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage.from(bucket).upload(filePath, file);\n\n          if (uploadError) {\n              console.error(\"Upload error:\", uploadError);\n              alert(\"Erreur upload image (Vérifiez que le bucket 'images' existe dans Supabase)\");\n              return null;\n          }\n\n          const { data } = supabase.storage.from(bucket).getPublicUrl(filePath);\n          return data.publicUrl;\n      } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"Upload exception:\", error);\n          return null;\n      }\n  };\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('promotions')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      \n      if (data) {\n        setPromotions(data.map((p: any) => ({\n          id: p.id,\n          restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n          mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n          mediaType: p.media_type,\n          caption: p.caption,\n          createdAt: p.created_at\n        })));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Promotions fetch error (likely 403 in demo)\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurantOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, profiles:user_id(full_name, id, phone_number)`) // Retrieve phone_number from profile\n            .eq('restaurant_id', restaurant.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             console.warn(\"Fetch orders failed:\", error.message);\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n string, newStatus: OrderStatus) => {\n    try {\n        const { error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .update({ status: newStatus })\n            .eq('id', orderId);\n\n        if (error) {\n            alert(\"Erreur lors de la mise à jour du statut\");\n        } else {\n            // Optimistic update\n            setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === orderId ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error updating status:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addPromotion = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    let urlToUse = newPromoUrl;\n\n    if (promoFile) {\n        const uploaded = await uploadImage(promoFile);\n        if (uploaded) {\n            urlToUse = uploaded;\n        } else {\n            setLoading(false);\n            return;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!urlToUse) {\n        alert(\"Veuillez fournir une URL ou un fichier.\");\n        setLoading(false);\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    const payload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      media_url: urlToUse,\n      media_type: newPromoType,\n      caption: newPromoCaption\n    };\n\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('promotions').insert(payload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      \n      if (data) {\n        const newPromo: Promotion = {\n          id: data.id,\n          restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n          mediaUrl: data.media_url,\n          mediaType: data.media_type,\n          caption: data.caption,\n          createdAt: data.created_at\n        };\n        setPromotions([newPromo, ...promotions]);\n        setNewPromoUrl('');\n        setNewPromoCaption('');\n        setPromoFile(null);\n        setIsAddingPromo(false);\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(\"Error adding promo:\", err);\n      // Demo logic\n      const mockPromo: Promotion = {\n        id: Date.now().toString(),\n        restaurantId: restaurant.id,\n        mediaUrl: urlToUse,\n        mediaType: newPromoType,\n        caption: newPromoCaption,\n        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n      };\n      setPromotions([mockPromo, ...promotions]);\n      setNewPromoUrl('');\n      setNewPromoCaption('');\n      setPromoFile(null);\n      setIsAddingPromo(false);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const deletePromotion = async (id: string) => {\n    if (!confirm(\"Supprimer cette publicité ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      await supabase.from('promotions').delete().eq('id', id);\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    } catch (err) {\n      setPromotions(promotions.filter(p => p.id !== id));\n    }\n  };\n\n  const updateTimes = async () => {\n    setUpdatingTimes(true);\n    try {\n      const newPrep = parseInt(prepTime) || 0;\n      const newDeliv = parseInt(deliveryTime) || 0;\n\n      const { error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .update({ preparation_time: newPrep, estimated_delivery_time: newDeliv })\n        .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: newPrep, estimatedDeliveryTime: newDeliv });\n      alert(\"Temps mis à jour !\");\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, preparationTime: parseInt(prepTime), estimatedDeliveryTime: parseInt(deliveryTime) });\n    } finally { setUpdatingTimes(false); }\n  };\n\n  const toggleOpen = async () => {\n    try {\n      const newState = !restaurant.isOpen;\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants').update({ is_open: newState }).eq('id', restaurant.id);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: newState });\n    } catch (err) {\n        onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, isOpen: !restaurant.isOpen });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveSettings = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      setIsSavingSettings(true);\n      \n      let imageUrl = settingsForm.coverImage;\n\n      if (coverImageFile) {\n          const uploadedUrl = await uploadImage(coverImageFile);\n          if (uploadedUrl) {\n              imageUrl = uploadedUrl;\n          }\n      }\n\n      const updatePayload = {\n          name: settingsForm.name,\n          description: settingsForm.description,\n          cover_image: imageUrl, // Mapping explicite vers la colonne snake_case\n          city: settingsForm.city,\n          phone_number: settingsForm.phoneNumber // Mapping explicite vers la colonne snake_case\n      };\n\n      try {\n          const { error } = await supabase.from('restaurants')\n            .update(updatePayload)\n            .eq('id', restaurant.id);\n\n          if(error) {\n              console.error(\"Supabase Error:\", error);\n              throw error;\n          }\n          \n          // Mise à jour de l'état local immédiatement pour reflet UI\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ \n              ...restaurant, \n              name: settingsForm.name,\n              description: setCoverImageFile(null);\n          alert(\"✅ Paramètres enregistrés avec succès !\");\n      } catch (err: any) {\n          console.error(\"Error Saving Settings:\", err);\n          alert(`Erreur de sauvegarde: ${err.message || 'Problème de connexion'}`);\n          // On tente quand même de mettre à jour localement si c'est le mode démo/offline\n          onUpdateRestaurant({ \n              ...restaurant, \n              name: settingsForm.name,\n              description: settingsForm.description,\n              city: settingsForm.city,\n              phoneNumber: settingsForm.phoneNumber,\n              coverImage: imageUrl \n          });\n      } finally { \n          setIsSavingSettings(false); \n      }\n  };\n\n  const deleteItem = async (itemId: string) => {\n    if (!window.confirm(\"Supprimer cet élément ?\")) return;\n    try {\n      const { error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').delete().eq('id', itemId);\n      if (error) throw error;\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    } catch (err) {\n       onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: restaurant.menu.filter(m => m.id !== itemId) });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const addItem = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    const price = parseFloat(newItemPrice);\n    \n    let imageUrl = `https://picsum.photos/200/200?random=${Date.now()}`;\n    if (newItemImageFile) {\n        const uploadedUrl = await uploadImage(newItemImageFile);\n        if (uploadedUrl) imageUrl = uploadedUrl;\n    }\n\n    const newItemPayload = {\n      restaurant_id: restaurant.id,\n      name: newItemName,\n      description: newItemDesc,\n      price: price,\n      category: newItemCategory,\n      is_available: true,\n      image: imageUrl\n    };\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase.from('menu_items').insert(newItemPayload).select().single();\n      if (error) throw error;\n      if (data) {\n        const newItem: MenuItem = {\n          id: data.id, name: data.name, description: data.description, price: data.price,\n          category: data.category as any, MenuItem = {\n          id: `mock-item-${Date.now()}`, name: newItemName, description: newItemDesc, price: price,\n          category: newItemCategory, isAvailable: true, image: newItemPayload.image\n      };\n      onUpdateRestaurant({ ...restaurant, menu: [...restaurant.menu, mockItem] });\n    } finally {\n      setNewItemName(''); setNewItemDesc(''); setNewItemPrice(''); setIsAddingItem(false);      </div>\n                  <button onClick={() => setActiveView('orders')} className=\"w-full mt-4 text-brand-600 text-sm font-bold hover:underline\">\n                      Voir toutes les     <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800\">Menu & Carte</h2>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => <Plus size={18} className=\"mr-2\" /> Ajouter un plat\n        </button>\n      </div>\n\n      {isAddingItem && (\n        <form onSubmit={addItem} className=\"bg-brand-50 p-6 rounded-2xl border <input\n                type=\"number\"\n                step=\"0.1\"\n                required\n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: 15.0\"\n                value={newItemPrice}\n                onChange={e => setNewItemPrice(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Description</label>\n              <textarea\n                className=\"w-full p-3 border      />\n            </div>\n            \n            <div className=\"md:col-span-2\">\n                 <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 mb-1\">Photo du plat</label>\n [isCheckingOut, setIsCheckingOut] = useState(false);\n  \n  // Chat State\n  const [activeChatOrder, setActiveChatOrder] = useState<Order | null>(null);\n\n  // Story State\n  const   if (!navigator.geolocation) {\n      setUserState({\n        location: null,\n        locationError: \"La géolocalisation n'est pas supportée par votre navigateur\",\n        loadingLocation: false\n      });\n      return;\n    }\n\n    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(\n      (position) => {\n        setUserState({\n          location: {\n            latitude: position.coords.latitude,\n            longitude: position.coords.longitude,\n          },\n          locationError: null,\n          loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      (error) => {\n        console.warn(\"Geo error:\", error);\n        setUserState({\n            location: {\n                latitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LAT,\n                longitude: KINSHASA_CENTER_LNG\n            },\n            locationError: \"Position introuvable. Utilisation de la position par défaut (Kinshasa).\",\n            loadingLocation: false\n        });\n      },\n      { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000, maximumAge: 0 }\n    );\n  }, []);\n\n  // Update Restaurants when location or database changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (userState.location) {\n      const updatedRestaurants = allRestaurants.map(r => {\n        const dist = getDistanceFromLatLonInKm(\n          userState.location!.latitude,\n          userState.location!.longitude,\n          r.latitude,\n          r.longitude\n        );\n        return {\n          ...r,\n          distance: dist,\n          timeWalking: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_WALKING),\n          timeMoto: calculateTime(dist, SPEED_MOTO),\n        };\n      }).sort((a, b) => (a.distance || 0) - (b.distance || 0));\n\n      setRestaurants(updatedRestaurants);\n      // Fetch promotions after restaurants are ready\n      fetchPromotions(updatedRestaurants);\n    } else {\n      setRestaurants(allRestaurants);\n      fetchPromotions(allRestaurants);\n    }\n  }, [userState.location, allRestaurants]);\n\n  // Realtime Orders Subscription for Customer\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const channel = supabase\n        .channel('customer-orders')\n        .on(\n            'postgres_changes',\n            {\n                event: 'UPDATE', // On écoute quand le restaurant change le statut\n                schema: 'public',\n                table: 'orders',\n                filter: `user_id=eq.${user.id}`\n            },\n            (payload) => {\n                console.log(\"Mise à jour commande client:\", payload);\n                // On met à jour l'état local pour voir le changement instantanément\n                setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => \n                    o.id === payload.new.id ? { ...o, status: payload.new.status } : o\n                ));\n            }\n        )\n        .subscribe();\n\n    return () => {\n        supabase.removeChannel(channel);\n    };\n  }, [user.id]);\n\n  const fetchPromotions = async (restos: Restaurant[]) => {\n      // In a real app, join query is better, but here we simulate or fetch separately\n      const { data } = await supabase.from('promotions').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n      if (data) {\n          const mapping: Record<string, Promotion[]> = {};\n          data.forEach((p: any) => {\n              if (!mapping[p.restaurant_id]) mapping[p.restaurant_id] = [];\n              mapping[p.restaurant_id].push({\n                  id: p.id,\n                  restaurantId: p.restaurant_id,\n                  mediaUrl: p.media_url,\n                  mediaType: p.media_type,\n                  caption: p.caption,\n                  createdAt: p.created_at\n              });\n          });\n          setPromotionsMap(mapping);\n      }\n  };\n\n  // Load Orders when entering 'orders' view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (viewMode === 'orders') {\n        fetchOrders();\n    }\n  }, [viewMode]);\n\n  const fetchOrders = async () => {\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('orders')\n            .select(`*, restaurant:restaurants(name, phone_number)`)\n            .eq('user_id', user.id)\n            .order('created_at', { ascending: false });\n\n        if (error) {\n             const localOrders = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_mock_orders');\n             if (localOrders) setOrders(JSON.parse(localOrders));\n             return;\n        }\n        \n        if (data) {\n            setOrders(data.map((o: any) => ({\n                id: o.id,\n                userId: o.user_id,\n                restaurantId: o.restaurant_id,\n                status: o.status,\n                totalAmount: o.total_amount,\n                items: o.items,\n                createdAt: o.created_at,\n                restaurant: {\n                    name: o.restaurant?.name || 'Inconnu',\n                    phone_number: o.restaurant?.phone_number\n                }\n            })));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"Error fetching orders:\", err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Filter Logic (City + Urgent + Search)\n  const filteredRestaurants = useMemo(() => {\n    let list = restaurants;\n    if (selectedCity && selectedCity !== 'Toutes') list = list.filter(r => r.city === selectedCity);\n    if (urgentMode) list = list.filter(r => r.isOpen && r.preparationTime <= 20);\n    if (searchQuery) {\n        const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n        list = list.filter(r => \n          r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) || \n          r.description.toLowerCase().includes(query)\n        );\n    }\n    return list;\n  }, [restaurants, urgentMode, selectedCity, searchQuery]);\n\n  // Cart Logic\n  const addToCart = (item: MenuItem, restaurant: Restaurant) => {\n    if (cart.length > 0 && cart[0].restaurantId !== restaurant.id) {\n        if(!window.confirm(\"Vous ne pouvez commander que dans un restaurant à la fois. Vider le panier actuel ?\")) return;\n        setCart([]);\n    }\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const existing = prev.find(i => i.id === item.id);\n        if (existing) return prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i);\n        return [...prev, { ...item, quantity: 1, restaurantId: restaurant.id, restaurantName: restaurant.name }];\n    });\n  };\n\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) => {\n    setCart(prev => {\n        const index = prev.findIndex(i => i.id === itemId);\n        if (index > -1) {\n            const newArr = [...prev];\n            newArr.splice(index, 1);\n            return newArr;\n        }\n        return prev;\n    });\n  };\n\n  const cartTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);\n\n  const handleCheckout = async () => {\n    if (cart.length === 0) return;\n    setIsCheckingOut(true);\n\n    try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase.from('orders').insert({\n            user_id: user.id,\n            restaurant_id: cart[0].restaurantId,\n            status: 'pending',\n            total_amount: cartTotal,\n            items: cart // Supabase will stringify this automatically for jsonb\n        }).select().single();\n\n        if (error) {\n            console.error(\"Erreur commande:\", error);\n            throw new Error(\"Impossible d'envoyer la commande. Vérifiez votre connexion.\");\n        }\n\n        // Success Path\n        setIsCartOpen(false);\n        setShowSuccess(true);\n        setCart([]);\n        \n        // Redirection rapide vers l'historique pour voir le suivi\n        setTimeout(() => {\n             setShowSuccess(false);\n             setViewMode('orders');\n             // fetchOrders sera appelé par le useEffect du viewMode\n        }, 2000);\n\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        alert(err.message || \"Erreur inconnue lors de la commande.\");\n    } finally {\n        setIsCheckingOut(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Views\n  if (userState.loadingLocation) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"w-16 h-16 border-4 border-brand-500 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin\"></div>\n        <p className=\"mt-4 text-brand-800 font-medium\">Localisation en cours...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Get list of restaurants that have promotions\n  const restaurantsWithStories = restaurants.filter(r => promotionsMap[r.id] && promotionsMap[r.id].length > 0);\n\n  return (\n    // AJOUT DE 'transform-gpu' POUR FORCER LE RENDU PIXEL-PERFECT ET ÉVITER LE FLOU SUR LES MARGES AUTO\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen pb-20 max-w-md mx-auto bg-gray-50 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden relative transform-gpu\">\n      \n      {/* STORY VIEWER OVERLAY */}\n      {activeStoryRestaurant && promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id] && (\n          <StoryViewer \n            restaurant={activeStoryRestaurant}\n            promotions={promotionsMap[activeStoryRestaurant.id]}\n            onClose={() => setActiveStoryRestaurant(null)}\n            onVisitRestaurant={() => {\n                setActiveStoryRestaurant(null);\n                setSelectedRestaurant(activeStoryRestaurant);\n                setViewMode('restaurant_detail');\n            }}\n            initialIndex={storyStartIndex}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* CHAT OVERLAY */}\n      {activeChatOrder && (\n          <ChatWindow \n            orderId={activeChatOrder.id}\n            currentUser={{ id: user.id, role: 'client' }}\n            otherUserName={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.name || 'Restaurant'}\n            otherUserPhone={activeChatOrder.restaurant?.phone_number || '+243999999999'}\n            onClose={() => setActiveChatOrder(null)}\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* SUCCESS OVERLAY */}\n      {showSuccess && (\n        <div className=\"absolute inset-0 justify-center mb-6 shadow-xl\">\n              <ShoppingBag className=\"text-brand-500\" size={40} />\n           </div>\n           <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-bold mb-2\">Commande Reçue !</h2>\n           <p className=\"text-brand-100\">Votre repas est en préparation.</p>\n           <div className=\"mt-8 bg-white/20 p-4 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm\">\n             <p className=\"font-mono text-sm\">Redirection vers le suivi...</p>\n           </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* HEADER */}\n      <header className=\"bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-4 py-3 shadow-sm border-b border-gray-100\">\n        <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-2\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center\">\n                <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black     <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n            <button onClick={() => setIsCartOpen(true)} className=\"relative p-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors\">\n                <ShoppingBag size={20} className=\"text-gray-700\" />\n                {cart.length > 0 && <span className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] font-bold h-4 w-4 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-white\">{cart.length}</span>}\n            </button>\n            <button onClick={onLogout} className=\"p-2 text-gray-400 <div className=\"flex items-center space-x-2\">\n                <div className=\"flex-1 flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded-lg truncate\">\n                <MapPin               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from '../lib/supabase';\nimport { User, UserRole, BusinessType } from '../types';\nimport { CITIES_RDC } from '../constants';\nimport { User as UserIcon, Store, AlertCircle, MapPin, Mail, Phone } from 'lucide-react';\n\ninterface Props {\n  onLogin: (user: User, businessData?: any) => void;\n}\n\nexport const AuthScreen: React.FC<Props> = ({ onLogin }) => {\n  const [isLogin, setIsLogin] = useState(true);\n  const [role, setRole] = useState<UserRole>('client');\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  \n  // Form States\n  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');\n  const [name, setName] = useState('');\n  const [phone, setPhone] = useState('');\n  const [city, setCity] = useState('Kinshasa');\n  const [availableCities, setAvailableCities] = useState<string[]>(CITIES_RDC);\n  \n  // Business Specific States\n  const [businessType, setBusinessType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [businessName, setBusinessName] = useState('');\n\n  // Fetch cities from DB on mount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchCities = async () => {\n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('cities')\n          .select('name')\n          .eq('is_active', true)\n          .order('name');\n        \n        if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {\n          setAvailableCities(data.map(c => c.name));\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.warn(\"Could not fetch cities from DB, using defaults\");\n      }\n    };\n    fetchCities();\n  }, []);\n\n  const handleOAuthLogin = async (provider: 'google' | 'facebook') => {\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      localStorage.setItem('dashmeals_pending_auth', JSON.stringify({ \n          role, \n          city,\n      }));\n\n      const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({\n        provider: provider,\n        options: {\n          redirectTo: window.location.origin,\n          queryParams: {\n            access_type: 'offline',\n            prompt: 'consent',\n          }\n        }\n      });\n      if (error) throw error;\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"OAuth Error:\", err);\n      setError(err.message || \"Erreur de connexion sociale\");\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (loading) return;\n    \n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      if (isLogin) {\n        // LOGIN\n        const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({\n          email,\n          password,\n        });\n        if (error) throw error;\n      } else {\n        // SIGN UP\n        // 1. Create Auth User\n        const { data: authData, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.signUp({\n          email,\n          password,\n          options: {\n            // On sauvegarde aussi les infos dans les métadonnées comme backup\n            data: { \n                full_name: name, \n                role: role, \n                city: city, \n                phone_number: phone \n            }, \n          }\n        });\n\n        if (authError) throw authError;\n        \n        if (authData.user) {\n          // 2. Create Profile in DB using UPSERT to prevent conflicts\n          const { error: profileError } = await supabase.from('profiles').upsert({\n            id: authData.user.id,\n            role: role,\n            full_name: name,\n            city: city,\n            phone_number: phone\n          });\n          \n          if (profileError) {\n             console.warn(\"Avertissement création profil (Non bloquant):\", profileError);\n             // On ne throw PAS d'erreur ici car l'utilisateur est déjà créé dans Auth\n             // et l'application peut fonctionner avec les métadonnées ou le mode offline\n          }\n\n          // 3. If Business, Create Restaurant\n          if (role === 'business') {\n            const { error: restoError } = await supabase.from('restaurants').insert({\n              owner_id: authData.user.id,\n              name: businessName,\n              type: businessType,\n              city: city, \n              latitude: -4.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02, \n              longitude: 15.301 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n              description: `Bienvenue chez ${businessName}`,\n              cover_image: `https://picsum.photos/800/600?random=${Date.now()}`,\n              preparation_time: 30,\n              estimated_delivery_time: 30,\n              phone_number: phone // Set restaurant phone number to owner's phone initially\n            });\n            if (restoError) {\n                console.warn(\"Restaurant creation warning:\", restoError);\n            }\n          }\n          \n          // Si inscription réussie mais pas de session auto (ex: email confirm), on prévient\n          if (!authData.session) {\n              setError(\"Compte créé ! Veuillez vérifier vos emails pour confirmer votre adresse avant de vous connecter.\");\n              setIsLogin(true);\n              setLoading(false);\n              return;\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.error(\"Auth Error:\", err);\n      let message = err.message || \"Une erreur est survenue\";\n      const lowerMsg = message.toLowerCase();\n      \n      // MAPPING DES ERREURS SUPABASE\n      if (lowerMsg.includes(\"rate limit\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"too many requests\")) {\n        message = \"Trop de tentatives de connexion. Pour votre sécurité, veuillez patienter quelques minutes avant de réessayer.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"invalid login credentials\")) {\n        message = \"Email ou mot de passe incorrect. Vérifiez vos identifiants.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"email not confirmed\")) {\n        message = \"Votre adresse email n'a pas encore été confirmée. Veuillez vérifier votre boîte de réception (et vos spams).\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"user already registered\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"already exists\")) {\n        message = \"Cette adresse email est déjà associée à un compte. Essayez de vous connecter.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"password should be at least\")) {\n        message = \"Le mot de passe est trop court. Il doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.\";\n      } else if (lowerMsg.includes(\"fetch failed\") || lowerMsg.includes(\"network request failed\")) {\n        message = \"Problème de connexion internet. Vérifiez votre réseau.\";\n      }\n\n      setError(message);\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-brand-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n      <div className=\"bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden\">\n        \n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"bg-brand-600 p-6 text-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-white tracking-tight\">DashMeals<span className=\"text-brand-200 text-xs font-normal ml-1\">RDC</span></h1>\n          <p className=\"text-brand-100 mt-2\">La plateforme gourmande de Kinshasa</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Tabs */}\n        <div className=\"flex border-b\">\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('client')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'client' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <UserIcon size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Client\n          </button>\n          <button \n            type=\"button\"\n            onClick={() => setRole('business')}\n            className={`flex-1 py-4 text-sm font-bold flex items-center justify-center ${role === 'business' ? 'text-brand-600 border-b-2 border-brand-600 bg-brand-50' : 'text-gray-500'}`}\n          >\n            <Store size={18} className=\"mr-2\" />\n            Entreprise\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"p-6 pb-2\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 text-center mb-6\">\n                {isLogin ? 'Connexion' : 'Créer un compte'} {role === 'business' ? 'Partenaire' : ''}\n            </h2>\n\n            {/* Social Login Buttons */}\n            <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-6\">\n                <button \n                    type=\"button\"\n                    onClick={() => handleOAuthLogin('google')}\n                    className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-2.5 px-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors bg-white text-gray-700 font-bold text-sm\"\n                >\n                    Google\n                </button>\n                <button \n                    type=\"button\"\n                    onClick={() => handleOAuthLogin('facebook')}\n                    className=\"flex items-center justify-center py-2.5 px-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#1877F2] hover:text-white hover:border-[#1877F2] transition-colors bg-white text-gray-700 font-bold text-sm\"\n                >\n                    Facebook\n                </button>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"relative flex items-center justify-center mb-6\">\n                <hr className=\"w-full border-gray-300\" />\n                <span className=\"absolute bg-white px-3 text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium\">OU AVEC EMAIL</span>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"px-6 pb-6 space-y-4\">\n          \n          {error && (\n            <div className=\"bg-red-50 border border-red-100 text-red-600 p-4 rounded-xl text-sm animate-pulse flex items-start shadow-sm\">\n                 <AlertCircle size={18} className=\"mr-2 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5\" />\n                 <span className=\"font-medium leading-tight\">{error}</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Votre Nom complet</label>\n              <input \n                type=\"text\" \n                required \n                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                placeholder=\"Ex: Jean K.\"\n                value={name}\n                onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}\n              />\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n           {/* Phone Number Field */}\n           {!isLogin && (\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Numéro de téléphone</label>\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <Phone size={16} className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400\" />\n                <input \n                    type=\"tel\" \n                    required \n                    className=\"w-full p-3 pl-10 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                    placeholder=\"Ex: 0812345678\"\n                    value={phone}\n                    onChange={(e) => setPhone(e.target.value)}\n                />\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* City Selection for both Roles                  <option key={c} value={c} className=\"text-gray-900\">{c}</option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n             </div>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Business       <select \n                  className=\"w-full p-2 border border-gray-300 rounded bg-white text-gray-900\"\n                  value={businessType}\n                  onChange={(e) =>               "replacement": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { supabase } from './lib/supabase';\nimport { MOCK_RESTAURANTS } from './constants';\nimport { Restaurant, User, UserRole, MenuItem, BusinessType } from './types';\nimport { AuthScreen } from './components/AuthScreen';\nimport { CustomerView } from './components/CustomerView';\nimport { BusinessDashboard } from './components/BusinessDashboard';\nimport { AlertTriangle, Store, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react';\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([]);\n  const [currentUser, setCurrentUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [isOfflineMode, setIsOfflineMode] = useState(false);\n\n  // États pour la création manuelle de restaurant (Fallback)\n  const [newRestoName, setNewRestoName] = useState('');\n  const [newRestoType, setNewRestoType] = useState<BusinessType>('restaurant');\n  const [creationLoading, setCreationLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  // Initialisation et écoute de la session\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const initSession = async () => {\n        try {\n            const { data: { session }, error } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n            if (error) {\n                console.warn(\"Erreur session:\", error.message);\n                setIsOfflineMode(true);\n            }\n            if (session?.user) {\n                await fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n            }\n        } catch (err) {\n            console.error(\"Erreur init:\", err);\n            setIsOfflineMode(true);\n        } finally {\n            setLoading(false);\n        }\n    };\n\n    initSession();\n\n    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {\n      if (session?.user) {\n        fetchUserProfile(session.user.id, session.user.email!, session.user.user_metadata);\n      } else {\n        setCurrentUser(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    });\n\n    fetchRestaurants();\n\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  const fetchUserProfile = async (userId: string, email: string, metadata: any = {}) => {\n    try {\n      let { data: profile, error } = await supabase\n        .from('profiles')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', userId)\n        .maybeSingle();\n\n      if (error) {\n          console.warn(\"Erreur lecture profil (403/Offline):\", error.message);\n          setIsOfflineMode(true);\n      }\n\n      // Si pas de profil ou erreur, création profil mémoire\n      if (!profile) {\n        console.log(\"Utilisation profil mémoire...\");\n        \n        const pendingAuthDataStr = localStorage.getItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');\n        const pendingAuthData = pendingAuthDataStr ? JSON.parse(pendingAuthDataStr) : null;\n        if (pendingAuthData) localStorage.removeItem('dashmeals_pending_auth');\n\n        const defaultProfile = {\n            id: userId,\n            full_name: metadata?.full_name || metadata?.name || email.split('@')[0],\n            role: pendingAuthData?.role || metadata?.role || 'client', \n            city: pendingAuthData?.city || metadata?.city || 'Kinshasa',\n            phone_number: metadata?.phone_number || '' // Récupération du téléphone depuis les métadonnées\n        };\n\n        // On tente l'insert DB mais on ne bloque pas si ça échoue (403)\n        supabase.from('profiles').insert(defaultProfile).then(({ error }) => {\n            if (error) {\n                console.warn(\"Insert profil échoué, continué en mémoire\");\n                setIsOfflineMode(true);\n            }\n        });\n        \n        profile = defaultProfile;\n      }\n\n      if (profile) {\n        let businessId = undefined;\n        \n        if (profile.role === 'business') {\n          // Si business, on check si le resto existe\n          // En mode offline/403, on ne trouvera rien, donc l'UI Business demandera de créer\n          // C'est acceptable pour le mode dégradé\n          const { data: resto } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .select('id')\n            .eq('owner_id', userId)\n            .maybeSingle();\n            \n          if (resto) businessId = resto.id;\n        }\n\n        setCurrentUser({\n          id: userId,\n          email: email,\n          name: profile.full_name || 'Utilisateur',\n          role: profile.role as UserRole,\n          city: profile.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          phoneNumber: profile.phone_number,\n          businessId,\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Erreur critique profil:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRestaurants = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data, error } = await supabase\n        .from('restaurants')\n        .select(`*, menu_items (*)`);\n\n      if (error) throw error;\n\n      if (data && data.length > 0) {\n        const mappedRestaurants: Restaurant[] = data.map((r: any) => ({\n          id: r.id,\n          ownerId: r.owner_id,\n          type: r.type,\n          name: r.name,\n          description: r.description,\n          latitude: r.latitude,\n          longitude: r.longitude,\n          city: r.city || 'Kinshasa',\n          isOpen: r.is_open,\n          rating: r.rating,\n          reviewCount: r.review_count,\n          preparationTime: r.preparation_time,\n          estimatedDeliveryTime: r.estimated_delivery_time || 20,\n          deliveryAvailable: r.delivery_available,\n          coverImage: r.cover_image || 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?grayscale',\n          menu: (r.menu_items || []).map((m: any) => ({\n            id: m.id,\n            name: m.name,\n            description: m.description,\n            price: m.price,\n            image: m.image,\n            category: m.category,\n            isAvailable: m.is_available\n          }))\n        }));\n        setRestaurants(mappedRestaurants);\n        setIsOfflineMode(false); // Si ça marche, on n'est pas hors ligne\n      } else {\n        // DB vide ou connectée mais pas de données\n        // On pourrait laisser vide, mais pour la démo on remet les Mocks si vide\n        if (data && data.length === 0) {\n             console.log(\"DB vide, chargement Mocks...\");\n             setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.warn(\"Erreur chargement restaurants (403 probable). Utilisation des données MOCK.\");\n      setRestaurants(MOCK_RESTAURANTS);\n      setIsOfflineMode(true);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await supabase.auth.signOut();\n    setCurrentUser(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleUpdateRestaurant = async (updatedResto: Restaurant) => {\n    // Mise à jour de l'état local uniquement pour éviter les conflits et la latence\n    setRestaurants(prev => prev.map(r => r.id === updatedResto.id ? updatedResto : r));\n    // Nous ne rappelons PAS fetchRestaurants() ici pour laisser l'UI fluide\n    // La prochaine visite ou refresh chargera les données DB.\n  };\n\n  // Fonction pour force la création du restaurant si l'automatisme a échoué\n  const handleManualRestaurantCreation = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!currentUser) return;\n    setCreationLoading(true);\n\n    const newRestaurantPayload = {\n        owner_id: currentUser.id,\n        name: newRestoName || \"Mon Restaurant\",\n        type: newRestoType,\n        city: currentUser.city || 'Kinshasa',\n        description: `Bienvenue chez ${newRestoName}`,\n        latitude: -4.325 + (Math.random() * 0.01), // Random pos near center\n        longitude: 15.322 + (Math.random() * 0.01),\n        is_open: true,\n        preparation_time: 30,\n        estimated_delivery_time: 30,\n        cover_image: 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?food'\n    };\n\n    try {\n        // 1. Tenter l'insertion DB\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n            .from('restaurants')\n            .insert(newRestaurantPayload)\n            .select()\n            .single();\n\n        if (error) throw error;\n\n        // 2. Si succès, recharger\n        await fetchRestaurants();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n        console.warn(\"Erreur création DB (Mode Offline activé):\", err.message);\n        \n        // 3. Fallback Mode Offline / Démo\n        const mockResto: Restaurant = {\n            id: `temp-${Date.now()}`,\n            ownerId: currentUser.id,\n            name: newRestoName || \"Mon Restaurant (Mode Démo)\",\n            type: newRestoType,\n            city: currentUser.city || 'Kinshasa',\n            description: \"Restaurant créé en mode démonstration.\",\n            latitude: -4.325,\n            longitude: 15.322,\n            isOpen: true,\n            rating: 5.0,\n            reviewCount: 0,\n            preparationTime: 30,\n            estimatedDeliveryTime: 30,\n            deliveryAvailable: true,\n            coverImage: 'https://picsum.photos/800/600?food',\n            menu: []\n        };\n        \n        setRestaurants(prev => [...prev, mockResto]);\n        setIsOfflineMode(true);\n    } finally {\n        setCreationLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-brand-50\">\n        <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-brand-600\"></div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // 1. Not Logged In -> Show Auth\n  if (!currentUser) {\n    return <AuthScreen onLogin={() => {}} />;\n  }\n\n  // Banner component\n  const OfflineBanner = () => isOfflineMode ? (\n    <div className=\"bg-yellow-500 text-white text-xs font-bold px-4 py-1 text-center flex justify-center items-center sticky top-0 z-50\">\n        <AlertTriangle size={14} className=\"mr-2\" />\n        Mode Démo (Connexion Base de Données instable ou Permissions 403)\n    </div>\n  ) : null;\n\n  // 2. Logged in as Business\n  if (currentUser.role === 'business') {\n    const myRestaurant = restaurants.find(r => r.ownerId === currentUser.id);\n    \n    // CAS CRITIQUE : L'utilisateur est Business mais n'a pas de restaurant (Echec initialisation)\n    // On affiche un formulaire de rattrapage au lieu du chargement infini\n    if (!myRestaurant) {\n         return (\n             <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4\">\n                 <OfflineBanner />\n                 \n                 <div className=\"bg-white max-w-md w-full rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8 text-center animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-300\">\n                     <div className=\"w-16 h-16 bg-brand-100 text-brand-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4\">\n                        <Store size={32} />\n                     </div>\n                     \n                     <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-gray-800 mb-2\">Finalisation</h2>\n                     <p className=\"text-gray-500 mb-6\">Nous devons configurer votre établissement pour continuer.</p>\n                     \n                     <form onSubmit={handleManualRestaurantCreation} className=\"space-y-4 text-left\">\n                        <div>\n                            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Nom du restaurant</label>\n                            <input \n                                type=\"text\"\n                                required\n                                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none\"\n                                placeholder=\"Ex: Chez Maman...\"\n                                value={newRestoName}\n                                onChange={e => setNewRestoName(e.target.value)}\n                            />\n                        </div>\n\n                        <div>\n                            <label className=\"block text-xs font-bold text-gray-600 mb-1\">Type d'établissement</label>\n                            <select \n                                className=\"w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 outline-none bg-white\"\n                                value={newRestoType}\n
